5.8.83.en: v5.8.83: DEEP PR AUDIT — (1) switch_dimmer_1gang REWRITE: Fixed to use TuyaSpecificClusterDevice (matching PacketNinja PR #112 original), added heartbeat filtering, brightness change threshold (~1%), brightness_increased/decreased flow triggers, DEBUG_MODE, correct (raw-10)/990 formula. (2) air_purifier NEW: Created missing device.js + driver.js for TS0601 air purifier (DP1=on/off, DP2=PM2.5, DP4=fan speed), flow triggers + action cards. (3) wall_switch_1gang_1way SCENE MODE: Added auto/magic/both scene mode with gang1_scene trigger and set_scene_mode action (matching 2gang/3gang pattern). (4) All JohanBendz upstream PR fingerprints verified present.

5.8.82.en: v5.8.82: PACKETNINJA AUDIT + ENRICHMENT — (1) NEW switch_dimmer_1gang device.js + driver.js: BSEED Touch Dimmer (TS0601) was missing device logic from PR #111. Added Tuya DP handler (DP1=on/off, DP2=brightness 10-1000), physical button detection, brightness flow trigger, settings for min_brightness/power_on_behavior/light_type. (2) WALL SWITCH 3-GANG SCENE MODE: Added auto/magic/both scene mode (matching 2-gang pattern) with per-gang scene triggers (gang1/gang2/gang3_scene), scene mode action card, and magic mode support. (3) All JohanBendz PR fingerprints verified present — no missing fingerprints found.

5.8.81.en: v5.8.81: WALL SWITCH 2-GANG BSEED + SCENE MODE — (1) Moved BSEED fingerprints (_TZ3000_bseed) from switch_2gang to wall_switch_2gang_1way to avoid duplicate matching. (2) Added all 8 BSEED ZCL-only fingerprints (l9brjwau, blhvsaqf, ysdv91bk, hafsqare, e98krvvk, iedbgyxt, xk5udnd6, bseed) with TS0002+TS0012 productIds. (3) NEW scene mode settings: Auto (normal switch + flow triggers), Magic (scene-only — load unchanged, reverts after press), Both (controls load AND triggers scene flows). (4) Per-gang scene flow triggers: gang1_scene, gang2_scene with action token. (5) Sub-device architecture: each gang = separate Homey device card with independent physical button detection and scene mode.

5.8.80.en: v5.8.80: DEVICE PROFILE REGISTRY — New centralized per-fingerprint configuration system. (1) DeviceProfileRegistry with 3-tier lookup: exact (mfr+productId), manufacturer-only, productId-only, plus dynamic introspection fallback. (2) Static profiles for switches (TS0001-TS0014, TS0726 BSEED, TS0601), covers (TS130F ZCL, TS0601 curtains), sensors (contact, motion, water, climate, smoke), buttons (TS0041-TS0046, TS004F), thermostats (standard TRV, Moes, AVATTO), plugs (TS011F energy, TS0601, water valves), lights (TS0501-TS0505, dimmers, LED strips). (3) Integrated into ALL 7 base classes: BaseHybridDevice, HybridSwitchBase, HybridCoverBase, HybridSensorBase, ButtonDevice, HybridPlugBase, HybridLightBase, HybridThermostatBase. Each device now resolves its profile on init and applies per-fingerprint DP mappings and quirks.

5.8.79.en: v5.8.79: FORUM FIXES — (1) FIX TS0726 4-gang EP2-4 not responding (Hartmut_Dunker): replaced SDK3 configureAttributeReporting() with direct cluster configureReporting() calls — SDK3 method fails silently when interview missed onOff on EP2-4. (2) FIX TS130F ZCL curtain interference (Tbao): guarded _setupTuyaDPListener and _applyCalibrationSettings with protocol check — were sending Tuya DP commands on ZCL windowCovering devices.

5.8.78.en: v5.8.78: PACKETNINJA PR REVIEW + PHYSICAL BUTTON AUDIT — (1) FIX BSEED fingerprints: removed 4 duplicates from switch_1gang, moved _TZ3000_iedbgyxt from valve_single, removed _TZ3000_ysdv91bk from climate_sensor. All 6 BSEED ZCL-only now route to wall_switch_1gang_1way (PR #118). (2) ADDED 156 physical button flow cards to switch_wall_5-8gang + 5 to din_rail_switch. PhysicalButtonMixin was active but cards undefined — triggers silently failed.

5.8.77.en: v5.8.77: SENSOR & BUTTON FIXES — (1) FIX HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM wrong config: modelId not found on first init because _getSensorConfig() didn't check zclNode.modelId. Device got HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI (DP101→humidity) instead of HOBEIAN_ZG204ZM (DP101→motion_state). Added zclNode.modelId + _cachedModelId + productId to lookup chain. Also invalidates FALLBACK configs when better match available. (2) FIX HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM incomplete settings: dpMap setting keys mismatched driver.compose.json IDs. Added missing large_motion_sensitivity/distance (DP2/DP4), small_detection_distance/sensitivity (DP108/DP109) settings. Fixed DP104/DP105 keys to match compose. Added DP3→measure_distance capability. (3) FIX _TZE200_3towulqd motion_sensor DEFAULT profile: _getManufacturerProfile() didn't check zclNode.manufacturerName or _cachedManufacturerName — fell through to DEFAULT on first init. Now finds manufacturer from zclNode. (4) FIX ButtonDevice _applyManufacturerConfig blank manufacturer: added zclNode + _cached sources to mfr/model lookup. Ensures correct config even when settings/store empty on first init.

5.8.76.en: v5.8.76: 4 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES — (1) FIX button_pressed/button_double_press generic flow card token type: parseInt(x)||x could still return string when x is non-numeric, causing 'Expected number but got string' error on ALL button drivers. Now uses Number(x)||1 to always return a number. (2) FIX presence_sensor_radar false 'DP1 parsing failed' diagnostic: condition !value triggered on value 0 (valid no-presence). Changed to null/undefined check — 0 is a legitimate presence=false value for _TZE200_crq3r3la and similar radar sensors. (3) FIX blank manufacturer name on _TZ3000_5bpeda8u/TS0041 and similar devices: constructor _detectPureTuyaDP() found manufacturerName via getData() but didn't cache it. By the time ensureManufacturerSettings() ran in onNodeInit, the value was lost. Now caches _cachedManufacturerName/_cachedModelId during constructor detection. (4) FIX battery '?' on button devices (_TZ3000_bczr4e10/TS0043 etc): battery was only read on physical button press, so devices showed '?' until first press. Added delayed init battery read (5s after init) that restores from store first, then tries ZCL read while sleepy device may still be awake from pairing/reboot.

5.8.75.en: v5.8.75: PETER'S DEVICES FIX — (1) FIX HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM not recognized (showed as generic 'Appareil Zigbee'): Added HOBEIAN manufacturer + ZG-204ZM productId to motion_sensor_radar_mmwave driver. This is a mmWave presence sensor with radar+PIR, battery, illuminance, fading time, detection distance/sensitivity settings. (2) FIX _TZE200_3towulqd (ZG-204ZL) DP9 mapping bug: DP9 was incorrectly mapped to measure_luminance for ALL profiles, but on ZG-204ZL DP9 is sensitivity (enum 0=Low/1=Med/2=High), NOT illuminance. DP12 is the actual illuminance. Removed DP9 from generic luminance mappings. (3) NEW PIR Sensitivity + Keep Time settings for _TZE200_3towulqd and similar TS0601 PIR sensors: DP9 sensitivity (Low/Medium/High), DP10 keep_time (10s/30s/60s/120s). Settings sync bi-directionally — device reports update UI, UI changes send DPs to device. Source: Z2M #12364.

5.8.74.en: v5.8.74: CRITICAL TIME SYNC FIX + USB DONGLE TRIPLE — (1) FIX wrong epoch in TuyaTimeSyncManager.sendTimeSync(): was using Unix 1970 timestamps but ALL Tuya TS0601 devices expect Tuya 2000 epoch (seconds since 2000-01-01). Caused LCD climate monitors to show wrong time/date/GMT (~25 years off). Confirmed by Z2M issue #30054. (2) FIX syncDeviceTimeTuya() needsTuyaEpoch: was missing _TZE200_ prefix — only checked _TZE284/_TZE204. Now all _TZE* and TS0601 devices use correct epoch. (3) FIX climate_sensor needsTuyaEpoch getter: added _TZE200/_TZE204 prefixes. (4) FIX climate_sensor _sendForcedTimeSync() scoping bug: utcSeconds was block-scoped in Method 2 try block but referenced in Method 3, causing ReferenceError. (5) NEW usb_dongle_triple driver for _TZ3000_mw1pqqqt/TS0003 (3-port USB switch module). Removed from switch_3gang where it was misplaced.

5.8.73.en: v5.8.73: PACKETNINJA SUB-DEVICE — NEW wall_switch_2gang_1way + wall_switch_3gang_1way drivers with sub-device support (each gang = separate Homey device card). Enhanced switch_2gang/3gang ZCL-only: per-EP configureReporting + initial state read.

5.8.72.en: v5.8.72: FIX _TZE284_oitavov2 soil sensor install error (DutchDuke forum report) — (1) Fixed driver endpoint declaration: removed cluster 1 (powerConfiguration) and its binding — device doesn't have this cluster (actual: [0, 4, 5, 61184, 60672]), causing binding failure during pairing. Battery is via Tuya DP14/DP15, not ZCL. Updated to match actual device clusters [0, 4, 5, 61184]. (2) Made _initFlowTriggers resilient with try-catch wrappers to prevent onNodeInit crash if any flow card is missing or misconfigured.

5.8.71.en: v5.8.71: 3 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES — (1) FIX _TZE200_crq3r3la (JJ10 CK-BL702-MWS-01): Added noIasMotion:true — IAS Zone was sending false 'presence_cleared' conflicting with DP1 presence detection. Added DP101 (motion_state), DP106 (illuminance alt), DP122 (target_distance). Changed battery:false (USB powered). (2) FIX button_pressed generic flow card: Homey built-in cards (button_pressed/button_double_press/button_long_press/button_multi_press) expect button token as number, was passing string causing 'Invalid value for token button. Expected number but got string'. Affects ALL button drivers. (3) DIAG _TZ3000_5bpeda8u TS0041: Fingerprint exists, all listeners configured — diagnostic log too short (only init captured), no physical presses in window.

5.8.70.en: v5.8.70: ANTI-FLOOD — Prevents excessive battery/temperature/humidity status updates (forum reports: Peter, Cam). (1) HybridSensorBase._safeSetCapability: added same-value dedup + per-capability min-interval throttle (battery 5min, temp/humidity 30s, alarms 2s, others 10s) with significant-change bypass. (2) BaseHybridDevice: added _shouldThrottleCap() generic throttle, applied to ALL attr listeners (battery, temperature, humidity) — 6 listeners fixed. (3) SmartBatteryManager: 5min throttle + 2% bypass + alarm_battery dedup. (4) UnifiedBatteryHandler: 5min throttle + store restore instead of misleading 100% default. (5) TuyaHybridDevice/ButtonDevice/BaseTuyaDPDevice: battery update throttle + dedup. (6) HybridThermostatBase: ZCL attr + _safeSetCapability dedup. (7) Aligned all battery significant-change thresholds to 2%.

5.8.69.en: v5.8.69: COMPREHENSIVE BATTERY FIX — Fixes '?' battery display across ALL device types. (1) BatteryManager.validateAndCorrectPercentage: fixed wrong check order (<=200 before <=100 made 0-100 branch unreachable). (2) BatterySystem.normalizeBatteryValue: fixed wrong check order (<=100 caught all Zigbee 0-200 values, treating 80 as 80% instead of 40%). (3) BatterySystem.calculatePercentageFromVoltage: replaced broken LINEAR formula with non-linear discharge curves (CR2032/2xAA/Li-ion/AA per Z2M profiles). (4) UnifiedBatteryHandler: added missing DP21/DP100/DP104 + driver-based curve selection for TRV/lock/thermostat. (5) HybridSensorBase: added DP10/DP21/DP102/DP104/DP105 to battery DP list. (6) ButtonDevice: stopped rejecting batteryPercentageRemaining===0 (valid dead battery). (7) BaseHybridDevice: added stored battery restoration for sleeping devices — no more '?' on init failure. Persists battery to store on every report for future restore.

5.8.68.en: v5.8.68: FIX _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn + 6 BUGS — (1) Moved from switch_2gang to usb_dongle_dual_repeater (XMSJ USB Power Switch, not wall switch). (2) Fix metering cluster fallbacks (metering/seMetering/0x0702). (3) Fix electricalMeasurement 0x0B04 fallback. (4) Add hasCapability guards for TS0207 compatibility. (5) Add initial onOff state read. (6) Add power-on behavior (off/on/toggle/previous) + indicator LED settings. (7) Add tuyaBacklightSwitch support. Researched 10+ sources: Z2M #23625/#26121/#24039, Sprut Hub #3517, AliExpress XMSJ, interview data.

5.8.67.en: v5.8.67: BATTERY RECOGNITION FIX — (1) CRITICAL FIX: SmartBatteryManager _voltageToPercent used broken linear formula (mV-2000)/1000*100 giving wildly inaccurate readings. Replaced with non-linear discharge curves per battery chemistry: CR2032/CR2450 (Z2M '3V_2100' profile), 2xAA/2xAAA alkaline, single AA/AAA, Li-ion. Auto-detects battery type from driver name and voltage range. Added DP21 to battery DPs (TRVs). (2) FIX: BaseHybridDevice initial battery read used raw batteryPercentageRemaining without /2 (Zigbee reports 0-200 scale), causing doubled percentage display. (3) FIX: 7 instances of broken linear voltage-to-percent formulas across BaseHybridDevice.js (3), HybridSensorBase.js (2), ButtonDevice.js (1), UnifiedBatteryHandler.js (1). All replaced with non-linear CR2032 curve interpolation matching Z2M profiles.

5.8.66.en: v5.8.66: BUTTON DRIVER ENHANCEMENT + CASE SENSITIVITY FIX — (1) FIX: button_wireless_1 missing cluster 0xE000 (57344) support. GitHub #121 _TZ3000_an5rjiwd TS0041 button presses not detected because device uses Tuya cluster 0xE000 for events, which was only handled in button_wireless_3 and button_wireless_4. Added TuyaE000BoundCluster + driver.compose.json cluster/binding entries. (2) FIX PR #124: 84 missing uppercase manufacturer name variants across 18 drivers (bulb_rgb, button_wireless, climate_sensor, curtain_motor, dimmer, led_controller, thermostat, valve, etc.). Devices reporting uppercase _TZE200/_TZB210/_TZ3400 were not matched, causing 'unknown device' pairing failures. Cross-referenced 12 desktop interview files + 11 PRs from dlnraja and JohanBendz repos.

5.8.65.en: v5.8.65: 4x4_PETE DEVICE AUDIT — (1) CRITICAL FIX: _TZE200_3towulqd ZCL-only variant (no cluster 61184) had BOTH motion paths blocked: DP1 impossible (no Tuya DP) AND IAS Zone skipped (noIasMotion:true). Now auto-detects Tuya DP cluster presence and overrides noIasMotion when device is ZCL-only. (2) FIX: TZE284_IADRO9BF (ZY-M100-S_2) DP102 was mapped to measure_luminance but is actually fading_time per Z2M. Fading time values were displayed as lux readings. (3) UPGRADE: TZE284_IADRO9BF radar settings (DP2 sensitivity, DP3/4 min/max range, DP101 detection_delay, DP102 fading_time) from internal-only to user-configurable settings. (4) UPGRADE: WZ_M100 (_TZE204_laokfqwu) radar settings (DP2-4, DP104-106) from internal-only to user-configurable settings. All 10 Pete devices verified across 10+ sources (Z2M, ZHA, Blakadder, deCONZ, interview files).

5.8.64.en: v5.8.64: FIX CURTAIN MOTOR CRASH (expected_cluster_id_number) — HybridCoverBase.registerCapability was declared async, converting synchronous TypeError from assertClusterSpecification into a rejected Promise. The try/catch in _setupZCLMode only catches synchronous throws, so the rejection was unhandled and crashed the app. Fix: removed async keyword (super.registerCapability is synchronous).

5.8.63.en: v5.8.63: HOBEIAN DEVICE AUDIT (4x4_Pete) — Fix critical config map collisions: removed _TZE200_3towulqd from ZCL_ONLY_RADAR (useTuyaDP:false broke DP processing), removed from ZG_204ZL_PIR (overrode ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR). Fixed _TZE204_ztqnh5cg collision. Moved _TZE200_y8jijhba to correct config (Z2M #29145: no temp/humidity). Completed all DP maps per Z2M: ZG-204ZM +6 settings DPs, fixed DP2/DP4 labels+ranges. ZG-204ZL +DP102+settings. ZG-204ZV +4 settings DPs. ZG-227Z +calibration DPs.

5.8.62.en: 🔧 v5.8.62: COMPREHENSIVE APP AUDIT — (1) FIX DUPLICATE FINGERPRINTS: Removed TS0003 from switch_2gang (belongs to switch_3gang only) and TS0726 from switch_wall_6gang (belongs to switch_4gang only). Prevents wrong driver matching. (2) FIX BROKEN IMPORTS: led_controller_dimmable had wrong paths for TuyaSpecificCluster and TuyaSpecificClusterDevice (../../lib/ → ../../lib/tuya/). Would cause MODULE_NOT_FOUND crash on init. (3) ADD titleFormatted TO 1218 FLOW CARDS: All 106 driver flow files now have titleFormatted on every trigger, condition, and action card. Fixes future SDK validation requirements. Repaired 11 corrupted entries in 3 drivers (button_emergency_sos, module_mini_switch, switch_wireless) where plain-string titles caused malformed titleFormatted. (4) VERIFIED: 0 [[device]] in driver-level triggers, 0 duplicate flow card IDs, 0 broken imports across all drivers, all driver.compose.json configs valid, publish-level validation passes with 0 warnings.

5.8.61.en: 🔧 v5.8.61: (1) FIX HOBEIAN PIR SENSOR IN RADAR DRIVER (diag 25cbd6ae): HOBEIAN devices with unknown modelId fell back to HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI config which only mapped radar DPs (DP101-111). PIR variants (ZG-204ZL) send DP4=battery, DP9=sensitivity, DP10=keep_time, DP12=lux — all UNMAPPED. Fix: Added PIR variant DPs to HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI fallback dpMap as superset, and added ZG-204ZL modelId routing to ZG_204ZL_PIR config. (2) FIX MOTION SENSOR BLANK MANUFACTURER NAME (diag e2148e06): _TZE200_3towulqd devices with blank zb_manufacturer_name in all data sources fell through to DEFAULT DP profile, missing temp/humidity/lux capabilities. Fix: When mfr is blank and modelId is TS0601, default to PERMISSIVE_VARIANT profile which dynamically accepts all DP types.

5.8.60.en: 🔧 v5.8.60: (1) FIX TS130F CURTAIN UP/DOWN (Tbao _TZ3000_bs93npae): ZCL windowCovering commands (upOpen/downClose/stop/goToLiftPercentage) were silently failing because manual cluster.upOpen?.() calls returned undefined. Fix: Use Homey SDK3 registerCapability('closuresWindowCovering') which handles ZCL command mapping automatically. Manual Tuya DP listeners preserved for TS0601 covers. (2) FIX PIR MOTION NOT WORKING (4x4_Pete HOBEIAN _TZE200_3towulqd): DP1 was double-processed — first by _handleCommonDP with holdoff delay (correct), then by dpMappings which immediately set alarm_motion=false (bypassing holdoff). This caused motion to clear in milliseconds, making PIR sensors appear non-functional. Fix: Skip dpMappings processing for DP1→alarm_motion since _handleCommonDP already handles it with holdoff.

5.8.59.en: 🔧 v5.8.59: FIX SCENE SWITCH FLOW CARDS (Freddyboy) - Physical button presses on scene_switch_1/2/3/4/6 drivers were not triggering flows. Root cause: ButtonDevice._triggerButton generated flow card IDs with '_button_Xgang' infix (e.g. scene_switch_4_button_4gang_button_pressed) but scene_switch drivers use simpler IDs (e.g. scene_switch_4_button_pressed). Added fallback flow card ID patterns without the gang infix for single/double/long press. Now ButtonDevice tries both naming conventions, fixing all scene switch drivers.

5.8.58.en: 🔧 v5.8.58: FORUM REGRESSION FIXES - (1) FIX water sensor no alarm (Lasse_K): IASZoneManager._handleZoneStatusChange now handles alarm_water capability using both alarm1 AND alarm2 bits. Previously only alarm_contact/alarm_motion were handled, water sensors with IAS Zone never triggered. (2) FIX contact sensor double-inversion (blutch32 _TZ3000_996rpfy6): IAS Zone events now bypass manufacturer-specific _invertContact logic. IAS alarm1=true already means 'open/alarm' per ZCL spec - only Tuya DP values need inversion. (3) FIX curtain wrong capabilities (Tbao TS130F): DCM SAFE tier now skips irrelevant caps for dedicated drivers - covers don't get measure_battery/measure_luminance, switches don't get measure_luminance. (4) FIX BSEED TS0726 4-gang EP2-4 (Hartmut_Dunker): Added configureAttributeReporting for onOff on all 4 endpoints after binding - without reporting config, EP2-4 may not send attr.onOff reports.

5.8.57.en: 🔧 v5.8.57: FIX BLANK MANUFACTURER NAMES - Added ensureManufacturerSettings() to ALL 9 base classes (BaseHybridDevice, HybridSwitchBase, HybridSensorBase, HybridCoverBase, HybridLightBase, HybridPlugBase, HybridThermostatBase, TuyaHybridDevice, BaseTuyaDPDevice). Root cause: when basic cluster read fails during pairing, zb_manufacturer_name and zb_model_id settings stay blank forever — breaking variant detection, protocol detection, and showing 'unknown/unknown' in UI. Fix: On every device init, resolves manufacturer+model from full fallback chain (settings → store → data → zclNode → cache → driver manifest → async basic cluster read), then writes back to settings if blank. Non-blocking with .catch() — safe for sleepy battery devices.

5.8.56.en: 🔧 v5.8.56: 4x4_PETE 3-DEVICE ENRICHMENT - (1) CRITICAL FIX: DP4 PERMISSIVE_VARIANT smart detection in motion_sensor. ZG-204ZL (PIR-only) and ZG-204ZV (multisensor) share _TZE200_3towulqd manufacturerName but DP4 means different things: battery for ZG-204ZL, humidity for ZG-204ZV. Previously DP4 was always mapped to humidity with *10 multiplier, so ZG-204ZL battery (75*10=750) failed range check and was LOST forever. Fix: Runtime check _hasReceivedTempDP — if DP3 temp received, DP4=humidity (ZG-204ZV has temp sensor); if not, DP4=battery (ZG-204ZL has no temp). (2) Removed HOBEIAN from universal_fallback driver fingerprints to prevent ZG-204ZM pairing as generic 'Appareil Zigbee' instead of presence_sensor_radar. HOBEIAN now has specific drivers only. (3) Added missing Moes _TZ3000_gbm10jnj TS0043 fingerprint to button_wireless_3 (Z2M: Moes ZT-B-EU3 scene switch). (4) Verified _TZ3000_bczr4e10/TS0043 fully supported: single/double/hold via 3-layer detection (OnOff commands + E000 BoundCluster + Raw frame interceptor + base class multistateInput).

5.8.55.en: 🔧 v5.8.55: ZG-204ZM RADAR SENSOR DEEP SUPPORT (4x4_Pete) - (1) Added missing Tuya DPs to HOBEIAN_ZG204ZM config: DP121 (battery fallback via Tuya DP), DP122 (motion_detection_mode: PIR/radar/both), DP123 (motion_detection_sensitivity). (2) Added onSettings() to presence_sensor_radar that dynamically reads dpMap 'setting:' entries and writes Tuya DPs when user changes device settings. Previously settings changes were saved locally but NEVER sent to device hardware. Now motion_detection_mode, fading_time, indicator, sensitivity, static_detection_distance all write to device. (3) Added static_detection_distance setting (0-6m) to driver.compose.json. (4) Aligned HOBEIAN_ZG204ZM DP setting keys with ZG_204ZM_RADAR config for consistency. Sources: Z2M ZG-204ZM page, Z2M #21919, SmartHomeScene review, 4x4_Pete interview data.

5.8.54.en: 🔧 v5.8.54: MOES BUTTON + SOIL SENSOR FIX - (1) Fixed Moes 4-button physical press NOT detected (diag e5c0bbf5). Root cause: TuyaE000Cluster defined only cmd 0x00+0x01 with rigid uint8 args - SDK silently dropped frames with other command IDs. Fix: Defined cmd 0x00-0x06 + 0xFD/FE/FF with buffer args so ANY Tuya button frame deserializes. Applied to button_wireless_2/4/6/8 drivers. (2) Fixed soil sensor manufacturer blank (diag cf2e5ebe). Added getStoreValue+getData fallbacks to TuyaHybridDevice manufacturer name resolution. (3) Fixed mcuVersionRequest command args: was empty causing malformed frames on some devices. Now sends proper 2-byte seq payload per Tuya protocol spec.

5.8.53.en: 🔧 v5.8.53: HOBEIAN SENSOR FIX - (1) Fixed _TZE200_3towulqd motion sensor using 'default DP profile' instead of PERMISSIVE_VARIANT. Root cause: _getManufacturerProfile() was missing getStoreValue() fallback for manufacturer name lookup. (2) Added HOBEIAN brand fingerprint to presence_sensor_radar driver so ZG-204ZM can pair. (3) Added HOBEIAN to motion_sensor driver fingerprints and VARIANT_MANUFACTURERS list. (4) Fixed PERMISSIVE_VARIANT DP12 mapping: removed static dp12=battery (was showing 1999% for ZG-204ZL illuminance values), now handled by smart base class detection.

5.8.52.en: 🔧 v5.8.52: (1) TS130F CURTAIN FIX - Fixed _TZ3000_bs93npae TS130F curtain switch sending Tuya DP commands instead of ZCL windowCovering cluster 258. Root cause: ManufacturerVariationManager set _isPureTuyaDP=true for 'mixed' protocol before _detectProtocol() could override. (2) IR BLASTER ZS06 FIX - Fixed Zosung IR clusters (0xE004, 0xED00) not available at runtime. Extracted cluster definitions to lib/clusters/ and registered at app startup in registerClusters.js. Removed 0xED00 from UnknownClusterHandler pre-registration to prevent conflict. Device now correctly detects zosungIRControl + zosungIRTransmit + onOff clusters.

5.8.51.en: 🔧 v5.8.51: CRITICAL FIX - (1) Fixed missing super.onSettings() in 5 base classes (Sensor, Cover, Light, Plug, Switch) - regression from v5.8.49 broke power/battery settings for all devices. (2) TS0726 BSEED 4-gang: added explicit EP1-4 onOff binding in ZCL-only mode - fixes only button 1 working.

5.8.50.en: 🧹 v5.8.50: COMPREHENSIVE CLEANUP & ENRICHMENT - (1) Fingerprint cleanup: Removed 31,779 non-Tuya brand names from 104 drivers (kept only _TZ*, _TYZB*, _TYST*, TUYATEC* patterns). Reduced collisions from 7,434 to 2,194. (2) Fixed 2 empty drivers: Added 10 pilot wire thermostat fingerprints to radiator_controller, added 5 USB repeater fingerprints to usb_dongle_dual_repeater. (3) Translations: Added missing French translations to 9 drivers (ir_blaster, switch_1-4gang, dimmer_dual_channel, switch_dimmer_1gang, wall_dimmer/switch_1gang_1way). Added missing German translations to 3 drivers. (4) README: Rewritten per Homey SDK guidelines (plain text, no URLs, no changelog, 2 paragraphs). (5) Flow cards: Added 4 flow cards to pet_feeder (feed trigger, food low trigger, food OK condition, feed now action) with 4-language support. (6) New fingerprints: Added _TZ3210_s8lvbbuc to bulb_rgb, _TZ3000_eafaa66e to curtain_motor, _TZ3210_invesber to led_strip, _TZ3210_zdrhqmo0 to bulb_dimmable from Z2M/GitHub sources. (7) Monthly workflow: Completely rewritten monthly-fingerprint-sync.md with 9 comprehensive steps covering all sources (Z2M, ZHA, GitHub, forums, manufacturer sites). (8) Validated at publish level.

5.8.49.en: ⚡ v5.8.49: SDK3 BEST PRACTICES - Applied improvements from analysis of IKEA Tradfri, Sonoff Zigbee, and Homey SDK3 documentation. (1) HybridCoverBase: Added onSettings handler to write motor direction, speed, backlight, and calibration settings to device via Tuya DP. Added ZCL attribute reporting for windowCovering cluster position updates on TS130F devices. Added initial position read on startup. (2) HybridLightBase: Added onSettings handler for power-on behavior and transition time. Added ZCL attribute reporting for onOff and levelControl clusters. Added initial light state read on startup. (3) HybridPlugBase: Added ZCL attribute reporting for onOff, electrical measurement (activePower), and metering (energy) clusters. Added initial plug state read on startup. (4) HybridSensorBase: Added onSettings handler with Tuya DP mapping for common sensor settings (sensitivity, detection delay, reporting interval, illuminance threshold, temperature/humidity offset, alarm duration). All changes ensure real-time device configuration and reliable state synchronization.

5.8.48.en: 📋 v5.8.48: FLOW CARD COMPLETENESS - Audited all 111 drivers and added 448 missing flow cards with unique namespaced IDs across 4 languages (en/fr/nl/de). (1) Created 6 missing driver.flow.compose.json files (air_purifier, diy_custom_zigbee, fingerbot, illuminance_sensor, switch_dimmer_1gang, zigbee_repeater). (2) Added 220 missing onoff flow cards (turned_on/off triggers, is_on conditions, turn_on/off/toggle actions) to 46 drivers. (3) Added 155 missing sensor/alarm trigger cards (battery_low, temperature_changed, humidity_changed, power_changed, lux_changed, distance_changed, motion_detected/cleared, water_alarm, contact_alarm, smoke_alarm, tamper_alarm, co_alarm, gas_alarm, vibration_alarm, lock_changed) to 91 drivers. (4) Added 34 missing condition cards for alarm capabilities to 21 drivers. (5) Added 39 missing action cards (set_brightness, lock/unlock, set_temperature, set_position, open/close/stop) to 32 drivers. (6) Fixed 2 duplicate flow card IDs in gas_detector. All 1457 flow card IDs verified unique. Validated at publish level.

5.8.47.en: 🔧 v5.8.47: DIAGNOSTIC DEVICE FIXES - (1) BSEED TS0726 4-gang (_TZ3002_pzao9ls1): Improved _ensureOnOffClusters robustness - try both string/numeric cluster lookups, multiple constructor patterns, store under multiple keys (onOff, 6, '6') so EP2-4 gang control works reliably even when Homey interview misses clusters. (2) MOES wireless 4-button (TS0044/TS004F): Added levelControl cluster (8) listeners for dimmer mode detection - when device is in dimmer mode (default after battery change), buttons send moveWithOnOff/stepWithOnOff commands on levelControl instead of scenes. Now detected and triggers flows correctly. (3) Curtain motor TS130F: Fixed windowCovering cluster lookup - added numeric ID (258) and string ('258') fallbacks via new _getWindowCoveringCluster() helper. TS130F devices where cluster was stored under numeric key instead of string name now work correctly for position and state commands.

5.8.46.en: 🔍 v5.8.46: DEVICE VERIFICATION & ENRICHMENT - Cross-referenced all interview devices against 10+ sources (Z2M, ZHA, Blakadder, GitHub). (1) FIXED wrong DP mappings for WZ-M100 presence sensor (_TZE204_laokfqwu): split from ILLUMINANCE_FOCUS into new WZ_M100 config with Z2M-verified DPs (DP9=distance NOT lux, DP103=illuminance, DP105=detection_delay, DP106=fading_time). (2) Added new Y1_IN presence sensor config (_TZE204_bmdsp6bs) with unique DP layout (DP182=distance÷10, DP103=lux, DP110/114=sensitivity). (3) Added _TZE204_bmdsp6bs fingerprint to presence_sensor_radar driver. (4) Verified all 10 interview devices in correct drivers with correct DP mappings. (5) Confirmed _TZE284_iadro9bf invertPresence matches Z2M trueFalse0. (6) Confirmed climate sensor DP4 battery×2 via Blakadder ZBBridge filter.

5.8.45.en: 🧹 v5.8.45: FLOW CARD MAJOR CLEANUP - (1) Removed 87 phantom flow card registrations from FlowCardManager.js that were never defined in app.json and silently failed at startup (1209→148 lines). (2) Disabled dead registerFlowCards() and registerOTAFlowCards() in app.js (9 more phantom cards). (3) Fixed [[device]] bug in 3 app-level trigger titleFormatted fields (sub_capability_changed, tuya_dp_received, tuya_dp_threshold_crossed) - was causing manual device selection issue in flow editor. (4) Fixed 3 wrong flow card IDs in fan_controller device.js (fan_turned_on→fan_controller_turned_on, etc). (5) Added 2 missing trigger cards: curtain_motor button_pressed + usb_outlet_button_pressed. Total: 95 flow card issues fixed.

5.8.44.en: v5.8.44: SMART FEATURES REWRITE - DynamicCapabilityManager, PeriodicAutoEnricher, and UniversalVariantManager completely rewritten to be safe and conflict-free. (1) DCM now enabled for ALL drivers in SAFE mode: only adds read-only measurement capabilities (temperature, humidity, luminance, battery, pressure, power) from ZCL clusters. FULL mode (controllable caps + DP heuristics) only for universal_fallback driver. Never adds onoff/dim/alarm to dedicated drivers. (2) PeriodicAutoEnricher converted to value-refresh-only: no longer adds capabilities, just reads fresh ZCL attribute values for existing caps (10min + 4h schedule). (3) UniversalVariantManager: removed dangerous DP1 heuristic (was adding alarm_motion to switches), only adds safe measurement caps, removed ambiguous DP-to-capability mappings. Fixes v5.8.36 regression where enabling DCM globally broke climate sensors, presence sensors, and switches.

5.8.43.en: 🎯 v5.8.43: PR#125 michelhelsdingen - HOBEIAN 10G RADAR SENSOR FIXES (tested on real hardware): (1) IAS Motion conflict: Device sends DP1=true (motion) but IAS Zone sends false 500ms later, clearing motion after 0.5s instead of holding 30-120s. Fix: noIasMotion flag skips IAS Zone motion for ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR + HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI where Tuya DP1 is authoritative. (2) Battery never reported: HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI was configured as mains-powered (battery:false) but device IS battery-powered. Fix: battery:true + one-time ZCL PowerConfiguration read + Tuya dataQuery after 5s init delay. Added DP110 (battery). (3) DP corrections: DP101 humidity multiplier:10→divisor:10 (raw 450→45.0% not raw 9→90%). Added DP2 (sensitivity), DP102 (fading_time). (4) ZG-204ZM: Set noTemperature/noHumidity=true, removed phantom optional temp DPs (111,18,3). (5) Simplified capability init logic. Thanks @michelhelsdingen!

5.8.42.en: 🚨 v5.8.42: CRITICAL FINGERPRINT CONFLICT FIX - HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM (Pete's radar sensor) was showing as 'Unknown Zigbee Device' because ZG-204ZM productId was in BOTH motion_sensor AND presence_sensor_radar drivers. Homey couldn't determine which driver to use → fell back to generic device. Fix: Removed ZG-204ZM and TS0225 from motion_sensor productId (these are radar/mmWave sensors belonging exclusively in presence_sensor_radar). Users with affected devices must DELETE and RE-PAIR after updating. Also processed 5 new diagnostic reports: (1) 83af3e29 BSEED 4-gang=fixed v5.8.40 (2) cf2e5ebe soil sensor=known seq issue (3) 9d71284c TS0041 button=fixed v5.8.40 (4) 61cb217f motion sensor=working fine (5) aff49509 HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM=THIS FIX.

5.8.41.en: 🪟 v5.8.41: FORUM+GITHUB TRIAGE - (1) Tbao TS130F curtain switch (_TZ3000_bs93npae): wrong capabilities (luminance, battery, button) shown on ZCL curtain. Fix: detect ZCL protocol and skip Tuya-DP-only capabilities, remove incorrect ones. (2) Verified: Hartmut BSEED 4-gang, Cam TS0041 button, 3reality presence sensor all fixed in v5.8.40. (3) Verified: Karsten_Hille temp/humidity, DutchDuke soil sensor fixed in v5.8.38. (4) GitHub #124 Lalla80111: fingerprints _TZ3000_fllyghyj/_TZ3000_b4awzgct already have uppercase. (5) blutch32 TS0203 contact sensor: fingerprint+IAS enrollment exist, user should re-pair.

5.8.40.en: 🔧 v5.8.40: THREE DIAGNOSTIC FIXES - (1) BSEED TS0726 4-gang switch (diag 83af3e29): EP2-4 onOff cluster not found. Homey interview misses onOff on EP2-4, so commands fail. Fix: manually instantiate onOff cluster using zigbee-clusters on missing endpoints. (2) TS0041 _TZ3000_5bpeda8u button (diag 9d71284c): physical presses not registering. Root cause: button sends onOff COMMANDS (client-to-server) which go to endpoint.bindings, not clusters. Without OnOffBoundCluster installed, frames silently dropped. Fix: universal OnOffBoundCluster for ALL 1-gang buttons (was HOBEIAN-only). (3) 3reality presence sensor (diag 3aed664b): flipping on/off every minute. Root cause: device sends compound multi-DP frame in single EF00 message. DP1 value is 1 byte but buffer contains 19 bytes of additional DPs. Parser read entire buffer as uint32 → garbage value 67109120. Fix: detect compound frames (buffer > declared length), slice to correct size, parse remaining bytes as additional TLV sub-DPs.

5.8.39.en: 🔘 v5.8.39: FIX TS0043 LORATAP 3-BUTTON REMOTE (Issue #98 DVMasters) - Buttons not triggering flows. Root causes: (1) commandToggle was wrongly mapped to 'long' press instead of 'single' (2) No raw frame interceptor for cluster 0xE000 - SDK discards unknown cluster frames (3) onOff cluster not bound on EP2-3 so device didn't send events to Homey. Fix: Complete rewrite of button_wireless_3 device with 3-layer detection: onOff commands with correct mappings + E000 BoundCluster + raw frame interceptor. User should DELETE and RE-PAIR device.

5.8.38.en: 🚨 v5.8.38: REGRESSION FIX for v5.8.36 - DynamicCapabilityManager was enabled globally which broke climate sensors (Karsten_Hille), presence sensors (FinnKje), and soil sensor installs (DutchDuke). Root cause: DP heuristics conflict with existing device handlers (DP1=onoff vs alarm_motion, etc). Fix: (1) DynamicCapabilityManager now ONLY active for universal_fallback/zigbee_universal drivers (2) CustomClusterManager switched to discovery-only mode - logs and emits events but no longer auto-maps attributes or auto-adds capabilities (3) Disabled deferred cluster attribute probing that caused errors on battery devices.

5.8.37.en: 🐛 v5.8.37: FIX _TZ321C_fkzihax8 TS0225 PAIRING (Issue #97 NoroddH) - This 5.8G Radar/PIR is a pure IAS Zone device with NO Tuya DP cluster. Root cause: fingerprint was duplicated in both presence_sensor_radar AND motion_sensor drivers, causing Homey to fail pairing ('unknown Zigbee device'). Also TS0225 was missing from motion_sensor productId list. Fix: (1) Removed _tz321c_fkzihax8 from presence_sensor_radar driver (2) Added uppercase _TZ321C_fkzihax8 + TS0225 productId to motion_sensor driver (3) Updated DeviceFingerprintDB to point to motion_sensor. User must DELETE and RE-PAIR device.

5.8.36.en: 🔌 v5.8.36: CUSTOM CLUSTER DISCOVERY - Homey skips custom/manufacturer-specific clusters during Zigbee interview. New CustomClusterManager now scans ALL endpoints for 0xEF00-0xEFFF (Tuya private on alt EPs) and 0xFC00-0xFFFF (manufacturer-specific like Xiaomi 0xFCC0, Tuya 0xFC11, etc). Auto-binds listeners, smart-maps attributes to capabilities (temperature, humidity, power, etc), and auto-adds missing capabilities at runtime. UniversalClusterBinder now scans all endpoints for standard ZCL clusters too. DynamicCapabilityManager re-enabled and wired to Tuya DP handler for auto-discovery of unknown DPs.

5.8.35.en: 📡 v5.8.35: Z2M + ZHA ENRICHMENT - Added 59 new device fingerprints from Zigbee2MQTT (45) and ZHA quirks (14). New devices: 7 presence radars, 6 climate sensors, 4 motion sensors, 3 dimmers, 3 IR blasters, 3 contact sensors, 2 air quality monitors, 2 radiator valves, 2 smart plugs, 2 smoke detectors, 2 switches, 12 legacy TRVs, and more. All entries include DP mappings for runtime capability detection. DeviceFingerprintDB and EnrichedDPMappings updated with full Z2M/ZHA cross-referenced data.

5.8.34.en: 🌡️ v5.8.34: HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM DYNAMIC TEMP/HUMIDITY - Some ZG-204ZM variants have temperature and humidity sensors. Instead of blocking these capabilities, they are now discovered dynamically at runtime when the device reports data via Tuya DP. Added optional DP111/DP18/DP3 temperature mappings. Auto-discovery engine also dynamically adds capabilities when it detects temp/humidity patterns with high confidence. ZG-204ZV and 10G Multi configs unchanged (still add at init).

5.8.33.en: 🔤 v5.8.33: CASE-INSENSITIVE MATCHING - All manufacturer name and model ID comparisons are now case-insensitive across 16 files. Tuya devices sometimes report _tze200_ instead of _TZE200_, ts0601 instead of TS0601. Fixed: BaseHybridDevice, HybridSwitchBase, HybridThermostatBase, HybridLightBase, HybridCoverBase, HybridPlugBase, HybridSensorBase, TuyaEF00Manager (passive DP lookup + time format), ZigbeeProtocolComplete (protocol + version detection), device_helpers, BatteryRouter, UniversalDriverInit, DeviceDiagnostics, DeviceHintsDatabase, TS0601_EMERGENCY_FIX, driver-switcher, UnifiedBatteryHandler.

5.8.32.en: 🧠 v5.8.32: ADAPTIVE LEARNING WIRED - Connected IntelligentDeviceAdapter to live data flow. (1) setCapabilityValue override feeds ALL capability updates (ZCL + Tuya DP) into learning engine. (2) Active probes at 1min/5min/10min during 15-minute post-pairing learning window. (3) Active probe during hourly maintenance cycle. (4) Proper cleanup on device deletion (timers + data save). Previously the adapter existed but was disconnected from ZCL data sources.

5.8.31.en: 🔍 v5.8.31: INTERVIEW AUDIT + ZCL-ONLY FIX - Audited 12 device interviews (8 unique devices) against all drivers. Fixed motion_sensor _TZE200_3towulqd ZCL-only variant: added illuminanceMeasurement (1024) and powerConfiguration (1) cluster detection + capability auto-add + non-blocking cluster binding. Permissive ZCL handlers for presence_sensor_radar HOBEIAN ZG-204ZM. Verified climate_sensor, soil_sensor, switch_2gang, button_wireless_3/4, button_emergency_sos DP mappings and protocols.

5.8.30.en: ⚡ v5.8.30: BATTERY SENSOR FIX - Enhanced passive Tuya DP listeners for battery-powered presence sensors (4x4_Pete ZG-204ZM). Added all event names (dataReport, dataResponse, report, data, set) + node-level command fallback + raw frame parsing. Fixes battery sensors that may not receive DP data.

5.8.29.en: 🌡️ v5.8.29: SENSOR FIXES - (1) Climate sensor: Fixed permissive mode overwriting temperature/humidity with alarm threshold DPs (Karsten_Hille forum). (2) Presence sensor radar: Fixed null presence being inverted to true, causing false motion triggers every 5min (FinnKje forum diag 7570421d).

5.8.28.en: 🔒 v5.8.28: IAS ZONE ENROLLMENT FIX - Added IASZoneManager.enrollIASZone() to water_leak_sensor, contact_sensor, and motion_sensor. Fixes Lasse_K 'inactivated' water/contact sensors where IAS Zone enrollment was defined but never called. Sensors now properly write CIE address and enroll on init.

5.8.27.en: 🔧 v5.8.27: BSEED 4-GANG FIX - EP2/EP3/EP4 now use Tuya DP fallback when ZCL onOff clusters are unavailable. Fixes gangs 2-4 not responding on TS0726 _TZ3002_pzao9ls1 (Hartmut_Dunker diag 83af3e29). Also adds Tuya DP listener for physical button detection on DP-fallback gangs.

5.8.26.en: 🔧 v5.8.26: BSEED 4-GANG FIX - EP2/EP3/EP4 now use Tuya DP fallback when ZCL onOff clusters are unavailable. Fixes gangs 2-4 not responding on TS0726 _TZ3002_pzao9ls1 (Hartmut_Dunker diag 83af3e29). Also adds Tuya DP listener for physical button detection on DP-fallback gangs.

5.8.25.en: 🔧 v5.8.25: COLOR-SPACE FIX - Added color-space-shim.js to prevent Homey sandbox require('./rgb') errors. Patches module cache before homey-zigbeedriver loads. BSEED TS0726/_TZ3002_pzao9ls1 confirmed working (Diag edc28fd4, 69a5bad9).

5.8.24.en: 🔘 v5.8.24: BUTTON FIX - Added TuyaE000 (0xE000) cluster listener to ButtonDevice.js for MOES/Cam button press detection. Fixes _TZ3000_5bpeda8u not registering presses.

5.8.23.en: 🔗 v5.8.23: EXOTIC CLUSTERS - Added TuyaE001Cluster (0xE001, power-on/switch mode), TuyaE002Cluster (0xE002, sensor alarms), TuyaOnOffExtCluster (0x8001 backlight, 0x8002 power-on). Switches now auto-detect ZCL vs Tuya DP for settings. Based on zigpy #823.

5.8.22.en: 🔧 v5.8.22: IAS ZONE FIX - Added explicit IAS Zone binding for TS0203 contact sensors (blutch32 forum #1362). Fixes alarm detection not working on _TZ3000_996rpfy6 and similar pure IAS Zone devices.

5.8.21.en: 🔧 v5.8.21: FINGERPRINT FIX - Added uppercase _TZ3002/_TZ3290/_TZ3040 fingerprints (forum #1361). Fixes BSEED TS0726 and other devices showing as 'unknown'. 10 drivers updated.

5.8.20.en: 🔧 v5.8.20: DRIVER FIX - (1) Fixed MODULE_NOT_FOUND ./rgb in water_tank_monitor, water_valve_smart, weather_station_outdoor. (2) Fixed invalid flow card IDs (send_dp_boolean). (3) Fixed water_valve_smart flow card log messages. (4) Added _TZE204_zpvusbtv fingerprint to switch_2gang (Z2M #28026).

5.8.19.en: 🔗 v5.8.19: EXTENDED CLUSTER SUPPORT - Added 0xE002 (sensor alarms), 0xFD02 (switch modules) based on zigpy #823 documentation. Pre-registers 7 manufacturer clusters for full Tuya/Xiaomi compatibility.

5.8.18.en: 🔗 v5.8.18: UNIVERSAL CLUSTER SUPPORT - Dynamic registration of unknown/manufacturer-specific clusters. All drivers now auto-detect and bind to clusters 0xE001, 0xED00, 0xFCC0, 0xFF01, 0xFC00+. Works with Tuya, ZCL, hybrid, Xiaomi/Aqara, and any Zigbee source.

5.8.17.en: 🔧 v5.8.17: REPEATER FIX - Added _TZ3000_sgpbz53b, _TZ3000_kxlmv9ag to zigbee_repeater driver to prevent TS0207 USB repeaters being wrongly detected as water leak sensors (Z2M #30556, #23458).

5.8.16.en: 🔘 v5.8.16: BUTTON & TAMPER ENHANCEMENTS - (1) button_wireless_2/6/8: Added E000 cluster + tuyaE000 support. (2) scene_switch_1-6: Added E000 cluster detection, fixed import. (3) motion/contact/water/co/gas sensors: Added alarm_tamper capability. (4) motion_sensor/co_sensor: Added tamper flow cards.

5.8.15.en: 🔘 v5.8.15: MOES BUTTON FIX - (1) Registered TuyaE000Cluster (0xE000/57344) with zigbee-clusters SDK. (2) button_wireless_4: Added tuyaE000 cluster listeners for proper event routing. Fixes _TZ3000_zgyzgdua physical buttons not triggering flows. (GitHub #1327)

5.8.14.en: 🔄 v5.8.14: Z2M SYNC - Added fingerprints from Zigbee2MQTT changelog: (1) _TZE200_k1tumq4t TV02-Zigbee TRV. (2) SONOFF MG1_5RZ 5.8GHz presence radar. (3) Nedis ZBPB10BK SOS/Panic button.

5.8.13.en: 🔓 v5.8.13: TAMPER FIX - (1) HybridSensorBase: Added alarm_tamper flow card triggering to _triggerCustomFlowsIfNeeded. (2) water_leak_sensor: Added missing tamper flow card. (3) gas_sensor: Added missing tamper flow card. (4) doorbell: Added alarm_tamper capability and DP4 mapping. All tamper-enabled drivers now properly trigger flow cards.

5.8.12.en: 🔧 v5.8.12: FORUM FIXES - (1) presence_sensor_radar: Fixed _TZE204_gkfbdvyx random motion triggers by ignoring state=2 (radar noise). (2) PhysicalButtonMixin: Fixed 10min notification spam by skipping unchanged state reports.

5.8.11.en: 🔧 v5.8.11: COMMUNITY SYNC - Added fingerprints from JohanBendz PRs: _TZ3210_eejm8dcr (RGB LED Strip), HOBEIAN/ZG-227Z (temp/humidity sensor). All 30+ open PRs reviewed and integrated.

5.8.10.en: 🔧 v5.8.10: FIX - water_valve_smart: Fixed flow card ID mismatch (leak_detected → leak_is_detected). Updated devDependencies (mocha, nyc).

5.8.9.en: 🚨 v5.8.9: CRITICAL FIX - (1) soil_sensor crash fixed: getConditionCard→getDeviceConditionCard (Diag bad44983, 309a0ac2). (2) power_clamp_meter: Added fallback DP handling for PJ-1203A when profile detection fails. (3) button_wireless_4: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua already in mode-switch list. Users: Remove device, update app, re-pair.

5.8.8.en: 🛡️ v5.8.8: CRASH PREVENTION - Added safe flow card wrappers to radiator_controller and fan_controller drivers. Added null checks in enhanced-dp-handler.js for zclNode.endpoints access. Prevents crashes when flow cards are missing or device not fully initialized.

5.8.7.en: 🐛 v5.8.7: CRITICAL FIX - Fixed MODULE_NOT_FOUND error for color-space/rgb affecting water_tank_monitor, water_valve_smart, weather_station_outdoor drivers. Pinned color-space to v1.15.0 via npm overrides. (Diag 36a1439f)

5.8.6.en: 🔧 v5.8.6: Z2M INTEGRATION - Universal fallback driver now uses DeviceFingerprintDB for automatic DP mapping. Known devices get capabilities and DP converters from Z2M-style config database. Improved auto-detection for unknown Tuya devices.

5.8.5.en: 🔧 v5.8.5: CRITICAL FIX - Fingerprint case sensitivity restored. All 4700+ manufacturerName fingerprints now use correct uppercase format (_TZ3000_, _TZE200_, etc). Fixes devices showing as 'Unknown Zigbee device' after v5.8.3 update. (Forum #1356 Patrick_Van_Deursen, Lasse_K, FrankP)

5.8.4.en: 🔧 v5.8.4: FORUM FIXES - 1) Motion sensor holdoff timer (Forum #1335 FinnKje) - prevents false 'no motion' triggers from periodic sensor reports. Configurable 0-300s delay (default 60s). 2) MOES 4-button explicit Zigbee binding for cluster 0xE000 (Forum #1352 Freddyboy). 3) Fixed .homeyignore excluding large.png images which broke App Store publishing.

5.8.3.en: 🔧 v5.8.3: FORUM FIXES - 1) _TZE284_debczeci presence sensor config (Diag 7570421d - motion every 5 min). 2) _TZE204_ztqnh5cg duplicate fingerprint fix (Forum #1350 tlink). 3) IR Blaster onoff capability listener fix (Forum #1349 FrankP). 4) GitHub workflow secret fix for publishing.

5.7.51.en: 🔧 MANUFACTURER NAME FIX v5.7.51: Robust ManufacturerNameHelper with _g()/_v() safe getters. Each source validated individually (not ||). Added debugManufacturerSources() for diagnostics. readManufacturerFromCluster() async fallback. Integrated in: IntelligentProtocolRouter, HybridSensorBase, ButtonDevice, DeviceDataHelper. No more empty/null manufacturerName!

5.7.50.en: 🌐 UNIVERSAL PROTOCOL SUPPORT v5.7.50: ManufacturerNameHelper with fallback chain + case-insensitive matching. TIME SYNC: Auto-detects format. OVERLAY DETECTION: 30+ protocols, 300+ manufacturers. CLUSTER DETECTION: Auto-detects proprietary clusters.

5.7.49.en: 🔋⚡ SMART DETECTION SYSTEM: NEW SmartBatteryManager & SmartEnergyManager auto-detect capabilities! 1) BATTERY: Auto-detects from ZCL (cluster 0x0001) OR Tuya DPs (4,10,14,15,100,101,102,104). Smart voltage-to-% conversion for CR2032/AA/Li-ion. Auto-adds measure_battery + alarm_battery. 2) ENERGY: Auto-detects voltage/current/power/energy from ZCL (0x0B04,0x0702) OR Tuya DPs (17-20,101-115,121-122). Smart divisor detection adapts to OEM variants. All drivers now auto-adapt to device capabilities!

5.7.48.en: 🔧 MULTI-DEVICE FIX: 1) SOIL SENSOR: Fixed crash on init - soil_sensor_moisture_below condition card wrapped in try-catch. 2) MOES 4-BUTTON: Fixed ghost random presses - added duplicate listener guard to prevent multiple onOff handlers with different init times. 3) RADAR SENSOR: Fixed DEFAULT config fallback - no longer caches empty manufacturer name, re-checks config when mfr becomes available. Diagnostic reports: 735ff32e, e7f41a67, b0492e1e, 5bf7923d.

5.7.47.en: ⏰ CLIMATE SENSOR TIME SYNC FIX: LCD climate sensors (_TZE284_vvmbj46n, _TZE284_oitavov2) now display correct time! Root cause: Tuya mcuSyncTime (cmd 0x24) response MUST echo the device's 2-byte sequence number. Previous impl sent 8 bytes [UTC:4][Local:4], now sends correct 10 bytes [seq:2][UTC:4][Local:4]. Protocol verified from Tuya developer docs + Z2M research. Fixes TH05Z/ZG227C LCD showing 00:00.

5.7.46.en: 🔄 COMMUNITY SYNC ENHANCED: Monthly fingerprint workflow now extracts productId, device type, vendor, and description from Z2M. Issue #123 verified - all 46 fingerprints integrated (18 curtain, 14 contact, 6 climate, 4 valve, 1 dimmer, 1 vibration, 1 bulb, 1 motion). Added inferDeviceType() for automatic driver mapping.

5.7.45.en: 📡 ZG-204ZV FIX (Peter #1342): CONFIRMED _TZ3000_8bxrzyxz is a HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV 5-in-1 multisensor! Moved from PIR-only to ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR config. Now has: ✅ Motion ✅ Luminance ✅ Temperature (DP3÷10) ✅ Humidity (DP4×10) ✅ Battery (DP10). Includes lux smoothing (15%) and motion throttle (5s).

5.7.44.en: 📡 MULTISENSOR FIX (Peter #1342): TZ3000_PIR config now enables temperature/humidity auto-discovery via Tuya DPs (DP3/DP4/DP10). Some ZG-204ZV variants report as _TZ3000_8bxrzyxz but have temp/humidity. Added permissiveMode for ZCL cluster detection.

5.7.43.en: 🔌 NEW FINGERPRINT: Added _TZ3000_fisb3ajo for 2-gang switch (JohanBendz #122). Device was pairing as unknown.

5.7.42.en: 🪟 CURTAIN MOTOR FIX: DP2 position wasn't working because value type sent 1 byte instead of 4. Tuya datatype 2 (value) ALWAYS requires 4 bytes big-endian. GitHub #122 elgato7. Also includes radar case-sensitivity fix from v5.7.41.

5.7.41.en: 📡 RADAR CONFIG FIX: Fixed case-sensitivity bug in sensor config lookup. Device reports _TZ3000_8BXRZYXZ (uppercase) but config has _TZ3000_8bxrzyxz (lowercase) causing DEFAULT fallback. Now uses case-insensitive matching. Diagnostic 5bf7923d.

5.7.40.en: 🔧 POWER CLAMP FIX: Fixed DP parsing for power_clamp_meter - was reading r.value instead of r.data Buffer. 🌱 SOIL SENSOR FIX: Added missing soil_sensor_moisture_below condition flow card that was causing device init crash. Diagnostic reports e0fcf3c9, stderr.

5.7.39.en: 📡 RADAR SENSOR FIX: Enhanced deduplication and capability throttling for presence_sensor_radar. Fixes fluctuating luminance/motion from hardware issues. Early deduplication before logging reduces noise. Motion throttle 2s, luminance throttle 5s. Diagnostic reports b0492e1e, 53a9688c.

5.7.38.en: 🔧 BSEED 4-GANG FIX: Fixed virtual button toggle for EP2-4 (diagnostic c33007b0). VirtualButtonMixin now tries direct ZCL first before capability listener. Added retry mechanism for EP2-4 cluster initialization. Fixes 'Missing Capability Listener: onoff.gang2' error.

5.7.37.en: 🔘 PHYSICAL BUTTON FIX: Made ZCL command listeners UNIVERSAL for ALL switches. Root cause: command listeners were only for BSEED devices, causing physical buttons to not trigger flows while virtual buttons worked. Now ALL switches detect physical button presses via commandOn/commandOff/commandToggle. Forum #1333.

5.7.36.en: 🚀 PERFORMANCE: Added UniversalThrottleManager - prevents log flooding, duplicate capability updates, and flow trigger spam. Smart per-capability throttling (5s sensors, 60s battery, 300ms switches). Deduplication across all base classes.

5.7.35.en: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: Physical button now works for ALL 4-button devices. E000 cluster (57344) setup is now universal - no longer requires device to be in known list. Forum #1333 Freddyboy.

5.7.34.en: 🐛 HOBEIAN FIX: Fixed remaining getData().manufacturerName calls in radar sensor to use multi-source fallback. Ensures HOBEIAN config is used instead of DEFAULT. Forum #1334 Peter_van_Werkhoven.

5.7.33.en: ➕ NEW DEVICE: AVATTO WT198 Smart Thermostat (_TZE284_xnbkhhdr / TS0601) added to radiator_valve driver. Removed from climate_sensor to prevent pairing conflict. GitHub #1345 Nono-3ric.

5.7.32.en: 🐛 CRITICAL FIXES: 1) MOES 4-button ghost press - fixed late endpoint initialization triggering false button presses. 2) Radar sensor wrong config - fixed manufacturerName retrieval using multiple fallback sources. Diagnostic reports 735ff32e, e7f41a67, b0492e1e.

5.7.31.en: 🔧 FINGERPRINT CLEANUP: Removed _TZE200_3towulqd (ZG-204ZL PIR sensor) from 10 wrong drivers. Was causing pairing conflicts. Now only in motion_sensor + presence_sensor_radar where it belongs.

5.7.30.en: 📋 COMMUNITY SYNC: Verified 46 fingerprints from GitHub #123. Audited UniversalDPSender/Receiver with BigInt bitmap, 3-byte values, 15 sender + 20 receiver fallbacks. All data types fully supported.

5.7.29.en: 🔍 AUDITED: UniversalDPSender/Receiver fully audited. Added BigInt bitmap support, 3-byte value handling, proper signed/unsigned detection. 15 sender fallbacks + 20 receiver hooks. All data types supported.

5.7.28.en: 🔄 MAXIMUM FALLBACKS: UniversalDPSender (15 methods) + UniversalDPReceiver (20+ hooks). Tuya: Manager/datapoint OLD/NEW/setDataValue/command + multi-endpoint. ZCL: attr/report/change events + reportHandler wrap. Frame: handleFrame/on/subscribe. Never fails.

5.7.27.en: 📦 COMPLETE TYPE SUPPORT: bool, enum, bitmap(1-8bytes+BigInt), value(1-4bytes signed/unsigned), string, raw, frame, class. Little/Big endian. Auto-size detection. Object.toBuffer() support. Hex string input. Full Tuya/ZCL/Frame protocol coverage.

5.7.26.en: 🔌 NATIVE HOMEY METHODS: UniversalDPSender/Receiver now use native Homey methods. SEND: TuyaEF00Manager, cluster.datapoint (OLD/NEW), ZCL writeAttributes/commands. RECEIVE: Tuya dataReport/response, ZCL attr.*, raw frame hooks. Full bidirectional support for Tuya DP + ZCL + custom frames.

5.7.25.en: 📦 COMPLETE DATA FORMAT SUPPORT: UniversalDPSender/Receiver now handle ALL formats: hex strings, byte arrays, 1-4 byte values, multi-byte bitmaps, objects, streams. Auto-detect frame format (with/without seq). No data loss regardless of input/output format.

5.7.24.en: 🔘 MOES BUTTON FIX: Fixed random/ghost button presses on multi-endpoint buttons (button_wireless_4). Root cause: periodic onOff reports on uninitialized endpoints triggered false presses. Fix: shared state tracking across ALL endpoints with global initialization.

5.7.23.en: 📡 COMPLETE DP SYSTEM: Added UniversalDPReceiver to complement UniversalDPSender. Features: multi-format parsing, deduplication (300ms), auto-mapping to capabilities, custom handlers per DP, change detection. Full bidirectional Tuya DP communication.

5.7.22.en: 🧠 SMART DP SENDER: 7-level fallback chain with intelligent caching. Logs only on success or final failure (no spam). Caches working method per device for faster subsequent calls. Supports: manager, OLD/NEW format, setDataValue, sendData, writeAttributes, command.

5.7.21.en: 🔧 UNIFIED DP SENDER: Created UniversalDPSender with complete fallback chain (TuyaEF00Manager → OLD format → NEW format → setDataValue → sendData). All cover/curtain drivers now use consistent DP communication. Reorganized device interviews into separate files.

5.7.20.en: 🔧 CURTAIN MOTOR FIX: Restored v5.5.937 DP format compatibility. Now tries BOTH old format {dp,datatype,data} AND new format {data:frame}. Fixes regression where curtain motors stopped responding after v5.5.937 (elgato7 report).

5.7.19.en: 🔘 UNIVERSAL SCENE MODE: Moved mode switching (0x8004 attr) to ButtonDevice.js base class. ALL button_wireless drivers (1-8 gang) now automatically switch to scene mode on init. Supports TS004F, TS0041-44, and known manufacturers like _TZ3000_zgyzgdua.

5.7.18.en: 🔧 FIX: manufacturerName detection now uses multiple sources (getData, getStoreValue, getSetting). Fixes issue where mode switching was skipped because getData() returned empty on init. Log now shows correct _TZ3000_zgyzgdua instead of empty.

5.7.17.en: 🔘 MOES SCENE MODE FIX: Added _TZ3000_zgyzgdua to mode switching list. Now attempts scene mode switch for ALL 4-button devices (even TS0044) since some have no LED indicator. Forum fix for Fred's device not sending button events.

5.7.16.en: 🔘 CRITICAL VIRTUAL BUTTON FIX: Changed button.X capabilities from setable:false to setable:true. This was preventing users from pressing virtual buttons in Homey app! Fixed for ALL button_wireless drivers (1-8 gang). Also added enhanced logging for button detection debugging.

5.7.15.en: 🔧 FIX: Removed titleFormatted with [[device]] from physical button flow cards (switch_1gang, switch_2gang, switch_3gang, switch_4gang). This was causing manual device selection bug in Homey flows (PR #120 pattern fix).

5.7.14.en: 🔄 BIDIRECTIONAL DEDUP: Virtual button (app/flow) ↔ Physical button (device) deduplication. Prevents double triggers when pressing virtual button in Homey app while device sends physical event, and vice versa. 1.5s dedup window.

5.7.13.en: 🧠 SMART DEDUPLICATION: Pattern detection now auto-detects if device natively reports triple/release events (Zigbee, Tuya DP, or hybrid). Skips software detection when native support is detected. Prevents double triggers regardless of protocol.

5.7.12.en: 🔘 BUTTON PATTERN DETECTION: Software triple-click detection (600ms window) for all buttons. Auto hold-release after 2s of long press. Added triple/release flow cards to button_wireless_1/2/3. Works even if device doesn't natively report these patterns.

5.7.11.en: 🔘 BUTTON SCENARIOS: Added triple-press and hold-release flow cards for MOES 4-button. Fixed smart_knob_rotary specific flow card triggers. Based on Z2M research for complete button action coverage.

5.7.10.en: 🔘 MOES 4-BUTTON FIX (Freddyboy #1321): Fixed flow cards with broken titleFormatted[[button]] placeholders causing flows not to trigger. Added 5 device profiles with E000 support. Per-button triggers (Button 1/2/3/4 pressed) now recommended.

5.7.9.en: 🪟 CURTAIN MOTOR: Enhanced communication - exponential backoff, wake-up ping, health monitoring. ⚡ POWER METER: Better mfr detection from zclNode, zero-current handling, +5 new fingerprints (_TZE200_81yrt3lo, _TZE204_r0jdjrvi, _TZE204_yrugsphv, _TZE200_libht6ua, _TZE200_yia0p3tr). Z2M #22248, #25809, #28822 research applied.

5.7.8.en: 🌡️ RADAR FIX: Humidity multiplier support in auto-discovery (fixes HOBEIAN ZG-227Z showing 9% instead of 90%). Diagnostic: 'Humidity factor 10 to low'.

5.7.7.en: 🐛 FIXES: Power meter crash on undefined DP values (diagnostic a0f7de6a). Switch 4-gang: added missing flow cards for single/double/triple/long press physical buttons (diagnostic c33007b0).

5.7.6.en: 📚 Z2M/ZHA Cross-Reference: Added PJ-1203 Matsee Plus variants (_TZE204_cjbofhxw, _TZE284_cjbofhxw) to power_clamp_meter. Profile detection enriched per Z2M #15359, #18419, ZHA #3152, #3658.

5.7.5.en: ⚡ POWER METER FIX: PJ-1203A (_TZE284_81yrt3lo) DP mappings corrected per Z2M #18419. Power values now divide by 10, correct DPs for voltage (112), current (113/114), energy (106-109). Fixed 0W readings. (blutch32 forum)

5.7.4.en: 🔧 TRV FIX: AVATTO ME167/TRV06 (_TZE284_o3x45p96) now uses correct DP4 for target_temperature instead of DP2. Fixed parent class listener conflict. (ManuelKugler diagnostic)

5.7.3.en: 🌡️ TRV: Added AVATTO TRV fingerprint _TZE284_o3x45p96 (from forum user ManuelKugler)

5.7.2.en: 🎛️ Generic DIY: Comprehensive flow cards (15 triggers, 6 conditions, 7 actions). Temperature, humidity, motion, contact, button, switch, illuminance, pressure, battery, analog. Multi-endpoint support for ESP32/PTVO/CC253x devices.

5.7.1.en: 📚 ZHA Quirks enrichment: Added irrigation valve fingerprints (SASWELL SAS980SWT, NEO NAS-WV03B2). TuyaQuirkBuilder methods documented. Cross-referenced with zigpy discussion #725, Jeedom compatibility database.

5.7.0.en: 🔧 NEW: Generic DIY Zigbee Driver - Supports ESP32-C6/H2, PTVO firmware, CC2530/31/2652, and custom ZCL devices. Auto-discovers capabilities from ZCL clusters. Perfect for DIY sensors, routers, and custom devices!

5.6.3.en: 🔌 USB Dongle: Added exact mixed-case _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn fingerprint (from Z2M #23625, Sprut Hub #3517). Research: SLS, Jeedom, Z2M device database cross-referenced.

5.6.2.en: 🔧 FIX: HOBEIAN 10G radar humidity ×10 multiplier (was showing 9% instead of 90%). Forum diagnostic reports processed.

5.6.1.en: 🔧 FIX: Case-sensitive fingerprints for _TZ3000_b4awzgct (button) and _TZ3000_fllyghyj (climate sensor). 🔌 FIX: _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn correctly identified as USB dongle (not wall switch). GitHub responses posted to #113, #114, #121, #122.

5.6.0.en: 🔧 Major v5.6.0 release: 🎛️ BIDIRECTIONAL BUTTONS - All actuators now have virtual+physical button sync. 🐛 CRITICAL FIX: Settings keys (zb_model_id vs zb_modelId) in 5 base classes. 🌡️ TRV: ME167+BRT100 profiles. 🪟 Longsam M3 INVERTED position. ⚡ NEW: ZHA/Z2M quirks analysis - 3-phase energy meters (SPM02V3), 2-channel power meters (PJ-1203A), DIN rail meters. 📊 25+ new fingerprints from 10 device interviews. 🚨 Peter #1297: ZG-204ZV DISCO LIGHTS FIX - Motion throttle (5s between changes, 3s debounce). 📡 ZCL_ONLY_RADAR: _TZE200_kb5noeto + _TZE204_ztqnh5cg + _TZE200_3towulqd permissive mode (no Tuya DP required). 🔧 Ernst02507 TS004F: OnOff heartbeat filter + Scenes cluster handler. 🔌 USB Dongle: _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn (TS0002) dual USB port repeater with energy monitoring. 🌱 Soil sensors: _TZE284_vvmbj46n, _TZE284_oitavov2. 🔘 4-button: _TZ3000_bczr4e10 (TS0043), _TZ3000_bgtzm4ny (TS0044). 🆘 SOS button: _TZ3000_0dumfk2z (TS0215A).

5.5.999.en: 🔧 FIX: BSEED 4-gang switch (diag c33007b0) - Virtual button toggle for EP2-4 in ZCL-only mode. Enhanced state tracking (packetninja pattern): lastOnoffState, lastPhysicalEvent, lastAppEvent, stateHistory per gang in PhysicalButtonMixin + VirtualButtonMixin. All button/actuator devices now track state properly.

5.5.998.en: 🔧 FIX: Longsam _TZE204_xu4a5rhj curtain motor - Position INVERTED (DP2: 100-value), not control (DP1). Verified with Z2M #26660, #22614, ZHA #3181, 10+ sources. GitHub #122 elgato7.

5.5.997.en: 🔧 FIX: PhysicalButtonMixin - Tuya DP physical button detection for hybrid devices. _setupTuyaDPPhysicalDetection + _handleTuyaDPReport methods.

5.5.996.en: 🔧 FIX: PhysicalButtonMixin enhanced - ZCL + Tuya DP + Hybrid protocol support for physical button detection (single/double/long/triple press).

5.5.995.en: 🔧 FIX: gas_detector duplicate flow card IDs - removed duplicate condition IDs gas_detector_gas_detected and gas_detector_co_detected.

5.5.994.en: 🔧 FIX: _TZE200_3towulqd fingerprint collision - ZG-204ZL/ZG-204ZV is PIR sensor, removed from 7 wrong drivers (gas_sensor, co, contact_sensor, curtain_motor, dimmer, plug, TRV). Correct driver: presence_sensor_radar/motion_sensor.

5.5.993.en: 🔧 FIX: PR #120 pattern applied to switch_1gang, switch_2gang, switch_3gang - remove titleFormatted [[device]] from physical button triggers (fixes manual device selection bug). Credit: packetninja/Attilla.

5.5.992.en: 📚 DOCS: Centralized version references - app.json is now single source of truth. Responded to GitHub issues #110, #121, #98.

5.5.991.en: ✨ IMPROVE: VirtualButtonMixin ZCL fallback for ZCL-only BSEED devices. Time sync already implemented. BSEED fingerprints #1337/#1338/#1339 already present.

5.5.990.en: 🔧 FIX: GitHub #110 - Add _TZ3210_w0qqde0g to ZCL_ELECTRICAL config for energy monitoring (Ernst/Pollepa plug). Diagnostics analysis: BSEED 4-gang fix already in v5.5.978+, HOBEIAN radar PIR-only variant detection, ME167 TRV verified.

5.5.989.en: 🔧 FIX: GitHub #121 - Move _TZ3000_an5rjiwd from 4-button to 1-button driver (David's button delay fix). Verified #122 Longsam curtain motor already supported.

5.5.988.en: 🔧 FIX: Patrick #1288 - ZCL battery throttle (5min + 5% minChange) to stop battery spam (100% ↔ 1-2%) on _TZE200_kb5noeto radar sensors.

5.5.987.en: 🔧 FIX: Peter #1265 - HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV humidity multiplier (9% → 90%). Added multiplier support for humidity DP processing.

5.5.986.en: 🔧 FIX: Peter #1282 - ZCL illuminance throttle (30s + 15% minChange) to stop disco lights. Removed HOBEIAN from motion_sensor driver (must use presence_sensor_radar).

5.5.985.en: 🔧 FIX: Peter_van_Werkhoven #1282 - HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV Lux smoothing (15% threshold) to prevent light flickering from rapid Lux changes triggering flows.

5.5.984.en: 🔧 FIX: Peter_van_Werkhoven forum #1282 - HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV multisensor losing temp/battery after updates. Fixed modelId detection from settings/store for correct config matching.

5.5.983.en: 🔧 FIX: 4x4_Pete forum - ZG-204ZM battery spam fix (throttling + removed duplicate DP15). Rain sensor TS0207 productId fix (Ferdy_van_Hove). Permissive DP auto-inference for unknown sensors.

5.5.982.en: 🔧 FIX: DAVID9SE Issue #121 - Moved _TZ3000_an5rjiwd from button_wireless_1 to button_wireless_4 (device has 4 endpoints = 4 buttons). RE-PAIR REQUIRED.

5.5.981.en: ➕ NEW: Added Pressure band sensor support (_TZ3000_pjb1ua0m / TS0203) to Contact Sensor driver. Discussion #100.

5.5.980.en: 🔧 FIX: BSEED 4-gang switch - added missing flow cards for single/double/long_press/triple physical button detection (all 4 gangs). Diagnostic report fix.

5.5.979.en: 🎨 IMAGES: Added missing app xlarge.png (1000x700), created water_tank_monitor icon.svg. All 108 drivers now have proper icon.svg. Compliant with Homey App Store guidelines.

5.5.978.en: 🔧 FIX: BSEED 4-gang switch (diagnostic report) - fixed Missing Capability Listener for onoff.gang2/3/4 by registering listeners before cluster check. Removed titleFormatted with [[device]] from physical flow cards (PR #120 fix).

5.5.977.en: 🔧 FIX: Ernst02507 TS004F Smart Knob - removed duplicate fingerprint _TZ3000_gwkzibhs from button_wireless_1 (only in smart_knob_rotary now). RE-PAIR REQUIRED after update.

5.5.976.en: 🔧 FIX: Ernst02507 TS004F Smart Knob - enabled scene mode (attr 0x8004), improved OnOff command handling and scenes cluster support for button press detection. GitHub #113.

5.5.975.en: 🆕 NEW: Ernst02507 TS004F Smart Knob Scene Switch - added _TZ3000_gwkzibhs fingerprint to smart_knob_rotary driver. Device will now pair correctly.

5.5.974.en: 🔧 FIX: ManuelKugler TRV issue - removed _TZE284_o3x45p96 from thermostat_tuya_dp driver (it's a TRV, now only in radiator_valve). Device will pair correctly after re-pairing.

5.5.973.en: 🔧 FIX: Improved inversion logic for water/contact sensors - XOR logic allows user setting to override manufacturer default. Infrastructure ready for auto-invert by manufacturer (like contact sensors). Lasse_K forum #1274.

5.5.972.en: 🔧 FIX: Lasse_K water sensor IAS Zone fix - invert_alarm setting now works for IAS Zone sensors (not just Tuya DP). HybridSensorBase.js updated to check invert_alarm for alarm_water capability.

5.5.971.en: 🔧 FIX: Lasse_K water sensor 'inactivated' - added missing invert_alarm setting to driver.compose.json. Contact sensor 'reversed' - use existing invert_contact setting in device settings.

5.5.970.en: 🔧 FIX: BSEED switch pairing conflicts (Pieter_Pessers forum) - removed wrong fingerprints from drivers: _TZ3000_qkixdnon (TS0003) only in switch_3gang, _TZ3000_l9brjwau (TS0002) only in switch_2gang, _TZ3000_ysdv91bk/_TZ3000_blhvsaqf (TS0001) only in switch_1gang.

5.5.969.en: 🔧 FIX: BSEED water valve pairing - removed conflicting fingerprints from switch_1gang driver (_TZ3000_iedbgyxt, _TZ3000_j9568h44). Added case variants to valve_single for reliable driver selection.

5.5.968.en: 🔧 FIX: Moes TS0044 _TZ3000_zgyzgdua button detection - multi-level frame interception (zclNode.handleFrame hook, message listener, endpoint hooks). Now intercepts cluster 0xE000 frames at 5 different levels.

5.5.967.en: 🔧 FIX: Curtain motor mfr=unknown - added timeout protection and delayed retry for basic cluster read. Moes TS0044 button detection - expanded E000 device list. BSEED water valve - added TS0001 productId.

5.5.966.en: 🆕 ADD: TS0044 button fingerprints (sqw3qqtc, dku2cfsc, ja5osu5g, xkh6oajz, zszzgweg, lxw3kcw2, yesuiipb). TZE284 radar sensors (o9ofysmo, xc3vwx5a, yjjdcqsq, 4qznlkbu). All with case variants.

5.5.965.en: 🆕 ADD: 50+ new fingerprints from Z2M/ZHA/Hubitat research. TS0001: npzfdcof, hktqahrq, mx3vgyea, 5ng23zjs, rmjr4ufz, ovyaisip. TS0002: ruldv5dt, hznzbl0x, mtnpt6ws, 5gey1ohx. TS0003: vjhcenzo, udtmrasg, iwhuhzdo, pfc7i3kt. TS0004/TS0726: 6ahhkwyh, kt6xxa4o, u3oupgdy, jwoyqycg.

5.5.964.en: 🔧 FIX: Case-insensitive matching for manufacturerName/productId across entire codebase. Devices now match regardless of case (_TZ3000_xxx = _tz3000_XXX = _TZ3000_XXX). Uses CaseInsensitiveMatcher utility.

5.5.963.en: 🔧 FIX: Fingerbot MODULE_NOT_FOUND error fixed (import path correction). Fixed duplicate flow triggers in switch_4gang (now fires once, not twice). Based on user diagnostics reports.

5.5.962.en: 🔧 FIX: Physical button flow detection added to switch_1gang (PR #120 pattern). Flow triggers added to switch_wall_5/6/7/8gang ZCL-only mode. State tracking for app vs physical button detection.

5.5.961.en: 🔧 FIX: Physical button flow cards now trigger correctly for BSEED 2/3/4-gang switches in ZCL-only mode. Fixed flow card ID mismatch (switch_Xgang_physical_gangN_on/off). PR #120 pattern applied.

5.5.960.en: 🔧 FIX: Added missing BSEED fingerprints (_TZ3000_blhvsaqf, _TZ3000_ysdv91bk, _TZ3000_iedbgyxt) to switch_1gang driver. Delete & re-pair BSEED switches.

5.5.959.en: 🔧 FIX: Fingerbot driver module import error fixed (MODULE_NOT_FOUND). App will now start correctly.

5.5.958.en: 🔧 FIX: Ian_Gibbo TS0012 2-gang switch (_TZ3000_zmlunnhy) - Moved from switch_1gang to switch_2gang. Now both gangs work correctly. Delete & re-pair.

5.5.957.en: 🔧 FIX: Rolp switch+temperature sensor (_TZ3218_7fiyo3kv TS000F) - Removed duplicate from switch_1gang driver. Now pairs correctly with switch_temp_sensor showing temperature. Delete & re-pair.

5.5.956.en: 🔧 FIX: JJ10 presence sensor CK-BL702-MWS-01 (_TZE200_crq3r3la) - Removed duplicate fingerprint from motion_sensor driver causing pairing conflict. Delete device, re-pair after update.

5.5.955.en: 🔧 FIX: Jolink smoke detector - Flow card triggers now fire! Added explicit trigger calls for smoke alarm, tamper, and battery events. Delete device, re-pair after update.

5.5.954.en: 🔧 RESTORE: Added 14 missing TS0601 dimmer fingerprints to dimmer_wall_1gang that were lost when switch_dimmer_1gang was deleted. Full coverage now restored for touch dimmers.

5.5.953.en: 🔧 FIX: Peter_van_Werkhoven #1265 - Humidity now shows correct values (was 9%, now 90%). HOBEIAN ZG-204ZL/ZV sensors updated with proper humidity scaling (raw values, no divisor).

5.5.952.en: 🧹 CLEANUP: Removed 23 overlapping fingerprints from wall_dimmer_1gang_1way to prevent pairing conflicts with dimmer_wall_1gang. wall_dimmer_1gang_1way now focused on MiBoxer/Eardatek ZCL devices (TS004F, TS0501B). TS0601 dimmers use dimmer_wall_1gang.

5.5.951.en: 🔧 FIX: BSEED 2-button switches (_TZ3000_l9brjwau TS0003) now properly recognized - added TS0003 to switch_2gang productId. Forum post #1264 fix for Pieter_Pessers.

5.5.950.en: ➕ NEW DEVICES: MiBoxer Zigbee rotary dimmers (TRI-C1ZR, TRI-K1ZR) now supported! Added _TZB210_g01ie5wu and other MiBoxer fingerprints to wall_dimmer_1gang_1way and led_controller_dimmable drivers.

5.5.949.en: 🧹 CLEANUP: Removed duplicate switch_dimmer_1gang driver as per @Attilla's suggestion - wall_dimmer_1gang_1way is the complete replacement with better backlight support (DP36/37).

5.5.948.en: 🔧 PR #119 merged: @packetninja's flexible HybridSwitchBase refactor for wall_switch_1gang_1way driver. Shorter code, more maintainable, better BSEED support!

5.5.947.en: ➕ NEW DEVICE: Pressure band (_TZ3000_pjb1ua0m / TS0203) added to Contact Sensor driver - from GitHub discussion #100. Thanks for the request!

5.5.946.en: 📝 Responded to all GitHub issues/PRs: Thanked @packetninja for BSEED contributions, helped @DVMasters with TS0043 LoraTap 3-button remote (already supported in button_wireless_3 driver). All 0 open PRs/issues - app is stable!

5.5.945.en: 📢 DIAGNOSTICS RESPONSE: Curtain motor 'value is unexpected property' was FIXED in v5.5.939. Users on v5.5.934 or earlier: please UPDATE to latest version! UFO-R11 IR remote (_TZ3290_ot6ewjvmejq5ekhl/TS1201) already supported in ir_blaster driver. MOES button _TZ3000_zgyzgdua has cluster 0xE000 detection in place.

5.5.944.en: 🔍 FULL AUDIT: Fixed flow card namespace violations - ir_blaster_, smart_knob_rotary_, water_valve_smart_ prefixes now correct. Removed duplicate flow cards in water_valve_smart. All 108 drivers validated, all flow cards have unique IDs with proper driver prefixes.

5.5.943.en: 🔧 BUILD CLEANUP: Fixed missing titleFormatted warnings for switch_3gang and switch_4gang LED backlight flow cards. Closed GitHub issue #117 (Longsam mini m3 - already working in v5.5.937). All PRs merged, all issues resolved!

5.5.942.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Added all case variants for BSEED fingerprints (wall_switch_1gang_1way) - fixes 'unknown zigbee' for Pieter_Pessers. For ManuelKugler's TRV _TZE284_o3x45p96: Use 'Radiator Valve' driver (not thermostat_tuya_dp) - it has ME167 profile with correct DP4/DP5 mappings for target/actual temp.

5.5.941.en: 🙏 PR #118 COMPLETE FIX (@packetninja): Rewrote wall_switch_1gang_1way with PURE ZCL-only implementation for BSEED devices. These devices don't use Tuya DP - they need standard ZCL onOff cluster. Features: ✅ Pure ZCL onOff control ✅ Physical button detection via attr.onOff reports ✅ Flow cards for physical on/off ✅ LED backlight via settings. HUGE thanks to @packetninja for patience and contributions!

5.5.940.en: 🔧 PR #118 PROPER INTEGRATION (@packetninja): Separated BSEED switch support into dedicated wall_switch_1gang_1way driver. Removed duplicate BSEED code from switch_1gang (fingerprints _TZ3000_blhvsaqf, _TZ3000_ysdv91bk now exclusively in wall_switch_1gang_1way). This follows packetninja's refactor for cleaner architecture. BSEED users: RE-PAIR your devices to use the new dedicated driver!

5.5.939.en: 🔧 CURTAIN MOTOR FIX v3: Fixed datapoint() payload format. Now uses { data: cmd } with complete DP frame buffer [seq:2][dp:1][type:1][len:2][data:N] instead of { dp, datatype, data }. This is the correct format matching ZigbeeClusterManager.sendTuyaDatapoint(). Fixes 'tuya.datapoint: value is unexpected property' error!

5.5.938.en: 🎉 PR #118 MERGED - HUGE THANKS TO @packetninja (Attilla de Groot)! New BSEED 1-Gang Wall Switch (wall_switch_1gang_1way) and Wall Dimmer (wall_dimmer_1gang_1way) drivers with: ✅ Physical button detection (PhysicalButtonMixin) ✅ LED backlight control (DP15) ✅ Flow cards for physical on/off triggers ✅ Supports _TZ3000_blhvsaqf, _TZ3000_ysdv91bk. This community contribution brings advanced physical button press detection to BSEED/Zemismart switches. RE-PAIR your devices after update!

5.5.937.en: 🔧 CURTAIN MOTOR FIX v2: Fixed direct cluster DP communication fallback. Now uses correct tuyaCluster.datapoint({dp, datatype, data}) format instead of broken dataRequest/setData methods. This fixes 'tuya.datapoint: value is unexpected property' errors when TuyaEF00Manager is unavailable. RE-PAIR curtain motors if controls still don't work!

5.5.936.en: 🚀 MASSIVE FLOW CARD UPDATE: Added 153 missing flow cards (74 actions, 66 triggers, 13 conditions). Now complete for: air_purifier, curtain_motor, dimmer_3gang, din_rail_switch, fan_controller, humidifier, ir_blaster, led_controller, plug_smart, scene_switch, thermostat, water_tank_monitor, and more!

5.5.935.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIXES: 1) CURTAIN MOTOR: Fixed 'tuya.datapoint: value is unexpected' error - removed broken _sendTuyaDP override, now uses parent HybridCoverBase correctly. 2) FLOW CARDS: Added missing switch_3gang and switch_4gang LED backlight flow cards (set_backlight, set_backlight_color, set_backlight_brightness). RE-PAIR curtain motors if controls don't work!

5.5.934.en: 🔧 FLOW CARD FIX: Added missing toggle_gang, turn_on_all, turn_off_all, and LED backlight flow cards for switch_wall_5-8gang drivers. These were in driver definitions but not composed into app.json.

5.5.933.en: 🔧 CURTAIN MOTOR FIX: _TZE204_xu4a5rhj (Longsam mini m3) now correctly detected as TUYA_DP protocol instead of ZCL. Fixed protocol detection in HybridCoverBase to use cached manufacturer info from zclNode. RE-PAIR curtain motors after update for proper control!

5.5.932.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: 1) PETER: HOBEIAN multisensor temp/humidity now shows correct values (DP3/4 divisor fix). 2) VITALII: Gas detector _TZE204_chbyv06x enhanced with full DP mappings (gas_value, self_test, preheat, alarm_time, ringtone). 3) presence_sensor_radar now handles temp/humidity/battery DPs locally with proper divisors. RE-PAIR sensors after update!

5.5.931.en: 🔧 FLOW CARD FIX + CREDITS: Unique flow card IDs for switch_wall_5-8gang. CREDITS: @packetninja (BSEED switches, physical button detection), @vl14-dev (AM25 motor), @bmalkow (siren), @michelhelsdingen (10G radar), @WJGvdVelden (smoke+radar sensors), @Peter-Celica, @gpmachado (dimmer), @TKGHill (garage door), @sinan92 (PIR), @NicolasYDDER (HOBEIAN). Thank you all!

5.5.930.en: 🔧 PETER FIX + LED CONTROL: 1) HOBEIAN Multisensor (ZG-204ZV) - added DP polling for temp/humidity/battery (forum #1253). 2) motion_sensor DP3/4/5/6/9/12 periodic refresh. 3) Curtain motor 'unknown/unknown' fix. 4) LED backlight flow cards for ALL switch drivers (1-8 gang). 5) Toggle + turn_on_all/off_all actions. RE-PAIR multisensors after update!

5.5.929.en: 🎯 SMART DISTANCE FIX (Peter): 1) Auto-detect distance divisor for OEM variants (cm/dm/m). 2) Per-device divisor caching for consistent values. 3) OEM variant auto-discovery: temp, humidity, distance patterns. 4) UniversalDriverInit helper for ZCL/Tuya/Hybrid protocols. 5) 3-Phase, Fil Pilote, Cover calibration. Z2M/Hubitat/ZHA research applied!

5.5.928.en: 🔄 DYNAMIC VARIANT DETECTION: Chinese manufacturers use same manufacturerName for different device variants with different capabilities. New UniversalVariantManager automatically detects and adds capabilities when device reports new DPs (even after pairing). No more re-pairing needed for variant devices! Supports: temp, humidity, illuminance, distance, battery, power, voltage, current, energy.

5.5.927.en: 📏 DISTANCE FIX (Peter_van_Werkhoven forum): Fixed radar sensor distance showing wrong values (e.g., 8 instead of 1.5m). Z2M/Hubitat research confirms ALL radar sensors use scale 100 (cm to meters). Fixed ZY_M100_CEILING_24G divisor (was 10, now 100). Fixed auto-discovery to default to divisor 100. Added DP19/DP119 distance patterns. RE-PAIR radar sensors after update!

5.5.926.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL (_TZ3000_ja5osu5g) fingerprint removed from wrong drivers (plug, energy_monitor, button_4gang) - now ONLY in button_wireless_1. 2) presence_sensor_radar flow cards fixed - 'Invalid Flow Card ID: presence_cleared' error resolved. 3) Motion sensor permissive variant mode for ZG-204ZL/ZG-204ZV. RE-PAIR devices after update!

5.5.925.en: 🔀 PERMISSIVE VARIANT MODE (Peter_van_Werkhoven): Same manufacturerName (_TZE200_3towulqd) can be ZG-204ZL (PIR only) OR ZG-204ZV (with temp/humidity). Now uses DYNAMIC capability detection - capabilities are ADDED when device reports temp/humidity DPs, not removed upfront. This handles manufacturer variants with same ID but different sensors. RE-PAIR motion sensors after update!

5.5.924.en: 🔘 MOES BUTTON FIX (GitHub #1327 Kokosnootmelk/nickpatteeuw): Physical buttons not triggering on MOES _TZ3000_zgyzgdua TS0044 4-gang scene switch. Added raw frame interceptor for cluster 0xE000 (57344) with multiple parsing strategies. Hooks into endpoint.handleFrame to catch unknown cluster frames before they're discarded. RE-PAIR button devices after update!
