5.5.923.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTICS FIX (User Reports): 1) Curtain motor TS0601 showing 'unknown/unknown' - FIXED protocol detection using wrong settings keys (zb_modelId vs zb_model_id). 2) Water valve TS0601 same fix. 3) Both HybridCoverBase and HybridPlugBase now correctly detect TUYA_DP vs ZCL protocol. Commands no longer timeout on TS0601 devices. RE-PAIR curtain/valve devices after update!

5.5.922.en: 🔘 FORKS ANALYSIS + PACKETNINJA TECHNIQUE: Applied physical button detection to ALL multi-gang switches (2-8 gang). Added ZCL-only mode, per-endpoint state tracking, 2000ms app command window. Verified fingerprints from JohanBendz PRs already present. BSEED/Zemismart switches now fully supported with physical button detection.

5.5.921.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: 1) ZG-204ZL PIR-only sensor: Removed false temp/humidity, added battery DP4 (Peter_van_Werkhoven #1225). 2) AVATTO ME167 TRV: Added alarm_battery capability for DP35 (ManuelKugler #1223). 3) BSEED switches: Already fixed in v5.5.919 - users on v5.5.907 must UPDATE! RE-PAIR after update!

5.5.920.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX (Peter_van_Werkhoven #1225): _TZE200_3towulqd is ZG-204ZL (PIR only) NOT ZG-204ZV! This device has NO temp/humidity sensors. Removed incorrect capabilities. Added battery support via DP4. Source: Z2M GitHub #12364, Blakadder database. RE-PAIR after update!

5.5.919.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES (Post #1225-1230): 1) BSEED 2-gang (_TZ3000_l9brjwau) and 3-gang (_TZ3000_qkixdnon) switches now use ZCL-only mode like 1-gang. 2) HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV multisensor: Fixed temp/humidity not showing - added Tuya DP capability support. 3) Removed false 'Distance' option from PIR sensors. Pieter_Pessers, Peter_van_Werkhoven: RE-PAIR devices after update!

5.5.918.en: 🐛 FORUM FIX (Lasse_K #1700): Fixed contact sensors installing in reverse - IAS Zone now applies default inversion for known inverted manufacturers. Enhanced water sensor alarm detection with delayed secondary read for sleepy sensors. RE-PAIR devices after update!

5.5.917.en: 🔍 FORK/PR AUDIT: Added Longsam mini m3 Smart Curtain (_TZE204_xu4a5rhj) from Issue #117. PR #118 (_TZ3000_ysdv91bk) already integrated in v5.5.913. Verified all 7 child forks and 75+ JohanBendz network forks - all valuable contributions integrated.

5.5.916.en: 🐛 CRITICAL FIX: Fixed manufacturer/model retrieval in all base classes (HybridCoverBase, HybridPlugBase, HybridSensorBase, HybridThermostatBase, HybridLightBase, ButtonDevice). Devices showing 'unknown / unknown' will now be correctly identified. Curtain motors (TS0601), water valves, and other devices should work properly after RE-PAIRING.

5.5.915.en: 🔀 FORK ANALYSIS v2: Analyzed 75+ forks (JohanBendz network + dlnraja children). Gas detector: Added Heiman HS1CG-N (_TYZB01_0w3d5uw3). Credits: gpmachado (gas detector, Zemismart switches), bmalkow (siren fixes), baschte (signal repeater).

5.5.914.en: 🔀 FORK ANALYSIS: Integrated improvements from shaarkys & eelco2k forks. ZG-204ZV: Added fingerprints (rhgsbacq, grgol3xp, uli8wasj, y8jijhba) + alternate DP mappings (101/106/110/111). Rain sensor: Added HOBEIAN ZG-223Z (_TZE200_u6x1zyv2). Thank you shaarkys!

5.5.913.en: 🎉 PR #118 MERGED (packetninja/Attilla): BSEED switch ZCL-only mode with physical button detection via attribute reports. Fingerprints _TZ3000_ysdv91bk, _TZ3000_blhvsaqf fully integrated. 2000ms app command window. Thank you packetninja!

5.5.912.en: 🌡️ ZG-204ZV Fix: Added ZCL temperature (0x0402) + humidity (0x0405) cluster listeners. ZHA #4452: Some ZG-204ZV variants use ZCL clusters, not Tuya DP. Peter_van_Werkhoven: RE-PAIR to apply fix.

5.5.911.en: 💧 Water Valve Enhancement: Z2M DP mappings (water consumption, flow rate, temp, battery). Added fingerprints: vuwtqx0t, fphxkxue, a7sghmms. Pieter_Pessers: RE-PAIR water valve after update.

5.5.910.en: 🔥 CRITICAL FIX: PhysicalButtonMixin crash (Invalid Flow Card ID). getDeviceTriggerCard throws synchronously - wrapped in try-catch. App no longer crashes when physical flow cards missing.

5.5.909.en: 🔥 CRITICAL FIX: Radiator valve driver crash (Class extends undefined). ManuelKugler diagnostic report. Import syntax error fixed.

5.5.908.en: 🚪 Forum Fix #1011: Contact sensor _TZ3000_996rpfy6 (TS0203) always showing 'no' - added to inverted list. blutch32: RE-PAIR device to apply fix.

5.5.907.en: 🔋 Forum Fix #1225: HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV battery capability now auto-added. Sensors with battery DP mapping get measure_battery. Peter_van_Werkhoven: RE-PAIR device to apply orphan cleanup + battery.

5.5.906.en: 🎯 New Flow Cards: Toggle action for 1-gang switch. Toggle + All-gangs actions for 2-gang switch. Forum: Attilla confirms physical button flows now working. BSEED cluster handling improved.

5.5.905.en: 📊 Enhanced Diagnostics for ALL Sensors: HybridSensorBase now logs DP data with type/interval/count (same as switches). Helps diagnose device issues from logs. Forum docs updated with completed fixes.

5.5.904.en: 🧹 Orphan Capability Cleanup: Radar sensors now auto-remove capabilities not supported by device config. Fixes ZG-204ZV showing 'Distance' from previous pairing. Z2M research: static_detection_distance is a SETTING, not real-time measurement.

5.5.903.en: 🛠️ Forum Fixes: _TZE284_iadro9bf motion alarm stuck - added stuck pattern detection (5+ consecutive same values → distance inference only). Enhanced throttle for qasjif9e variants.

5.5.902.en: 📊 Diagnostic Logs Cleanup: Removed verbose ID DATABASE logging (was polluting diagnostics). Added enhanced DP/ZCL logging with data types, intervals, counts. Database is internal cache only - does NOT affect Homey driver pairing.

5.5.901.en: 🔧 BSEED Fix: Improved manufacturer detection with multiple fallback sources. Added 5 new BSEED IDs (_TZ3000_hafsqare, _TZ3000_e98krvvk, _TZ3000_iedbgyxt). Debug logging for ZCL-only mode detection. Forum diagnostic fixes.

5.5.900.en: 💡 Switch Behavior Settings: Power-On Behavior (off/on/memory), LED Backlight Mode (off/normal/inverted), Child Lock. All 1-4 gang switches. Z2M parity. Forum feedback integration complete.

5.5.899.en: 🎯 Device Profiles: Comprehensive manufacturer-specific handling based on Z2M/ZHA research. BSEED, Zemismart (ZHA #2443), Moes, TS0726 profiles. ZCL-only mode auto-detection, custom clusters 0xE000/0xE001, per-endpoint control.

5.5.898.en: ⚙️ Configurable Physical Button Detection: New settings for all switch drivers (1-4 gang). App Command Window (100-5000ms), Double Click Window (200-1000ms), Long Press Threshold (300-2000ms). BSEED default=2000ms.

5.5.897.en: 🔵 BSEED Special Mode: Dedicated handling for _TZ3000_blhvsaqf/_TZ3000_ysdv91bk. Pure ZCL (no Tuya DP), custom clusters 0xE000/0xE001, 2s response window. PR #116 full feature parity. Other 1-gang switches unchanged.

5.5.896.en: 🎯 PhysicalButtonMixin: Advanced button detection for all switch drivers (1-4 gang). Single/double/long/triple press. BSEED=2000ms, others=500ms (faster). Flow cards with duration tokens.

5.5.895.en: 🔀 MERGED: switch_1gang_bseed → switch_1gang. Unified driver supports Tuya DP, ZCL onOff, BSEED clusters (0xE000/0xE001). Physical button detection for all 1-gang switches.

5.5.894.en: 🎨 Flow Cards: Enhanced switch drivers (1-4 gang) with titleFormatted, device args, physical button triggers (PR #116 pattern). Full EN/FR/NL/DE localization.

5.5.893.en: 📦 Enrichment: Added HOBEIAN ZG-303Z temp/humidity (blutch32 #1011). Cross-referenced 20 JohanBendz PRs - all IDs verified.

5.5.892.en: 🔧 Motion Sensor FIX (Peter #1211): Removed orphan 'Distance' capability from ZG-204ZV. Distance is only for radar sensors.

5.5.891.en: 🔧 Bseed Switch: Added _TZ3000_ysdv91bk variant (Pieter_Pessers forum). PR #116 closed with thanks to packetninja.

5.5.890.en: 🌧️ Rain Sensor: Added IAS Zone support for TS0207 devices (Dominique_C forum). Fixes 'IAS Zone error' on pairing.

5.5.889.en: ✨ NEW: Bseed 1-Gang Switch (PR #116 by packetninja) - Physical button detection, flow triggers. Added FR/DE localization.

5.5.888.en: 🔧 Motion Sensor FIX (Peter #1204): ZG-204ZV now correctly shows temperature & humidity. Removed incorrect PIR-only classification for 4-in-1 multisensors.

5.5.887.en: 🌡️ Air Quality CO2 Sensor: Fixed naming. Curtain Motor Tilt: Added energy approximation (40W).

5.5.886.en: 💡 Smart Bulbs: Major cleanup - removed incorrect battery capabilities from all bulb drivers, fixed FR naming, proper capability sets per bulb type. HVAC AC: removed battery capability.

5.5.885.en: 💡 LED Strips: Removed incorrect battery capabilities, proper energy tracking, fixed naming. DIY Custom Device: NL/DE switch title localization.

5.5.884.en: 🌀 Ceiling Fan: Removed incorrect battery capability, added speed title localization. Formaldehyde Sensor: Fixed naming with VOC in all languages.

5.5.883.en: 🌡️ Climate Sensor and Generic Tuya Device: NL/DE localization for temperature, humidity, and illuminance titles.

5.5.882.en: 💡 Dimmers: Wall Dimmer 1-Gang proper naming. 3-Gang Dimmer channel titles with full NL/DE localization for better UX.

5.5.881.en: 🔧 Fixes: SOS Button class changed to 'button' + full localization. Door Controller, DIN Rail Switch, Gas Sensor - proper names and NL/DE translations.

5.5.880.en: 🌬️ Sensors: Gas Detector, Air Quality CO2, Comprehensive Air Monitor - proper French names and NL/DE localization for all alarm titles.

5.5.879.en: 🏠 Curtain Motor: Energy tracking (40W) + NL/DE. Irrigation Valve: Changed to 'other' class, zone titles localized. Improved device classification.

5.5.878.en: 🌡️ HVAC: Air Conditioner (1200W) and Dehumidifier (350W) proper energy tracking. Fan Controller and Air Purifier NL/DE localization. Removed incorrect battery configs.

5.5.877.en: 🔧 Fixes: LED Strip name fixed, Ceiling Fan proper energy (65W) + localization, Water Tank battery types added. Removed incorrect battery configs from AC devices.

5.5.876.en: 🔋 Energy Tracking: Garage door (150W), IR Blaster (2W constant), Dual Dimmer (100W), LED CCT Controller (24W). IR Blaster learn button now maintenance action.

5.5.875.en: ⚡ Smart RCBO: Changed to 'socket' class with cumulative energy tracking. Added trip alarm localization. Fixed Zigbee Gateway name.

5.5.874.en: 🌡️ 4-Channel Thermostat: Energy tracking (3W), NL/DE localized channel names for all 4 temperature/control channels. Better multi-zone heating management.

5.5.873.en: 🔧 Device Improvements: Siren uses proper 'siren' class. Fixed duplicate names (Siren, Doorbell). Energy tracking for humidifier (25W), pet feeder (5W). NL/DE localization expanded.

5.5.872.en: 📊 Energy Meters: DIN Rail, CT Clamp, and 3-Phase meters now use cumulative energy tracking. More accurate power consumption in Homey Energy dashboard.

5.5.871.en: 🌍 Localization: Added Dutch (NL) and German (DE) translations to pairing instructions for motion sensor and contact sensor. Better multilingual support.

5.5.870.en: 📊 Energy Monitoring: Smart plugs with power measurement now use cumulative energy tracking (not approximated). Better accuracy in Homey Energy dashboard.

5.5.869.en: 🏠 Device Classes: Cover Controller now uses 'curtains' class, Roller Shutter uses 'blinds' class per SDK best practices. Highlighted power source setting for radar sensors.

5.5.868.en: ✨ Flow Cards: Added highlights to 3-gang, 4-gang switches, RGB bulb, radiator valve. Improved NL/DE localization. Easier to find important triggers in Flow editor.

5.5.867.en: ⚡ Energy Tracking: Air purifier (45W), smart heater (2000W), fan controller (75W), irrigation valve. Better power consumption estimates for Homey Energy dashboard.

5.5.866.en: ⚡ SDK3 Best Practices: Fixed LED strip energy (24W), added radiator valve calibration button, radar sensor energy tracking, power meter cumulative flag. Better Homey Energy integration.

5.5.865.en: 🎛️ NEW: Smart Knob / Scene Switch driver (ERS-10TZBVK-AA) - Rotary dimmer with rotation left/right triggers, button press detection, simulated brightness. Fixes Issue #113.

5.5.864.en: 🔧 Pairing: Added repair view support for thermostats. Improved pairing flow with singular device selection. Better device recovery after connection issues.

5.5.863.en: 🔒 Device Classes: Smoke detector now uses 'smokedetector' class, CO sensor uses 'co' class. Water leak sensor added to home alarm. Better Homey integration.

5.5.862.en: 🏠 Flow Cards: Thermostat comfort presets (Eco/Away/Sleep/Boost) + schedule control. Curtain stop/favorite actions. Better multi-language support.

5.5.861.en: 🎛️ Flow Cards: Added physical button triggers for switches. Highlighted key triggers for faster flow creation. Better hints and translations.

5.5.860.en: 🔌 Flow Cards: Added power monitoring triggers (power_changed, power_threshold) with tokens (power, voltage, current) for smart plugs. Enhanced Advanced Flow support.

5.5.859.en: 📡 Sensors: Added alarm_tamper + measure_temperature to contact, motion, water leak sensors. Better device indicators and auto-discovery support.

5.5.858.en: 🎯 UX: Highlighted important dimmer settings (min_brightness) for quick access during pairing. Improved hints for LED compatibility.

5.5.857.en: ⚡ Homey Energy: Improved energy tracking for bulbs (7-9W), LED strips (24W), RGB controllers (36W), dimmers (60-180W). Proper usageOn/usageOff instead of usageConstant.

5.5.856.en: ✨ SDK3 Best Practices: Added Homey Energy approximation to switches (2-4 gang, DIN rail, smart breaker). Added maintenance actions for curtain motors (calibrate, reset) and thermostats (boost, calibrate).

5.5.855.en: ✨ NEW: Periodic Auto-Enrichment for ALL drivers! Automatic ZCL cluster + Tuya DP detection at 15min after pairing, then hourly. Dynamic capability + flow card registration.

5.5.854.en: 🔧 FIX: switch_dimmer_1gang physical button detection now works correctly (Attilla forum #1205). Override parent class methods instead of duplicate listeners.

5.5.853.en: 🔧 FIX: Moved _TZE284_3mzb0sdz from climate_sensor to ir_blaster - it's an IR Blaster (Z2M #29098, zosungIRTransmit cluster). RE-PAIR required.

5.5.852.en: 🔧 FIX: HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV now properly adds temperature + humidity capabilities (Peter_van_Werkhoven forum #1203). RE-PAIR or restart app to see new capabilities.

5.5.851.en: 🔧 FIX: Removed _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn from switch_2gang - it's a Dual USB switch (Z2M #23625), not a wall switch. Now correctly maps to usb_dongle_dual_repeater. RE-PAIR required.

5.5.850.en: 🔧 FIX: IAS Zone warning now only shows for pure IAS devices. Hybrid Tuya DP devices won't show misleading 're-pair' warnings since they work via DP fallback.

5.5.849.en: 🔧 FIX: Removed _TZE204_laokfqwu from climate_sensor - it's an mmWave presence sensor (Z2M #23217). Device correctly maps to presence_sensor_radar. RE-PAIR required.

5.5.848.en: 🔧 SDK3 COMPLIANCE: Per Homey Developer docs - deferred init communication (don't communicate in onInit), SED-aware request handling, improved IAS Zone enrollment. Better reliability for sleepy battery devices.

5.5.847.en: 🔧 DEVICE FIX: Fixed _TZE204_laokfqwu misidentification - moved from CO2 sensor to presence_sensor_radar (DP1=presence, DP9=lux). RE-PAIR devices showing as 'Appareil Zigbee' to use correct driver.

5.5.846.en: 🔍 EXTENDED VERIFICATION: Added 5 more TRV fingerprints (_TZE204_wgrffniy, _TZE204_xby0s3ta, _TZE204_pisltm67, _TZE204_qdihqf3l, _TZE204_v6ossqfy) verified against Blakadder/Zigbee2MQTT/ZHA.

5.5.845.en: 🔍 DEEP VERIFICATION: Added 7 missing fingerprints verified against Blakadder/Zigbee2MQTT/ZHA: TRV (_TZE204_locansqn, _TZE204_sh1btabb, _TZE204_ywdxldoj), Cover (_TZE204_7tdtqgwv), Climate (_TZE204_dikkika5, _TZE204_1n2kyphz).

5.5.844.en: 🔍 BLAKADDER/ZHA VERIFICATION: Added missing TRV fingerprints (_TZE204_pay2byax, _TZE204_qoy0ekbd) verified against Blakadder Zigbee database, Zigbee2MQTT, and ZHA device handlers.

5.5.843.en: 🔍 BLAKADDER VERIFICATION: Added missing motion sensor fingerprints (_TYZB01_ef5xlc9q, _TYZB01_zwvaj5wy, _TYZB01_tv3wxhcz, _TYZB01_jytabjkb) verified against Blakadder Zigbee database and Zigbee2MQTT.

5.5.842.en: 📦 Maintenance release - all previous fixes included (HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV temp/humidity/SOS, ZG-204ZL motion inversion).

5.5.841.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIX (Peter_van_Werkhoven): HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV multisensor COMPLETE FIX! (1) Fixed config routing - HOBEIAN+ZG-204ZV modelId now correctly routes to ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR config. (2) Temperature & humidity now report properly via DP3/DP4. (3) Added SOS button DP17/DP18 mapping for flow triggers. Re-pair device to apply fix.

5.5.840.en: 🔄 FORUM FIX (Cam): HOBEIAN ZG-204ZL motion sensor 'always active' issue FIXED! The invert_presence setting was not being applied to IAS Zone and Tuya DP motion handlers. Now motion inversion works correctly for sensors reporting inverted values. Go to device settings → enable 'Invert Motion Detection' if your sensor shows always active or never active.

5.5.834.en: ✅ GitHub Issues #113, #114, #115 VERIFIED: All devices already supported! TS004F knob dimmer (_TZ3000_gwkzibhs), TS0041 smart button (_TZ3000_b4awzgct), TS0201 temp/humidity (_TZ3000_fllyghyj) - fingerprints present in button_wireless_1 and climate_sensor drivers. Issues can be closed.

5.5.833.en: 🌧️ FORUM FIX (Dominique_C #1202): Rain sensor TS0207/_TZ3210_p68kms0l now pairs correctly! Added missing TS0207 productId to rain_sensor driver. IAS Zone error should be resolved.

5.5.832.en: 🆘 FORUM FIX (Peter_van_Werkhoven #1203): SOS button flow cards now trigger properly! Added registerRunListener() to flow card registration - this was missing and caused flows not to fire even when button press was detected. Also includes ZG-204ZV temp/humidity fix from v5.5.831.

5.5.831.en: 🌡️ FORUM FIX (Peter_van_Werkhoven): HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV multisensor now reports temperature & humidity! Device was incorrectly mapped to config without temp/humidity. Created dedicated ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR config with DP3=temp, DP4=humidity. Forum devices verified: TS130F curtain (_TZ3000_5iixzdo7, _TZ3000_bs93npae), TS0207 rain sensor (_TZ3210_p68kms0l) - all already supported.

5.5.830.en: 📧 EMAIL/ZHA BATCH: Added new 6-channel relay fingerprints from ZHA issue #4376: _TZE284_l8xiyymq (PN6), _TZE204_znbl8dj5, _TZE204_ikvncluo. Verified Zbeacon TH01 and soil sensor _TZE284_aa03yzhs already supported. Sources: Gmail diagnostics, ZHA device handlers, Z2M database.

5.5.829.en: 🔧 ATTILLA/PACKETNINJA PATTERN: Applied physical button detection to dimmer_3gang driver! Features: (1) App command tracking to distinguish physical vs app actions, (2) Heartbeat filtering to reduce log spam, (3) State change detection. Inspired by PR #112 contributions.

5.5.828.en: 🔘 PHYSICAL BUTTON FIX (Attilla's report): switch_dimmer_1gang now correctly detects physical button presses! Flow cards 'turned_on' and 'turned_off' trigger properly. Fix: physical presses come via 'response' events, not 'reporting' - detection now uses app command tracking.

5.5.827.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTICS BATCH FIX: 1) AVATTO TRV Smart Radiator Valve (_TZE284_o3x45p96) - added fingerprint for thermostat driver. 2) BSEED 4-Gang fingerprints already present (TS0726/_TZ3002_pzao9ls1). 3) Flow card ID fixes from v5.5.794 diagnostics already resolved in newer versions. All issues from Gmail diagnostics reports analyzed and addressed.

5.5.826.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTICS FIXES: 1) HOBEIAN ZG-204ZV multi-sensor now reports temperature and humidity! Added correct DP profile (DP3=temp, DP4=humidity) - was using wrong radar DPs. 2) SOS Button flow fix (Peter's report) - flow card 'button_emergency_sos_pressed' now triggers properly. Driver explicitly registers and triggers the flow card.

5.5.825.en: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Extended v5.5.824 fix to HybridSensorBase! Climate sensors (temp/humidity) now also reconfigure reporting after app updates. Added _shouldConfigureReportingSensor() with version tracking. All sensor types (climate, motion, contact, water leak) benefit from this fix.

5.5.824.en: 🚨 CRITICAL FIX: Devices not working after update! Root cause found: reporting was only configured on first pairing, never after app updates. Now: (1) Detects app version changes and reconfigures reporting, (2) Fallback cluster binding if registration fails, (3) Tracks 'hasReceivedData' to detect broken devices. NO RE-PAIR NEEDED - just update and wait 2 minutes!

5.5.823.en: 🎛️ TS004F SMART KNOB FIX (GitHub #113): Added LevelControlBoundCluster support for rotary dimmers! Device _TZ3000_gwkzibhs now receives rotation commands (step/move/stop). Triggers 'rotate_left' and 'rotate_right' button events. Re-pair Smart Knob after update!

5.5.822.en: 🔄 FRESH Z2M SYNC + USER INTERVIEWS: Synced TuyaDataPointsZ2M.js with latest zigbee-herdsman-converters. Added 50+ new fingerprints: TRV (_TZE200_rufdtfyv, _TZE200_p3dbf6qs), Climate sensors (_TZ3000_fllyghyj from GitHub #115), Buttons (_TZ3000_b4awzgct from #114, _TZ3000_gwkzibhs from #113), Energy meters, USB outlets. User interview data has PRIORITY over external sources.

5.5.821.en: 📊 ENRICHED DP MAPPINGS: Added device profiles from JohanBendz PRs + Z2M + Hubitat. New devices: HOBEIAN 10G radar multi-sensor (PR#1306), Siren _TZE200_t1blo2bj (PR#1333), HOBEIAN ZG-227Z climate (PR#1332), Rain sensor _TZ3210_tgvtvdoc (PR#983), AVATTO dimmer _TZE204_5cuocqty (PR#981). Updated ZG-204ZM DP mappings with correct temp/humidity DPs.

5.5.820.en: 🚨 CRITICAL FIX: Devices not working after re-pair! TuyaSpecificClusterDevice now tries ALL possible Tuya cluster names (tuya, manuSpecificTuya, 61184, 0xEF00). Added raw frame fallback when cluster not found. This fixes the root cause of 'devices not receiving data' reports!

5.5.819.en: 🎮 LoraTap TS0043 FIX (DVMasters #98): 3-button remote now recognized! Added endpoint 4 and cluster 57344 (0xE000) to button_wireless_3 driver. Device was being added as 'unknown' due to missing endpoint configuration. Re-pair after update!

5.5.818.en: 🔘 BSEED TS0726 4-GANG FIX (Hartmut #1194): Physical buttons now work! Added OnOffBoundCluster to HybridSwitchBase to intercept commands from outputCluster 6. Each gang endpoint now has BoundCluster installed. Re-pair switch after update!

5.5.817.en: 🔘 HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL FIX (Ronny_M #1197): Added SDK3 method aliases (setOn/setOff/setToggle) to OnOffBoundCluster for proper button command reception. Button should now respond to single/double/long press. Re-pair device after update!

5.5.816.en: 🔧 FIX: Added missing driver.js files for 12 drivers (air_purifier, din_rail_meter, din_rail_switch, fan_controller, fingerprint_lock, garage_door, humidifier, pet_feeder, pool_pump, power_clamp_meter, smart_breaker, smart_heater_controller). These drivers were failing silently without driver.js.

5.5.815.en: 🚨 MASSIVE FIX: 89 drivers now have correct zigbee cluster endpoints! Sensors: temp(1026), humidity(1029), motion(1030), IAS(1280), illuminance(1024). Switches: onOff(6). Plugs: metering(2820,1794). Lights: levelControl(8), colorControl(768). Covers: windowCovering(258). All devices: Tuya(61184), battery(1). THIS IS THE FIX for devices not receiving data. RE-PAIR ALL DEVICES!

5.5.814.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Synced zigbee endpoints from driver.compose.json to app.json - 13 drivers fixed (climate_sensor, water_leak_sensor, buttons, switches, curtain_motor, plug_energy_monitor). Devices now properly bind to temperature (1026), humidity (1029), battery (1), IAS Zone (1280), Tuya (61184) clusters. Re-pair devices after update!

5.5.813.en: 🔌 HYBRIDSWITCH ENHANCEMENT: Complete method implementation - onSettings (power_on_behavior, LED), _readInitialState, _setupReporting (ZCL attribute reporting), _setupPowerMetering (measure_power/voltage/current/meter_power), _sendTuyaDP. Supports 8-gang switches and automatic power metering detection.

5.5.812.en: 🔧 FORUM MULTI-FIX: 1) BSEED TS0726 4-gang physical buttons now work (Hartmut #98) - added ZCL command listeners for toggle/on/off commands. 2) ZG-103ZL Hobeian vibration sensor added (Mike_Van_A). 3) TS0043 LoraTap 3-button endpoint config fixed in app.json (DVMasters #98). 4) TS130F curtain _TZ3000_5iixzdo7 already supported (Mitch_Vallinga). Re-pair devices after update.

5.5.811.en: 🔌 BSEED FIX (Pieter_Pessers): Added BSEED wall switch manufacturer IDs (_TZ3000_ptjcjise, _TZ3000_nnwehhst, _TZ3000_fawk5xjv) for 2-gang and 3-gang switches. Fixed multi-button simultaneous control issue by adding proper onOff cluster bindings to switch endpoints. Re-pair devices after update.

5.5.810.en: 🌡️ CRITICAL FIX (Lars-Arne): TS0201 temperature sensors (_TZ3000_fllyghyj, etc.) now report data! Fixed climate_sensor driver - added missing ZCL clusters (1026=temp, 1029=humidity, 1=battery) and bindings. Devices that paired but never updated will now work after re-pairing. Also fixes TS0041 buttons.

5.5.809.en: 🎛️ FORUM FIX #113: Added Smart Knobe Scene Switch (_TZ3000_4fjiwweb/TS004F) to switch_dimmer_1gang driver for remote dimmer functionality. LoraTap TS0043 (_TZ3000_famkxci2) already supported in button_wireless_3.

5.5.808.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTICS FIX: 1) Water valve _TZ3000_iedbgyxt/TS0001 now correctly detected as valve (was wrongly detected as 1-gang switch). 2) Fixed water_valve_smart Flow Card IDs mismatch - flow cards now work correctly. 3) Moved 10+ valve manufacturer IDs from switch_1gang to valve_single driver.

5.5.807.en: 🔒 SDK3 IAS ZONE COMPLIANCE FIX: 1) Removed hardcoded fallback IEEE address that caused enrollment failures. 2) Fixed Zone Enroll Request handler to use SDK3 method assignment pattern. 3) Added proactive Zone Enroll Response on init (SDK3 best practice). 4) Improved CIE address handling - Homey v8.1.1+ auto-writes during pairing. 5) Better error handling when coordinator IEEE unavailable. Fixes HOBEIAN ZG-102Z and similar sensor enrollment issues.

5.5.806.en: 💡 FORUM COMPREHENSIVE FIX: 1) Motion sensor continuous illuminance - lux now updates independently of motion (30s-5min intervals). 2) TS004F 4-gang physical buttons verified working with scene mode switching. 3) Contact sensor _TZ3000_n2egfsli support verified. All forum issues from homey_forum_analysis addressed.

5.5.805.en: 🔘 BUTTON FIX (Forum Ronny_M/Cam/Hartmut #1172/#1160/#1155): Fixed wireless buttons not responding to presses and missing battery readings. Reduced anti-trigger protection from 2000ms to 500ms (was too aggressive). Hourly pattern detection now requires 2+ consecutive occurrences before blocking. Buttons should now trigger flows correctly on every press.

5.5.804.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTICS REPORT FIXES: 1) HOBEIAN multisensor - fixed wrong detection when modelId is null/unknown, now defaults to HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI config with temp+humidity support. 2) SOS Button - added cluster validation to detect failed interviews, warns user to re-pair if only basic cluster is available. Enhanced diagnostic logging for both issues.

5.5.803.en: 💧 WATER LEAK SENSOR FIX (Forum #1166 Lasse_K): Fixed 'installs but no alarm' issue. IAS Alarm Fallback now enabled for ALL water sensors (not just IAS Zone types). Added force initial alarm state read after pairing. Enhanced polling and wake detection for sleepy water sensors.

5.5.802.en: 📡 BLAKADDER DATABASE INTEGRATION: Added brand names Eardatek, Linptech, Rehent, Nous, RTX, Fantem to motion_sensor, contact_sensor, climate_sensor, water_leak_sensor drivers. Enhanced device recognition for third-party Tuya-compatible sensors.

5.5.801.en: 🔘 LORATAP TS0043 FIX (Issue #98): Added missing manufacturer ID _TZ3000_bi6lpsew and LoraTap brand name for 3-button remote. Device already had _TZ3000_famkxci2 support. Users should re-pair device after update for proper recognition.

5.5.800.en: 📡 ZIGBEE DEVICE EXPANSION: Added 30+ new manufacturer IDs from ZHA/Zigbee2MQTT/Hubitat sources. Thermostats: _TZE284_cvub6xbb (hydronic floor heating), _TZE284_xnbkhhdr, _TZE284_pcdmj88b. Valves: SASWELL, LIDL Parkside, GiEX (_TZE204_7ytb3h8u), FrankEver FK_V02, NovaDigital, MUCIAKiE. Motion Sensors: 2-in-1 variants, IMOU ZP2-EN, Azoula 4-in-1.

5.5.799.en: 💡 SWITCH DIMMER 1GANG ENHANCEMENT: Full settings support (min_brightness, power_on_behavior, light_type) with onSettings handler and initial settings application. Added 7 new manufacturer IDs (BSEED, Avatto ZDMS16-1, Mercator IKUU). PR #111/#112 (packetninja) verified: physical button flow triggers, heartbeat filtering, app vs physical command detection.

5.5.798.en: 🔧 PROJECT AUDIT: Complete codebase audit and reorganization. Fixed import paths (BatteryMonitoringMixin, security index). Added missing index exports for managers, battery, zigbee, clusters, tuya modules. Enhanced module organization with lazy loading for circular dependency prevention. SDK3 compliance verified across all drivers.

5.5.797.en: 🔧 IEEE ADDRESS MANAGEMENT: New centralized IEEEAddressManager with 7 fallback methods for device/coordinator IEEE retrieval, robust CIE address write with verification, IEEE normalization and validation. Fixes IAS Zone enrollment issues across all sensors/buttons.

5.5.796.en: 🔧 FORUM #1159 FIXES: MOES buttons (Freddyboy/Hartmut) - enhanced TuyaE000BoundCluster with multiple parsing strategies. Hobeian ZG-222Z water sensor (Lasse_K) - improved IASAlarmFallback with force read and alarm2 bit detection. BSEED TS0003 switch support verified.

5.5.795.en: 🔧 RAW DATA INTERPRETATION: Enhanced CIE address verification for IAS Zone enrollment, new UniversalRawInterpreter for unknown clusters/commands, improved TuyaBoundCluster with raw frame handling and debugging. Better support for non-standard Zigbee devices.

5.5.794.en: 📦 NEW SONOFF DEVICES: Added SNZB-02DR2 (Airguard TH 3.6 large LCD), SNZB-01M (4-button Orb remote), SNZB-03P/SNZB-04P (P-series sensors), ZBMINIL2/ZBMINIR2 (mini switches). Enhanced SONOFF fingerprinting across all sensor drivers.

5.5.793.en: 🔧 SENSOR ENRICHMENT: Added validation constants, battery throttling, and enhanced cleanup across all sensor drivers (climate_sensor, motion_sensor, contact_sensor, presence_sensor_radar, HybridSensorBase). Improved robustness and reduced battery spam.

5.5.792.en: 🔧 FIX LukasT #1163: _TZE284_1wnh8bqp temp/humidity sensor - auto-detect humidity divisor (values >100 now correctly divided by 10).

5.5.791.en: 🔧 PROJECT-WIDE IMPROVEMENTS: Presence inversion support in HybridSensorBase (all IAS Zone + ZCL sensors), invert_presence setting for motion_sensor drivers. Fixes INT-001/INT-021.

5.5.790.en: 🔧 DEVICE INTERVIEW FIXES: INT-001 _TZE284_iadro9bf radar motion always YES (ZCL inversion fix), INT-021 HOBEIAN ZG-102Z CIE enrollment (force write CIE address). RE-PAIR sensors after update.

5.5.789.en: 🔧 BUG FIXES: Fixed switch_dimmer_1gang 'Invalid Flow Card ID' error + AVATTO ME167/TRV06 thermostat DP profile support (_TZE284_o3x45p96). RE-PAIR thermostats after update.

5.5.759.en: 📦 Publish Release: MOES button BoundCluster fix (cluster 0xE000/57344), SOS button IAS Zone logging fix, all GitHub issues #101-#110 resolved. RE-PAIR REQUIRED for MOES buttons.

5.5.739.en: 🔄 Hybrid Merge: 12 new manufacturer IDs from upstream JohanBendz for plug_energy_monitor. Better device compatibility!

5.5.738.en: 🔧 PR Code Improvements: Added child_lock flow cards for thermostats (action + condition). Inspired by closed PR #948 suggestions. All closed PRs code improvements verified integrated.

5.5.737.en: 🔌 PR #111: New Bseed Touch Dimmer driver (switch_dimmer_1gang) + flow card fixes across 100+ drivers. Manufacturer IDs: _TZE200_3p5ydos3, _TZE204_n9ctkb6j. RE-PAIR REQUIRED.

5.5.736.en: 🔌 Forum Requests: Added Hejhome Pika 3-gang & 6-gang switches (_TZE284_c8ipbljq) + radar presence sensor (_TZE284_debczeci). RE-PAIR REQUIRED after update.

5.5.735.en: 🔧 ROOT CAUSE FIX: Integrated DeviceDataHelper in HybridSwitchBase, HybridSensorBase, and water_leak_sensor. Fixes 'unknown/unknown' device identification by trying ALL data sources. Switches now correctly identify manufacturer/model, sensors detect protocol properly. RE-PAIR REQUIRED.

5.5.734.en: 🔌 eWeLink Plug Support (Forum #1133): Added eWeLink CK-BL702-SWP-01(7020) plug with power meter to plug_energy_monitor driver. RE-PAIR REQUIRED after update.

5.5.733.en: 🔘 HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL FIX (Forum #1135): Added OnOffBoundCluster to receive button commands from outputCluster. Device sends ON/OFF/TOGGLE via cluster 6 outputCluster - now properly intercepted. Mapped: ON=single, OFF=double, TOGGLE=long. RE-PAIR REQUIRED after update.

5.5.732.en: 🔧 GitHub Issues: Added _TZ3210_w0qqde0g to plug_energy_monitor (#110). Verified Zbeacon TH01 support (#109). All Johan's GitHub requests already supported.

5.5.731.en: Complete forum review & SOS button analysis. All devices verified supported (ZTH11, ZG-227Z, ZG-222Z, Moes 4-button, Touch dimmers, SOS buttons 28+ IDs). Common solution: re-pair devices after driver updates.

5.5.718.en: 🔧 TS0726 4-GANG FIX (Hartmut_Dunker): Added onOff cluster (6) and bindings to all 4 endpoints. This fixes bidirectional control - physical buttons now report to Homey and Homey commands now control the switch. RE-PAIR REQUIRED after update.

5.5.717.en: 📊 ENRICHMENT UPDATE: Enhanced DP mappings with 15 device categories, intelligent fallbacks, sanity checks. Added +8 manufacturer IDs from forum/GitHub sync. Improved curtain_motor, scene_switch_4, ir_blaster, switch_1gang drivers. climate_sensor enriched with eWeLink support.

5.5.716.en: 🔧 DRIVER OVERLAP FIX (Hartmut_Dunker): Removed _TZ3002_vaq2bfcu and _TZ3002_zyuajkzz from button_wireless_4 driver - these are TS0726 mains-powered wall switches, not battery-powered wireless buttons. Devices now correctly pair to switch_4gang driver. RE-PAIR REQUIRED.

5.5.715.en: 🔘 HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL FIX (Ronny_M): Added onOff cluster binding (cluster 6) for receiving button commands. Added powerConfiguration cluster. Device has 2 modes - triple-click to switch: EVENT mode (commandOn/Off/Toggle) or COMMAND mode (on/off/toggle). RE-PAIR REQUIRED. TIP: Triple-click to switch modes if buttons don't respond.

5.5.714.en: 🔘 MOES 4-BUTTON FIX (Freddyboy): Fixed _TZ3000_zgyzgdua Moes TS0044 4-button remote not responding. Device uses cluster 0xE000 (57344) instead of standard scenes. Added dedicated cluster listeners + enhanced onOff commandOn/Off/Toggle handlers. Removed incorrect TS004F mode switching for this TS0044 device. RE-PAIR REQUIRED after update.

5.5.713.en: 🔧 SENSOR POLARITY FIX (Lasse_K): Water leak sensor: Added 'Invert Water Alarm' setting for sensors with reversed polarity. Contact sensor: Expanded auto-inversion to more _TZ3000_* manufacturers. Both fixes allow manual override via device settings if sensor shows wrong state.

5.5.712.en: 🆘 SOS BUTTON FIX: Fixed corrupted manufacturer list in button_emergency_sos driver - removed 200+ unrelated brand names, kept only actual SOS button IDs (TS0215, TS0215A, TS0218). This fixes pairing issues for SOS/emergency buttons. HOBEIAN temp/humidity fix already in v5.5.710.

5.5.711.en: 🌡️ ZBEACON TH01: Added Zbeacon manufacturerName support for TH01 temp/humidity sensor (GitHub Issue #109). Device pairs correctly to climate_sensor driver.

5.5.710.en: 🔧 HOBEIAN FIX: Fixed HOBEIAN temp/humidity sensors not updating - added HOBEIAN to climate_sensor driver, fixed DP101 battery mapping. Motion sensor DP101 now intelligently detects battery (0-100) vs presence_time (>100). Scene switch flow cards already fixed in v5.5.708 - users need to update app.

5.5.709.en: 📚 RULES & ENRICHMENT: Created docs/rules/ with DEVELOPMENT_RULES.md, USER_DEVICE_EXPECTATIONS.md, UNSUPPORTED_DEVICES.md. Added Z2M 2025 manufacturer IDs: presence sensors (_TZE200_qasjif9e, _TZE204_ya4ft0w4, _TZE204_bvfld3xc, _TZE200_hyhl5y36), switches (_TZ3210_tqlv4ug4, _TZ3000_iv4eq7eh, _TZ3000_3n2minvf), TRVs (_TZE200_cxakecfo, _TZE204_woww89ip), bidirectional energy meters (_TZE204_ac0fhfiq). APsystems solar (proprietary Zigbee) documented as unsupported.

5.5.708.en: 🎛️ SCENE SWITCH FLOW CARDS FIX: Added 13 missing flow triggers to app.json for scene_switch_1/2/3/6 drivers. Fixed Invalid Flow Card ID errors (scene_switch_1_button_pressed, scene_switch_2_button_pressed, etc.). Presence sensor drivers verified with 100+ manufacturer IDs. smoke_detector_advanced _TZE284_rccxox8p already supported.

5.5.707.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: Fixed ir_send_ac_command flow card for IR Blaster (JSON structure issue). Verified _TZ3000_l9brjwau TS0002 support in switch_2gang driver. Fixed ir_blaster driver.flow.compose.json indentation. smoke_detector_advanced (_TZE284_rccxox8p) uses passive mode for sleepy battery devices - initial data may take up to 24h.

5.5.706.en: 📖 TROUBLESHOOTING GUIDE: Added comprehensive Zigbee troubleshooting documentation (docs/ZIGBEE_TROUBLESHOOTING_GUIDE.md). Covers pairing issues (mesh limits, WiFi interference, Tuya Magic Spell, interview timeout) and Flow issues (attribute reporting, multi-endpoint mapping, capability listeners, EF00 cluster conflicts).

5.5.705.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: Fixed flow card ID mismatches in soil_sensor (moisture_changed, temperature_changed), added usb_outlet_button_pressed trigger, added soil_sensor_moisture_below condition. _TZE284_rccxox8p smoke detector and _TZ3000_l9brjwau switch already supported.

5.5.704.en: 🔄 SYNC & WORKFLOWS: Fixed 53 stale + added 75 missing manufacturer/product IDs via auto-sync. Enhanced GitHub Actions with concurrency control, auto-commit sync, validation summaries. publish.yml and validate.yml improved with driver count, sync status reporting.

5.5.703.en: 🔧 CRITICAL DUPLICATES FIX: Removed 48 manufacturerNames from wrong drivers based on GitHub issues #1104, #1063 and forum research. Fixed _TZE200_cirvgep4 (LCD temp sensor), _TZE200_a8sdabtg (climate sensor), _TZE200_locansqn (radiator valve), _TZ3000_gjnozsaz/_TZ3000_p6ju8myv (SOS buttons), air quality sensors, fan controllers. Devices now pair to correct driver.

5.5.702.en: 🔧 ANALYSIS: Added scripts/fix-true-duplicates.js for duplicate analysis. ManufacturerNames CAN be in multiple drivers when productIds differ. Only TRUE duplicates (same mfr + same productId in incompatible drivers) are issues.

5.5.700.en: 🔧 UNIVERSAL PERMISSIVE SOLUTION: New lib/Util.js with normalizeTuyaID, equalsIgnoreCase, requirePermissive (case-insensitive file loader), parseFlowBoolean. Updated PermissiveMatchingEngine and FlowCardManager. Flow cards now accept 'On/ON/on', dp_type 'ENUM/enum'. Complete anti-casing layer for Linux filesystem and Tuya ID chaos.

5.5.699.en: 🔧 DEEP CASE-INSENSITIVE FIX: Extended case-insensitive matching to ALL device lookup functions. Fixed 15+ additional files: TuyaProfiles, TuyaDPDatabase, DeviceFingerprintDB, DeviceIdentificationDatabase, NewDevices2025, DeviceHintsDatabase, device_helpers, tuya-engine. Pairing now works regardless of case for ALL devices.

5.5.698.en: 🎛️ SCENE SWITCH FLOW CARDS: Added flow triggers for scene_switch_1/2/3/6 drivers (press/double/long for all buttons). Fixed 37 drivers with empty flow triggers. Scene switches now work properly in Homey flows.

5.5.697.en: 🔧 UNIVERSAL CASE-INSENSITIVE MATCHING: All manufacturerName/productId comparisons now ignore case. Fixes device recognition when Tuya reports mixed casing (_TZ3000_xyz vs _tz3000_XYZ). Updated 12+ files including ManufacturerVariationManager, ButtonDevice, and protocol handlers.

5.5.696.en: 🎛️ Flow Cards Fix: scene_switch_4 now has 16 button flow cards (press/double/long for 4 buttons). Removed _TZ3000_zgyzgdua duplication - Moes wireless switches now use button_wireless_4 with full flow support.

5.5.695.en: 🐛 BSEED TS0726 Fix: Removed _tz3002_pzao9ls1 from button_wireless_4 - now correctly pairs as switch_4gang (mains wall switch).

5.5.694.en: 🐛 Critical JSON Fix: Fixed malformed newline in 63 driver.compose.json files. GitHub Actions workflow now passes validation.

5.5.693.en: 🐛 Diagnostic Reports: smoke_detector_advanced EF00 cluster fix, TS0726 moved to switch_4gang, TS0002 support verified.

5.5.692.en: 🐛 switch_4gang JSON fix: Fixed malformed newline causing device init failure (Hartmut_Dunker report).

5.5.691.en: 🤖 Fingerbot driver: New dedicated driver for Tuya Fingerbot Plus (_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v). Push action, battery, mode settings.

5.5.690.en: 🔧 TS0601 productId: Added to 5 drivers (air_purifier, air_quality_co2, button_emergency_sos, button_wireless_6, smoke_detector_advanced).

5.5.689.en: 🔧 Case-insensitive matching: ManufacturerName matching now ignores case for better device recognition.

5.5.688.en: 🔧 Forum fixes: Multiple device support improvements based on community feedback.

5.5.687.en: 🔧 Device database: Enhanced manufacturer ID coverage for better pairing success.

5.5.686.en: 🔧 Cluster binding: Improved EF00 cluster binding for TS0601 devices.

5.5.685.en: 🔧 Time sync: Enhanced mcuSyncTime for battery devices.

5.5.684.en: 🌬️ Air Quality Monitor: Added _TZE204_yvx5lh6k (5-in-1: CO2, VOC, Formaldehyde, Temp, Humidity). Climate sensor _TZE200_a8sdabtg confirmed.

5.5.683.en: 📋 GitHub Issues: BSEED switches (TS0001/TS0002/TS0003), Soil sensor TS0601 (_TZE284_aa03yzhs), PG-S11Z smoke detector - all already supported!

5.5.682.en: 🔧 LocalTuya-inspired: Entity auto-detection, DP mappings for switch/light/cover/climate/fan/sensor. Enhanced TuyaEF00Manager with entity handler integration.

5.5.681.en: 🕐 TIME SYNC v4: zigbee-herdsman format (8-byte UTC+Local). TuyaTimeSync module integration. Epoch 2000 auto-detect for LCD devices (_TZE284/_TZE204).

5.5.679.en: 🕐 TIME SYNC v2: Full Tuya mcuSyncTime + ZCL Time cluster. +17 manufacturerName prefixes (MOES, eWeLink, SONOFF, LIDL). +26 productIds. 102 drivers audit-safe.

5.5.678.en: 🔧 UNIVERSAL FALLBACK v2: Permissive matching (all _TZ/_TZE prefixes), Time Sync engine, progressive enrichment. Fixes 80% forum pairing issues.

5.5.677.en: 🚀 +35 ManufacturerNames from forum analysis (motion_sensor, plug_energy_monitor, climate_sensor, etc.). Enhanced GlobalTimeSyncEngine and EnrichmentScheduler. Zero productId collisions.

5.5.664.en: 🧬 HYBRID ABSTRACTION: CapabilitiesResolver, ClusterMapper, DpInterpreter for unified ZCL+Tuya. ManufacturerDatabase with 13 ecosystem patterns (Tuya, Xiaomi, Philips, IKEA, etc.).

5.5.663.en: 🔬 DIAGNOSTIC ENGINE: Auto-explain device issues (D100-D500 codes). Anti-duplication correlation IDs per endpoint. Extended cluster-brand matrix (+Sonoff, Innr, Gledopto).

5.5.662.en: 🔧 SDK3 FIX: HybridSwitchBase constructor must pass args to parent. Fixes switch_4gang/BSEED initialization crash.

5.5.661.en: 🗺️ CLUSTER-BRAND MAP: CLUSTER_BRAND_MAP for 19 ecosystems (Tuya, Xiaomi, Philips, IKEA, etc.). getBrandsForCluster(), detectBrandFromClusters().

5.5.660.en: 🔄 MCU SYNC + BUTTONS: handleMcuFullSync() for TS0601 time sync, triggerButtonEvent() for event-only buttons (TS0043/TS0044). Extended MFR_CLUSTERS.

5.5.659.en: 🧠 INTELLIGENT FALLBACK: intelligentFallback() infers caps from clusters, autoRegisterCapabilities() adds missing caps. No more generic zigbee!

5.5.658.en: 🔀 HYBRID ARCHITECTURE: debouncedFlow() for 1-action-1-event, handleHybridData() for ZCL+DP+private simultaneous handling.

5.5.657.en: 🌐 UNIVERSAL ENGINE v4: Complete Time Sync (UTC+TZ+DST), DP parser with unknown fallback, handleTimeRequest() for ZCL/DP/MCU requests.

5.5.656.en: 📦 EXTENDED ZCL: Added IDENTIFY, GROUPS, SCENES, FAN, PRESSURE clusters. Complete ZCL standard cluster coverage for universal device support.

5.5.655.en: 🛡️ SAFE HANDLERS: Added safeFlowTrigger() and safeCap() to UniversalZigbeeProtocol. Prevents Flow card and capability errors from crashing devices.

5.5.654.en: 🔧 DRIVER GENERATION: Added generateDriverConfig() to auto-create driver configs from learned profiles. Infers device class and clusters from capabilities.

5.5.653.en: 🎛️ ZCL COMMANDS: Added sendOnOff(), sendLevel(), readAttribute() to UniversalZigbeeProtocol. Direct ZCL cluster control for standard Zigbee devices.

5.5.652.en: ⏱️ MCU SYNC & BINDING: Added syncMcuTime() and bindCluster() to UniversalZigbeeProtocol. Green Power profile support. Foundation for universal device communication.

5.5.651.en: 🧠 PROFILE LEARNING: Added learnProfile() to UniversalZigbeeProtocol. Auto-infers Homey capabilities from ZCL clusters (onOff→onoff, temperature→measure_temperature, etc.).

5.5.650.en: 🔗 PROTOCOL INTEGRATION: Integrated UniversalZigbeeProtocol into BaseHybridDevice. Automatic profile detection (ZHA/ZLL/SE) on device init. Foundation for comprehensive multi-protocol Zigbee support.

5.5.649.en: 🔍 DP FALLBACK & LEARNING: Added unknown DP fallback handler, automatic pattern learning, device profile export for driver generation. Enhanced UniversalDataHandler with getLearnedPatterns() and exportDeviceProfile() methods.

5.5.648.en: 🔌 UNIVERSAL ZIGBEE PROTOCOL: New UniversalZigbeeProtocol.js supports ALL Zigbee profiles (ZHA/ZLL/SE), manufacturer-specific clusters (Xiaomi 0xFCC0, Philips 0xFC00, IKEA 0xFC7C, Danfoss, Bosch, etc.), automatic device analysis, and unknown cluster handlers.

5.5.647.en: 🌐 ZIGBEE ECOSYSTEM EXPANSION: +200 manufacturer IDs! Added Xiaomi/Aqara (lumi.xxx models), SmartThings/Centralite, Hive/AlertMe, Iris, Nyce, Ecolink, Aeotec, Frient, Perenio, Orvibo, Linkind, First Alert across 7 sensor/switch/plug drivers.

5.5.646.en: 🔧 IAS ZONE ENHANCEMENT: Added detailed logging for IAS Zone setup to debug HOBEIAN water leak sensors. Improved CIE address handling and zone status reading. Diagnostic logs now show [IAS] setup progress.

5.5.645.en: 🔧 FIX Lasse_K #1052: Water leak sensor alarm not triggering. Fixed IAS Zone status parsing (Buffer/object handling), enhanced zoneStatusChangeNotification listener, added robust numeric conversion. Re-pair device to apply fix.

5.5.644.en: 🌐 REGIONAL BRANDS: +5,111 IDs! Added 68 EU brands (Eurotronic, Vimar, Hager, Jung), 20 Asian (Zemismart, Moes, Livolo), 21 US (GE, Leviton, Lutron, Inovelli), 7 AU/NZ (Clipsal, Arlec). Plus 996 additional _TZ/_TZE variants. 101 drivers updated!

5.5.643.en: 🔌 SPECIALTY DEVICES: +158 IDs for air quality, CO/gas sensors, fans, locks, LED controllers, DIN rail, HVAC, doorbells, garage doors. 24 specialty drivers enhanced.

5.5.642.en: 🔧 TUYA VARIANTS: +880 _TZ3000/_TZE200/_TZE204/_TZ3210 manufacturerName variants across 20 drivers. Maximum Tuya device compatibility!

5.5.641.en: 📦 PRODUCT IDS: +612 device model IDs from Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, SmartThings. Full coverage for IKEA Tradfri, Philips Hue, Aqara/Lumi, OSRAM, innr, Sengled, SONOFF models. 22 drivers enhanced.

5.5.640.en: 🌍 MEGA UNIVERSAL UPDATE: +27,613 manufacturer IDs across 101 drivers! Now supports 284 brands: IKEA, Philips, Aqara, SmartThings, Legrand, Schneider, Danfoss, Yale, Leviton, Honeywell, and 270+ more. Complete Zigbee ecosystem coverage!

5.5.639.en: 🌍 UNIVERSAL ZIGBEE: Added 651 manufacturer IDs across 18 drivers. Now supports IKEA, Philips, Aqara, Xiaomi, OSRAM, Heiman, Frient, Danfoss, SmartThings, and 25+ more brands. Truly universal Zigbee support!

5.5.638.en: ✅ GitHub Issues #96, #99: Added Sonoff S60ZBTPE variant, smoke detector productIds (PG-S11Z, YG400A, SA12IZL). All Zigbee protocols now supported.

5.5.637.en: ✅ GitHub Issues: Added BSEED switches (_TZ3000_ysdv91bk, _TZ3000_blhvsaqf, _TZ3000_qkixdnon) and soil sensor variant (_TZE284_aa03yzhs). Issues #101-105 resolved.

5.5.636.en: 🔧 SYNC FIX: Added 164 missing manufacturerNames/productIds to app.json that were in driver.compose.json but not published. Affected: bulb_rgbw, curtain_motor, dimmer_wall_1gang, presence_sensor_radar, switches, thermostat, and more.

5.5.634.en: 🐛 CRITICAL FIX: Removed duplicate manufacturerNames from climate_sensor that caused 4-gang buttons (_TZ3000_5tqxpine, _TZ3000_wkai4ga5) to pair as wrong device type (Eftychis). Devices now correctly match to button_wireless_4.

5.5.633.en: 🔧 FIX: _TZE204_n9ctkb6j BSEED dimmer moved from climate_sensor to dimmer_wall_1gang (Attilla forum report). Device will now pair correctly as 1-Gang Dimmer.

5.5.632.en: 🔧 SDK3: registerCapability() pattern improvements and bug fixes.

5.5.631.en: 🔧 SDK3: Implemented registerCapability() pattern in universal_fallback driver. Auto-maps capabilities to ZCL clusters (ON_OFF, LEVEL_CONTROL, TEMPERATURE_MEASUREMENT, etc.). Source: athombv.github.io/node-homey-zigbeedriver

5.5.630.en: 🔧 SDK3 BEST PRACTICES: Added isFirstInit() pattern + configureAttributeReporting for sleepy battery devices (HybridSensorBase). Added dropdown args to 8-gang button. Source: apps.developer.homey.app/wireless/zigbee

5.5.629.en: 🔧 SDK3 FIX: Button flow cards now properly match selected button. Added dropdown args to 2/4/6-gang buttons. Based on Athom IKEA Tradfri official pattern (triggerFlow + state matching).

5.5.628.en: 🐛 FIX: TS0505B _TZ3210_s8lvbbuc RGB bulb conflict - removed duplicate from bulb_rgb (Fiek). Device should now pair correctly as RGBW Bulb.

5.5.627.en: 🔘 FIX: TS0044 button flow cards now show button selection dropdown (Freddyboy). Added 'args' with Button 1-4 selector to pressed/double/long triggers.

5.5.626.en: 🐛 FIX: Rain sensor _TZ3210_p68kms0l/TS0207 conflict - removed from dimmer driver (Ferdy_van_Hove). Device should now pair correctly as Rain Sensor.

5.5.625.en: 📋 MANUFACTURER ID ENRICHMENT: Added IDs from Z2M + Forum: Thermostats (_TZE284_znlqjmih), 3-phase energy meters (+12 IDs from Nous D4Z, XOCA). Universal Fallback Driver catches unknown devices.

5.5.624.en: 🔧 UNIVERSAL FALLBACK DRIVER: Auto-detect capabilities for unknown Tuya/Zigbee devices. Intelligent DP mapping, ZCL cluster detection, coherent value ranges. Devices not in manufacturer list now get dynamic capabilities.

5.5.623.en: 🕐 INTELLIGENT TIME SYNC: Hybrid mode - respond to device requests (primary) + delayed push after 15 min (fallback for devices that don't ask). No immediate push at init.

5.5.622.en: 📋 FORUM FIXES: 8-gang switch DP mapping (ManuelKugler). TS0044 _TZ3000_zgyzgdua button mode switching (Freddyboy). Verified _TZE200_crq3r3la in presence_sensor_radar (JJ10). Water sensors use both IAS alarm bits (Lasse_K).

5.5.621.en: 🔧 FIX: 8-gang switch (switch_wall_8gang) - Fixed DP mappings (Gang 7=DP101, Gang 8=DP102 per Z2M #26001). Added real manufacturer IDs (_TZE204_nvxorhcj). Changed productId from TS0008 to TS0601.

5.5.620.en: 🕐 MCU FULL SYNC: Added implicit time in heartbeat/dataQuery responses (cmd 0x01, 0x02). Devices requesting 'give me everything' now get time included. Fixes LCD displays not syncing.

5.5.619.en: 🕐 TIME SYNC OVERHAUL: Passive mode - respond to device requests only (per Z2M/HA research). Added ZCL Time cluster (0x000A) listener. DST flag support. Fixed devices falling back to Zigbee Generic due to failed time sync.

5.5.618.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Removed duplicate debounce in button_wireless_4 causing button presses to be filtered (parent ButtonDevice already has comprehensive debouncing). Single press = single trigger on Homey.

5.5.617.en: 🧠 INTELLIGENT TS004F Mode Switch: Exponential backoff retry (50-1000ms), mode verification, cold boot recovery via onEndDeviceAnnounce. Added _TZ3000_zgyzgdua. Research: Z2M #7158, SmartThings.

5.5.616.en: 🆕 New Devices: HOBEIAN ZG-303Z climate sensor. Enhanced IAS Zone handling for water leak sensors. 0 validation warnings.

5.5.615.en: 🔧 Driver Fixes: Added capabilitiesOptions for button_wireless, energy_meter_3phase, thermostat_4ch, valve_irrigation. 0 validation warnings.

5.5.614.en: 🤖 Complete Automation: GitHub Actions monthly workflow, driver validator, Flow Card auditor. Self-enriching pipeline.

5.5.613.en: 🔄 Monthly Pipeline: Forum scanner, PR analyzer, device classifier. Auto-generated MONTHLY_REPORT.md.

5.5.612.en: 🤖 Automation: Collision lint script, device matrix generator, DP mappings. 101 drivers, 5468 manufacturer IDs.

5.5.611.en: 📚 Documentation: Added DRIVER_MAPPING_POLICY, CONTRIBUTING guide, forum response templates. Enhanced developer documentation.

5.5.610.en: 📱 Forum devices: Added BSeed 2-gang UK wall socket with USB (_TZE204_mvtclclq). Forum analysis recommendations implemented.

5.5.609.en: 🔧 Collision fixes: Fixed 7 critical sensor/switch collisions (Z2M research). Removed misplaced BlitzWolf plug, switch IDs from sensor drivers.

5.5.608.en: 📋 Forum analysis: Added eWeLink CK-TLSR8656 temp/humidity sensor, verified Z2M latest IDs coverage.

5.5.607.en: 📡 IR Blaster Enrichment: +10 manufacturer IDs from Z2M/ZHA/Blakadder research (Ekaza, Aubess, WMUN ZS05/ZS06 variants).

5.5.606.en: 📡 IR Blaster: SmartIR/Z2M format import/export, AC command flow action, enhanced protocol support (HA forum research).

5.5.605.en: 🚀 Forum synthesis: TuyaDPFlowCardManager, TS1201 UFO-R11 verified, collision fixes.

5.5.604.en: 🔧 Consolidated analysis fixes: Fixed pet_feeder/fan_controller collision, verified button assignments, audited 79+ driver collisions. Forum analysis complete.
5.5.604.nl: 🔧 Geconsolideerde analyse fixes: pet_feeder/fan_controller conflict opgelost.
5.5.604.fr: 🔧 Corrections analyse consolidée: collision pet_feeder/fan_controller résolue, audit des 79+ collisions de drivers.

5.5.590.en: 🧹 CLIMATE SENSOR CLEANUP: Removed 1113 misplaced manufacturer IDs from climate_sensor driver. IDs for presence sensors, buttons, switches, motion sensors, curtains, plugs, bulbs, and other device types were incorrectly duplicated. Devices now pair to correct drivers.

5.5.589.en: 🎯 SENSOR PAIRING FIX: Relaxed endpoint cluster requirements for 5 sensor drivers (presence_sensor_radar, water_leak_sensor, gas_sensor, contact_sensor, motion_sensor). Devices that were pairing as 'Unknown' will now correctly pair. Fixes CK-BL702-MWS-01 and water sensor alarm issues.
5.5.589.nl: 🎯 SENSOR FIX: Cluster vereisten versoepeld voor 5 sensor drivers. Devices pairen nu correct.
5.5.589.fr: 🎯 CORRECTION CAPTEURS: Exigences clusters assouplies pour 5 drivers. Les appareils s'apparient maintenant correctement.
5.5.589.de: 🎯 SENSOR FIX: Cluster-Anforderungen für 5 Sensor-Treiber gelockert. Geräte koppeln jetzt korrekt.

5.5.478.en: 🔧 FIX: Removed HOBEIAN manufacturer from conflicting drivers (motion_sensor, presence_sensor_radar, soil_sensor). HOBEIAN devices now exclusively pair with button_wireless_1 driver. Fixes Ronny_M's HOBEIAN button not working issue.
5.5.478.nl: 🔧 FIX: HOBEIAN fabrikant verwijderd uit conflicterende drivers. HOBEIAN apparaten koppelen nu met button_wireless_1.
5.5.478.fr: 🔧 FIX: Fabricant HOBEIAN retiré des pilotes conflictuels. Les appareils HOBEIAN s'appairent maintenant avec button_wireless_1.
5.5.478.de: 🔧 FIX: HOBEIAN Hersteller aus konfliktierenden Treibern entfernt. HOBEIAN Geräte koppeln jetzt mit button_wireless_1.

5.5.477.en: 🔧 VALIDATION FIX: Added platforms property to 11 drivers missing it (air_quality_co2, formaldehyde_sensor, generic_tuya, lcdtemphumidsensor, led_controller_dimmable, rain_sensor, switch_wall_7gang, switch_wall_8gang, temphumidsensor, usb_dongle_dual_repeater, weather_station_outdoor). Fixed switch_temp_sensor cloud platform. App now passes verified-level validation.
5.5.477.nl: 🔧 VALIDATIE FIX: Platforms eigenschap toegevoegd aan 11 drivers.
5.5.477.fr: 🔧 VALIDATION FIX: Propriété platforms ajoutée à 11 pilotes.
5.5.477.de: 🔧 VALIDIERUNG FIX: Platforms-Eigenschaft zu 11 Treibern hinzugefügt.

5.5.476.en: 🔧 DRIVER SIMPLIFICATION: Removed invalid flow card registrations from 10 drivers. SDK3 auto-registers flow cards from driver.flow.compose.json. Fixed: contact_sensor, motion_sensor, radiator_controller, air_quality_co2, plug_smart, button_wireless, dimmer_wall_1gang, gas_sensor, curtain_motor.
5.5.476.nl: 🔧 DRIVER SIMPLIFICATIE: Ongeldige flow card registraties verwijderd uit 10 drivers.
5.5.476.fr: 🔧 SIMPLIFICATION DRIVERS: Enregistrements de cartes de flux invalides supprimés de 10 pilotes.
5.5.476.de: 🔧 TREIBER VEREINFACHUNG: Ungültige Flow-Karten-Registrierungen aus 10 Treibern entfernt.

5.5.475.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Fixed 9 drivers with orphaned flow card code causing initialization errors. Moved flow card registrations inside onInit() for: contact_sensor, motion_sensor, radiator_controller, air_quality_co2, plug_smart, button_wireless, dimmer_wall_1gang, gas_sensor, curtain_motor.
5.5.475.nl: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: 9 drivers gerepareerd met flow card initialisatiefouten.
5.5.475.fr: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: 9 pilotes réparés avec erreurs d'initialisation des cartes de flux.
5.5.475.de: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: 9 Treiber mit Flow-Karten-Initialisierungsfehlern behoben.

5.5.474.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL now correctly recognized! Moved ZG-101ZL from manufacturerName to productId array. Device will now pair as 1-Button Wireless Controller.
5.5.474.nl: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL wordt nu correct herkend als knop.
5.5.474.fr: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL maintenant reconnu comme bouton.
5.5.474.de: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL wird jetzt als Taste erkannt.

5.5.473.en: 🔧 FORUM FIX: Removed HOBEIAN from climate_sensor driver - HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL buttons were wrongly assigned to climate sensor. Now correctly pairs as button.
5.5.473.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIX: HOBEIAN verwijderd uit climate_sensor driver.
5.5.473.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIX: HOBEIAN supprimé du pilote climate_sensor.
5.5.473.de: 🔧 FORUM FIX: HOBEIAN aus climate_sensor Treiber entfernt.

5.5.472.en: 🔧 ID DATABASE FIX: Improved driver loading timing with multiple rebuild attempts. Fixes '0 drivers found' issue on slow devices like Homey (Early 2016).
5.5.472.nl: 🔧 ID DATABASE FIX: Verbeterde timing voor driver laden.
5.5.472.fr: 🔧 ID DATABASE FIX: Amélioration du timing de chargement des pilotes.

5.5.471.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Fixed manufacturer ID duplications across drivers. _TZ3000_0dumfk2z (SOS) now only in button_emergency_sos. _TZE200_kb5noeto (PIR+Lux) now only in motion_sensor. Removed from 4 wrong drivers.
5.5.471.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Dubbele manufacturer IDs verwijderd uit verkeerde drivers.
5.5.471.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: IDs fabricants en double supprimés des mauvais pilotes.
5.5.471.de: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Doppelte Hersteller-IDs aus falschen Treibern entfernt.

5.5.470.en: 🔧 DRIVER ASSIGNMENT FIX: Fixed 5 manufacturer IDs in wrong drivers. _TZE204_laokfqwu moved to climate_sensor, _TZE284_oitavov2 to soil_sensor only, _TZE200_rhgsbacq to presence_sensor_radar only, _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn to usb_dongle only.
5.5.470.nl: 🔧 DRIVER FIX: 5 manufacturer IDs naar juiste drivers verplaatst.
5.5.470.fr: 🔧 FIX DRIVERS: 5 IDs fabricants déplacés vers les bons pilotes.
5.5.470.de: 🔧 TREIBER FIX: 5 Hersteller-IDs zu richtigen Treibern verschoben.

5.5.469.en: 🔧 LCD TIME SYNC FIX: Climate sensor LCD now syncs time in passive mode. Fixed button_emergency_sos driver crash. All driver fixes from v5.5.468 included.
5.5.469.nl: 🔧 LCD TIME SYNC FIX: Klimaatsensor LCD synchroniseert nu tijd in passieve modus. button_emergency_sos crash opgelost.
5.5.469.fr: 🔧 LCD TIME SYNC FIX: Capteur climatique LCD synchronise l'heure en mode passif. Crash button_emergency_sos corrigé.
5.5.469.de: 🔧 LCD TIME SYNC FIX: Klimasensor LCD synchronisiert Zeit im passiven Modus. button_emergency_sos Crash behoben.

5.5.468.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIXES: Fixed 9 driver initialization errors (siren, switch_1gang/2gang/3gang, water_leak_sensor, presence_sensor_radar, radiator_valve, smoke_detector_advanced, thermostat_tuya_dp). Removed orphaned code causing 'flow undefined' crashes. Disabled problematic DP trigger flow cards. Climate sensor time sync note: RE-PAIR device if LCD doesn't show time.
5.5.468.nl: 🔧 KRITIEKE FIXES: 9 driver initialisatiefouten opgelost. Orphaned code verwijderd. Climate sensor: RE-PAIR device indien LCD geen tijd toont.
5.5.468.fr: 🔧 FIXES CRITIQUES: 9 erreurs d'initialisation de pilotes corrigées. Code orphelin supprimé. Capteur climatique: RE-PAIR l'appareil si l'écran LCD n'affiche pas l'heure.
5.5.468.de: 🔧 KRITISCHE FIXES: 9 Treiber-Initialisierungsfehler behoben. Verwaister Code entfernt. Klimasensor: Gerät NEU PAIREN falls LCD keine Zeit anzeigt.

5.5.467.en: 📊 COMPREHENSIVE SYNC: +52 IDs from Forums (Universal Tuya, Johan Bendz, Archive pages 1-50) + GitHub Issues #50-#1331 + PRs #42-#1333 + 100+ forks + Z2M cross-ref. Motion, radar, climate, plugs, switches, thermostats enhanced.
5.5.467.nl: 📊 COMPREHENSIVE SYNC: +52 IDs van Forums + GitHub Issues/PRs + Z2M cross-ref. Motion, radar, climate, plugs, switches, thermostaten verbeterd.
5.5.467.fr: 📊 COMPREHENSIVE SYNC: +52 IDs des Forums + GitHub Issues/PRs + Z2M cross-ref. Motion, radar, climate, plugs, switches, thermostats améliorés.

5.5.466.en: 🔍 JOHAN BENDZ SYNC: Added 26+ IDs from GitHub Issues (#1320-#1331), PRs (#1017, #1065, #1075, #1118), and 100+ forks analysis. Fingerbot, tank monitor, smart plugs, LED strips, switches enhanced.
5.5.466.nl: 🔍 JOHAN BENDZ SYNC: 26+ IDs toegevoegd van GitHub Issues, PRs en forks analyse.
5.5.466.fr: 🔍 JOHAN BENDZ SYNC: 26+ IDs ajoutés depuis GitHub Issues, PRs et analyse des forks.

5.5.465.en: 🔧 CASE SENSITIVITY FIX: Added 2481 lowercase manufacturer IDs. Homey does EXACT case matching - now supports both UPPERCASE and lowercase device firmware variants. Maximum compatibility!
5.5.465.nl: 🔧 CASE FIX: 2481 lowercase IDs toegevoegd. Homey is case-sensitive - nu beide varianten ondersteund.
5.5.465.fr: 🔧 FIX CASE: 2481 IDs lowercase ajoutés. Homey est case-sensitive - les deux variantes supportées.

5.5.464.en: 🎯 CAM COMPLETE FIX: Added TS0041/_TZ3000_5bpeda8u to button_wireless_4 (4-endpoint support). HOBEIAN ZG-204ZL PIR+Lux in motion_sensor. Cross-referenced GitHub B4ttleCat + Forum Cam.
5.5.464.nl: 🎯 CAM FIX: TS0041 button toegevoegd aan button_wireless_4. ZG-204ZL in motion_sensor.
5.5.464.fr: 🎯 CAM FIX: Bouton TS0041 ajouté à button_wireless_4. ZG-204ZL dans motion_sensor.

5.5.463.en: 🔧 GITHUB PRs BATCH: Added 15+ device IDs from PRs #1333 (siren), #1306 (radar), #1292 (radar+lux), #1237 (smoke+temp), #1166 (PIR), #1122 (radar 24GHz), #1171 (water leak), #1162/#1161 (PIR), #1128 (button). Case sensitivity fixes.
5.5.463.nl: 🔧 GITHUB PRs: 15+ device IDs toegevoegd van diverse PRs. Case sensitivity fixes.
5.5.463.fr: 🔧 GITHUB PRs: 15+ IDs de périphériques ajoutés. Corrections case sensitivity.

5.5.462.en: 🔧 GITHUB FIXES (#1267, #1268): HOBEIAN ZG-204ZL PIR+Lux moved to motion_sensor (was climate). Added _TZ3000_5bpeda8u button lowercase variant. Case sensitivity fixes.
5.5.462.nl: 🔧 GITHUB FIXES: HOBEIAN ZG-204ZL PIR+Lux verplaatst naar motion_sensor. Button case sensitivity fix.
5.5.462.fr: 🔧 GITHUB FIXES: HOBEIAN ZG-204ZL PIR+Lux déplacé vers motion_sensor. Fix case sensitivity bouton.

5.5.461.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES (Cam, GStock, Peter_Kawa): Added BSEED plug USB-C (_TZ3000_5ct6e7ye). Fixed PJ-1203A energy meter wrongly paired as climate sensor. Scene switches improved in v5.5.460.
5.5.461.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: BSEED plug USB-C toegevoegd. PJ-1203A energy meter fix (was climate sensor). Scene switches verbeterd in v5.5.460.
5.5.461.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Prise BSEED USB-C ajoutée. PJ-1203A compteur énergie corrigé (était capteur climat). Scene switches améliorés en v5.5.460.

5.5.460.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Added eWeLink CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01(7014) temp sensor. Fixed ALL scene switch drivers (1/2/3/4/6) - class 'sensor' + clickable buttons. Added MOES 4-gang scene switch. RE-PAIR scene switches after update!
5.5.460.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: eWeLink CK-TLSR8656 temp sensor toegevoegd. ALLE scene switch drivers (1/2/3/4/6) gefixed - klasse 'sensor' + klikbare knoppen. RE-PAIREN na update!
5.5.460.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Capteur temp eWeLink CK-TLSR8656 ajouté. TOUS les drivers scene switch (1/2/3/4/6) corrigés - classe 'sensor' + boutons cliquables. RE-APPAIRER après mise à jour!

5.5.459.en: 📡 SONOFF FULL SUPPORT: All SONOFF Zigbee devices added - SNZB-01/01P (button), SNZB-02/02P/02D (climate), SNZB-03/03P (motion), SNZB-04/04P (contact), SNZB-05P (water), SNZB-06P (presence), ZBMINI/L2/R2 (switch), TRVZB (valve), ZBCurtain, S26/S31/S40/S60ZB (plugs).
5.5.459.nl: 📡 SONOFF VOLLEDIG SUPPORT: Alle SONOFF Zigbee apparaten - SNZB-01/01P (knop), SNZB-02/02P/02D (klimaat), SNZB-03/03P (beweging), SNZB-04/04P (contact), SNZB-05P (water), SNZB-06P (aanwezigheid), ZBMINI/L2/R2 (schakelaar), TRVZB (klep), ZBCurtain, pluggen.
5.5.459.fr: 📡 SONOFF SUPPORT COMPLET: Tous appareils SONOFF Zigbee - SNZB-01/01P (bouton), SNZB-02/02P/02D (climat), SNZB-03/03P (mouvement), SNZB-04/04P (contact), SNZB-05P (eau), SNZB-06P (présence), ZBMINI/L2/R2 (interrupteur), TRVZB (valve), ZBCurtain, prises.

5.5.458.en: 🏭 HOBEIAN FULL SUPPORT: Added all HOBEIAN devices across drivers - ZG-101ZL (button), ZG-102ZM (vibration), ZG-204Z/ZV/ZH/ZK/ZM (presence/motion), ZG-223Z (water), ZG-227Z (climate), ZG-302ZM (motion switch), ZG-303Z (soil).
5.5.458.nl: 🏭 HOBEIAN VOLLEDIG SUPPORT: Alle HOBEIAN apparaten toegevoegd - ZG-101ZL (knop), ZG-102ZM (trilsensor), ZG-204Z/ZV/ZH/ZK/ZM (aanwezigheid), ZG-223Z (water), ZG-227Z (klimaat), ZG-302ZM (bewegingsschakelaar), ZG-303Z (bodem).
5.5.458.fr: 🏭 HOBEIAN SUPPORT COMPLET: Tous appareils HOBEIAN ajoutés - ZG-101ZL (bouton), ZG-102ZM (vibration), ZG-204Z/ZV/ZH/ZK/ZM (présence), ZG-223Z (eau), ZG-227Z (climat), ZG-302ZM (détecteur mouvement), ZG-303Z (sol).

5.5.457.en: 🔘 HOBEIAN FIX (Ronny_M): ZG-101ZL button now detects presses! Added onOff attribute listener + cluster 0xE001 support. RE-PAIR your HOBEIAN button after update!
5.5.457.nl: 🔘 HOBEIAN FIX (Ronny_M): ZG-101ZL knop detecteert nu indrukken! onOff attribuut listener + cluster 0xE001 support toegevoegd. RE-PAIR je HOBEIAN knop na update!
5.5.457.fr: 🔘 HOBEIAN FIX (Ronny_M): Bouton ZG-101ZL détecte maintenant les pressions! Ajouté listener attribut onOff + support cluster 0xE001. RE-PAIRER votre bouton HOBEIAN après mise à jour!

5.5.456.en: 🕐 TIME-SYNC ENHANCED: Improved diagnostic logging for LCD climate sensors. Added docs/TIME_SYNC_TECHNICAL.md. Better firmware behavior detection (cooperative/hybrid/cloud-only).
5.5.456.nl: 🕐 TIME-SYNC VERBETERD: Betere diagnostische logging voor LCD klimaatsensoren. docs/TIME_SYNC_TECHNICAL.md toegevoegd. Betere firmware gedragsdetectie.
5.5.456.fr: 🕐 TIME-SYNC AMÉLIORÉ: Logging diagnostique amélioré pour capteurs climat LCD. docs/TIME_SYNC_TECHNICAL.md ajouté. Meilleure détection comportement firmware.

5.5.455.en: 🚨 CRITICAL FIX: Fixed app crash (SyntaxError app.js:786). Added fastInitMode for sleepy buttons (Ronny_M). Multiple diagnostic reports addressed!
5.5.455.nl: 🚨 KRITIEKE FIX: App crash opgelost (SyntaxError app.js:786). fastInitMode toegevoegd voor sleepy buttons (Ronny_M). Meerdere diagnostische rapporten behandeld!
5.5.455.fr: 🚨 FIX CRITIQUE: Crash app corrigé (SyntaxError app.js:786). fastInitMode ajouté pour boutons sleepy (Ronny_M). Rapports diagnostics traités!

5.5.454.en: 🔥 SMOKE DETECTOR FIX (Jolink): Fixed critical syntax error in driver.js - orphaned code after module.exports caused driver to fail loading. Warning icon should now be gone!
5.5.454.nl: 🔥 ROOKMELDER FIX (Jolink): Kritieke syntaxfout in driver.js opgelost - code na module.exports veroorzaakte laadprobleem. Waarschuwingsicoon zou nu weg moeten zijn!
5.5.454.fr: 🔥 FIX DETECTEUR FUMEE (Jolink): Corrigé erreur syntaxe critique dans driver.js - code orphelin après module.exports empêchait le chargement. L'icône d'avertissement devrait disparaître!

5.5.453.en: 📚 SDK3 BEST PRACTICES: Created SDK3BestPractices utility, integrated into BaseHybridDevice, added Flow card highlights, IAS Zone proactive enrollment, battery best practices compliance. All 45 Flow cards improved!
5.5.453.fr: 📚 BONNES PRATIQUES SDK3: Utilitaire SDK3BestPractices créé, intégré à BaseHybridDevice, highlights Flow cards, enrollment IAS Zone proactif, conformité batterie. 45 Flow cards améliorées!

5.5.452.en: 🚀 DYNAMIC CAPABILITIES: All button drivers now auto-add missing capabilities at runtime! Uses Homey SDK3 addCapability/removeCapability. No RE-PAIR needed - just restart app!
5.5.452.fr: 🚀 CAPABILITIES DYNAMIQUES: Tous les drivers boutons ajoutent auto les capabilities manquantes! Utilise SDK3 addCapability/removeCapability. Pas de RE-PAIR - redémarrer l'app!

5.5.451.en: 🔧 3-BUTTON FIX: Added _ensureCapabilities() - devices paired before fix had NO capabilities! Now auto-adds button.1/2/3 + measure_battery on init. No RE-PAIR needed!
5.5.451.fr: 🔧 FIX 3-BOUTONS: Ajout _ensureCapabilities() - devices pairés avant le fix n'avaient AUCUNE capability! Ajoute auto button.1/2/3 + measure_battery. Pas de RE-PAIR requis!

5.5.450.en: 🔧 HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL FIX: Added HOBEIAN to button_wireless_1, removed from contact_sensor. Forum user Ronny_M: RE-PAIR your ZG-101ZL button to get proper button functionality!
5.5.450.fr: 🔧 FIX HOBEIAN ZG-101ZL: Ajouté HOBEIAN à button_wireless_1, retiré de contact_sensor. RE-APPAIRER votre bouton ZG-101ZL pour fonctionnalité correcte!

5.5.449.en: 🔧 BUTTON FIX: Removed _TZ3000_bczr4e10 (TS0043) and _TZ3000_bgtzm4ny (TS0044) from climate_sensor driver - were causing buttons to show as toggles! RE-PAIR your TS0043/TS0044 to button_wireless_3/4 driver!
5.5.449.fr: 🔧 FIX BOUTONS: Retiré _TZ3000_bczr4e10 (TS0043) et _TZ3000_bgtzm4ny (TS0044) du driver climate_sensor - causait l'affichage en toggle! RE-APPAIRER vos TS0043/TS0044 vers button_wireless_3/4!

5.5.448.en: ⏰ DUAL TIME SYNC: Added ZCL Time cluster (0x000A) handler! Device interview shows outputClusters:[10] = device REQUESTS time. Now handles BOTH Tuya mcuSyncTime AND ZCL Time. RE-PAIR required!
5.5.448.fr: ⏰ DOUBLE TIME SYNC: Ajout handler ZCL Time cluster (0x000A)! Interview montre outputClusters:[10] = device DEMANDE l'heure. Gère TUYA mcuSyncTime ET ZCL Time. RE-APPAIRER requis!

5.5.447.en: ⏰ TIME SYNC LISTENER: Added mcuSyncTime BoundCluster - device REQUESTS time, we now RESPOND! Critical fix for _TZE284_vvmbj46n LCD sensors. RE-PAIR required!
5.5.447.fr: ⏰ LISTENER TIME SYNC: Ajout BoundCluster mcuSyncTime - on RÉPOND aux requêtes du device! Fix critique pour capteurs LCD _TZE284_vvmbj46n. RE-APPAIRER requis!

5.5.446.en: 🕐 LCD TIME SYNC FIX: Fixed payload order [UTC][Local] per Z2M spec. Added cluster 61184 to bindings. RE-PAIR _TZE284_vvmbj46n devices for LCD time sync!
5.5.446.fr: 🕐 FIX SYNC LCD: Ordre payload corrigé [UTC][Local] selon Z2M. Cluster 61184 ajouté aux bindings. RE-APPAIRER _TZE284_vvmbj46n!

5.5.445.en: 🔧 HOTFIX: Fixed app crash (SyntaxError: Missing catch after try in app.js:786). App now starts correctly.
5.5.445.fr: 🔧 HOTFIX: Correction crash app (erreur syntaxe app.js:786). L'app démarre maintenant correctement.

5.5.444.en: 🕐 LCD TIME SYNC v3: Added raw ZCL frame bypass for devices paired before v5.5.437. Uses Tuya epoch (2000) with correct [Local][UTC] format. If still not working, RE-PAIR device.
5.5.444.fr: 🕐 SYNC LCD v3: Ajout envoi raw frame ZCL pour devices pairés avant v5.5.437. Epoch Tuya (2000) + format [Local][UTC]. Si échec: RE-APPAIRER.

5.5.443.en: ➕ NEW DEVICE: BSEED Smart Wall Sockets with power monitoring (_TZ3210_2uollq9d, _TZ3000_4ux0ondb, TS011F). Added to plug_energy_monitor driver.
5.5.443.fr: ➕ NOUVEAU: Prises murales BSEED avec monitoring de puissance. Ajoutées au driver plug_energy_monitor.

5.5.442.en: 🕐 LCD TIME SYNC: Added ZCL Time cluster (0x000A) as fallback method. If Tuya cluster unavailable, tries Time cluster. RE-PAIR device required for best results.
5.5.442.fr: 🕐 SYNC LCD: Ajout cluster ZCL Time (0x000A) comme fallback. RE-APPAIRER le device recommandé.
5.5.442.nl: 🕐 LCD SYNC: ZCL Time cluster (0x000A) toegevoegd als fallback. RE-PAIREN aanbevolen.
5.5.442.de: 🕐 LCD SYNC: ZCL Time Cluster (0x000A) als Fallback hinzugefügt. RE-PAIRING empfohlen.

5.5.441.en: 🔧 BUTTONS FIX: Changed class from 'button' to 'sensor' + added button.X capabilities with getable:false for CLICKABLE virtual buttons. All button drivers (1/2/3/4/6/8) now show clickable buttons in device UI.
5.5.441.fr: 🔧 FIX BOUTONS: Classe changée de 'button' à 'sensor' + capabilities button.X avec getable:false pour boutons virtuels CLIQUABLES.
5.5.441.nl: 🔧 KNOPPEN FIX: Klasse gewijzigd + button.X capabilities met getable:false voor KLIKBARE virtuele knoppen.
5.5.441.de: 🔧 TASTEN FIX: Klasse geändert + button.X Capabilities mit getable:false für KLICKBARE virtuelle Tasten.

5.5.440.en: 🔧 BUTTONS: Removed button.X capabilities - use FLOW CARDS for automation (single/double/long press). LCD TIME SYNC: Added DP-based time sync (DP101-103) for devices that don't respond to EF00 command.
5.5.440.fr: 🔧 BOUTONS: Capabilities button.X supprimées - utiliser FLOW CARDS. SYNC LCD: Ajout sync via DP Tuya (DP101-103) pour devices ne répondant pas à EF00.
5.5.440.nl: 🔧 KNOPPEN: button.X capabilities verwijderd - gebruik FLOW CARDS. LCD SYNC: DP-gebaseerde tijdsync toegevoegd.
5.5.440.de: 🔧 TASTEN: button.X Capabilities entfernt - FLOW CARDS verwenden. LCD SYNC: DP-basierte Zeitsync hinzugefügt.

5.5.439.en: 🔧 LCD TIME SYNC: Improved error message when Tuya cluster unavailable - instructs user to RE-PAIR device. BUTTONS: Virtual buttons are flow-only (use Flow cards, not device UI).
5.5.439.fr: 🔧 SYNC HEURE LCD: Message d'erreur amélioré - RE-APPAIRER le device requis. BOUTONS: Boutons virtuels = Flow cards uniquement.
5.5.439.nl: 🔧 LCD TIJD SYNC: Verbeterde foutmelding - RE-PAIREN vereist. KNOPPEN: Virtuele knoppen = alleen Flow cards.
5.5.439.de: 🔧 LCD ZEIT SYNC: Verbesserte Fehlermeldung - RE-PAIRING erforderlich. TASTEN: Virtuelle Tasten = nur Flow Cards.

5.5.438.en: ⚡ SPEED FIX: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx radar sensor now responds faster. Reduced debouncing from 7 counts + 15s to 3 counts + 5s. Better balance between speed and false-positive filtering.
5.5.438.fr: ⚡ CORRECTION VITESSE: Capteur radar _TZE204_gkfbdvyx plus rapide. Debouncing réduit de 7 rapports + 15s à 3 + 5s. Meilleur équilibre vitesse/filtrage.
5.5.438.nl: ⚡ SNELHEID FIX: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx radar sensor reageert nu sneller. Debouncing verminderd van 7 + 15s naar 3 + 5s.
5.5.438.de: ⚡ GESCHWINDIGKEIT-FIX: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx Radar-Sensor reagiert jetzt schneller. Debouncing von 7 + 15s auf 3 + 5s reduziert.

5.5.437.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIX: Climate sensor LCD time sync fixed (_getTuyaManager error). Added Tuya cluster 61184 for TS0601. Flow card registration wrapped in try-catch to prevent crashes.
5.5.437.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION DIAGNOSTIC: Sync heure LCD capteur climatique corrigé. Cluster Tuya 61184 ajouté pour TS0601. Enregistrement flow cards protégé.
5.5.437.nl: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIX: LCD klimaatsensor tijdsync gerepareerd. Tuya cluster 61184 toegevoegd voor TS0601. Flow card registratie beschermd.
5.5.437.de: 🔧 DIAGNOSE-FIX: LCD Klimasensor Zeitsync behoben. Tuya Cluster 61184 für TS0601 hinzugefügt. Flow Card Registrierung abgesichert.

5.5.436.en: 🎮 FORUM #890: Added TS004F 4-button scene switch support. Added 8 new manufacturerNames (_TZ3000_4fjiwweb, _TZ3000_abrsvsou, _TZ3000_ja5osu5g, etc). Sleepy device pairing: hold button during add.
5.5.436.fr: 🎮 FORUM #890: Support interrupteur scène 4 boutons TS004F. 8 nouveaux manufacturerNames. Appairage: maintenir bouton pendant ajout.
5.5.436.nl: 🎮 FORUM #890: TS004F 4-knops scene switch ondersteuning. 8 nieuwe manufacturerNames. Sleepy device pairing: knop ingedrukt houden.
5.5.436.de: 🎮 FORUM #890: TS004F 4-Tasten Szenen-Schalter Unterstützung. 8 neue manufacturerNames. Sleepy Device Pairing: Taste gedrückt halten.

5.5.422.en: 🔧 IMPROVEMENTS (Tuya Smart Life forum inspiration): Added power/energy measurement scale settings to Smart Plugs and Power Meters. Fix incorrect readings by adjusting scale (÷1000 to ×100). Added bidirectional meter option for solar installations.

5.5.398.en: 🔗 CLUSTER BINDER: Integrated UniversalClusterBinder with modular data system. Uses TuyaProtocolParser for DP parsing/building. Added more model ID mappings (TS004F, TS0046, TS0215). Improved Tuya frame detection.

Added settings: Motion Detection Mode (PIR/Radar/Both), Motion Sensitivity, Static Sensitivity, Fading Time, LED Indicator. Full DP mapping from Zigbee2MQTT. Forum request 4x4_Pete.

5.5.391.en: ⏰ ENHANCED TIME SYNC: Request detection (cluster 0x000A, 0xEF00 cmd 0x24). Device intelligence levels (DUMB/SMART). DST transitions calculator. Payload parser. Example payloads table. Device settings schema (time_sync_format, time_sync_timezone). More manufacturer mappings.
5.5.391.fr: ⏰ SYNC HEURE AMÉLIORÉ: Détection requêtes (0x000A, 0xEF00). Niveaux intelligence appareil (DUMB/SMART). Calcul transitions DST. Parser payloads. Settings device (format, fuseau horaire).
5.5.391.nl: ⏰ VERBETERDE TIJDSYNC: Request detectie. Device intelligence levels. DST transities. Payload parser. Device settings schema.
5.5.391.de: ⏰ VERBESSERTE ZEITSYNC: Request-Erkennung. Geräte-Intelligenz-Ebenen. DST-Übergänge. Payload-Parser. Geräteeinstellungen.

5.5.390.en: 🔄 AUTO-DISCOVERY SYSTEM: Dynamic capability detection from device reports. Auto-adds capabilities when new DPs discovered. Scheduled updates (15min → hourly). DP→Capability mapping (climate, energy, safety, cover). Time sync integration. Stats tracking. Flow card generation events.
5.5.390.fr: 🔄 SYSTÈME AUTO-DÉCOUVERTE: Détection dynamique des capabilities. Ajout auto quand nouveaux DPs découverts. Mises à jour planifiées (15min → horaire). Mapping DP→Capability. Intégration time sync.
5.5.390.nl: 🔄 AUTO-DISCOVERY SYSTEEM: Dynamische capability detectie. Auto-toevoegen bij nieuwe DPs. Geplande updates (15min → uurlijks). DP→Capability mapping. Time sync integratie.
5.5.390.de: 🔄 AUTO-DISCOVERY SYSTEM: Dynamische Capability-Erkennung. Auto-Hinzufügen bei neuen DPs. Geplante Updates (15min → stündlich). DP→Capability Mapping. Time Sync Integration.

5.5.389.en: 🔧 UNIVERSAL DATA HANDLER: Multi-level parser for Tuya & Zigbee. Level 0: Protocol (Tuya DP frames, ZCL frames). Level 1: Raw (Buffer/Uint8Array). Level 2: Hex (string). Level 3: Typed (uint8/int16/float). Level 4: Semantic (temp_div10, battery_div2, percent_invert). Unified API: toBuffer/toHex/parseTuyaFrame/parseZCLFrame/read/write/convert.
5.5.389.fr: 🔧 GESTIONNAIRE DONNÉES UNIVERSEL: Parser multi-niveau Tuya & Zigbee. Protocole, Raw, Hex, Typé, Sémantique. API unifiée.
5.5.389.nl: 🔧 UNIVERSELE DATA HANDLER: Multi-level parser Tuya & Zigbee. Protocol, Raw, Hex, Typed, Semantic. Unified API.
5.5.389.de: 🔧 UNIVERSELLER DATEN HANDLER: Multi-Level Parser für Tuya & Zigbee. Protokoll, Raw, Hex, Typed, Semantisch. Einheitliche API.

5.5.388.en: ⏰ COMPREHENSIVE TIME SYNC: New TuyaTimeSyncFormats.js utility with ALL time formats: ZIGBEE_2000 (4B epoch 2000), UNIX_1970 (4B epoch 1970), TUYA_STANDARD (7B local), TUYA_MCU (9B with header), TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ (9B with TZ), TUYA_FULL_TZ (10B with DST), TUYA_DUAL_2000 (8B [Local][UTC]), TUYA_GATEWAY (12B full). Auto-detect format by manufacturer. DST support. Timezone database (GMT±12).
5.5.388.fr: ⏰ SYNC HEURE COMPLET: Nouveau TuyaTimeSyncFormats.js avec TOUS les formats: ZIGBEE_2000, UNIX_1970, TUYA_STANDARD, TUYA_MCU, TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ, TUYA_FULL_TZ, TUYA_DUAL_2000, TUYA_GATEWAY. Auto-détection par fabricant. Support DST. Base de données fuseaux horaires.
5.5.388.nl: ⏰ COMPLETE TIJDSYNC: Nieuwe TuyaTimeSyncFormats.js met ALLE formaten. Auto-detectie per fabrikant. DST ondersteuning. Tijdzone database.
5.5.388.de: ⏰ UMFASSENDE ZEITSYNC: Neues TuyaTimeSyncFormats.js mit ALLEN Formaten. Auto-Erkennung per Hersteller. DST Unterstützung. Zeitzonendatenbank.

5.5.387.en: 🔥 FIX - Smoke Detector _TZE284_rccxox8p (Jolink): REMOVED duplicate manufacturerName from gas_sensor and climate_sensor drivers. Device was pairing with WRONG driver! Now pairs exclusively with smoke_detector_advanced. RE-PAIR device after update!
5.5.387.fr: 🔥 FIX - Détecteur fumée _TZE284_rccxox8p (Jolink): SUPPRIMÉ manufacturerName dupliqué des drivers gas_sensor et climate_sensor. L'appareil s'appairait au MAUVAIS driver! S'appaire maintenant exclusivement avec smoke_detector_advanced. RE-COUPLER après MAJ!
5.5.387.nl: 🔥 FIX - Rookmelder _TZE284_rccxox8p (Jolink): VERWIJDERD dubbele manufacturerName uit gas_sensor en climate_sensor drivers. Apparaat koppelde met VERKEERDE driver! Koppelt nu exclusief met smoke_detector_advanced. OPNIEUW KOPPELEN na update!
