5.5.387.de: 🔥 FIX - Rauchmelder _TZE284_rccxox8p (Jolink): ENTFERNT doppelte manufacturerName aus gas_sensor und climate_sensor Treibern. Gerät paarte mit FALSCHEM Treiber! Paart jetzt exklusiv mit smoke_detector_advanced. NEU KOPPELN nach Update!

5.5.386.en: 🔧 CLUSTER BINDING ENHANCEMENT: UniversalClusterBinder utility for unified Tuya DP (0xEF00) and Zigbee ZCL cluster handling. EnrichedDPMappings with comprehensive DP profiles from Z2M/ZHA research. Auto-detects protocol by manufacturer pattern (_TZE* vs _TZ3000_*). Automatic capability mapping for climate sensors, soil sensors, radar sensors, thermostats, covers, switches, plugs, and safety devices.
5.5.386.fr: 🔧 AMÉLIORATION CLUSTER BINDING: Utilitaire UniversalClusterBinder pour gestion unifiée Tuya DP (0xEF00) et clusters ZCL Zigbee. EnrichedDPMappings avec profils DP complets (recherche Z2M/ZHA). Auto-détection protocole par pattern fabricant. Mapping automatique capabilities.
5.5.386.nl: 🔧 CLUSTER BINDING VERBETERING: UniversalClusterBinder utility voor uniforme Tuya DP (0xEF00) en Zigbee ZCL cluster afhandeling. EnrichedDPMappings met uitgebreide DP profielen (Z2M/ZHA onderzoek). Auto-detectie protocol op fabrikant patroon. Automatische capability mapping.
5.5.386.de: 🔧 CLUSTER BINDING VERBESSERUNG: UniversalClusterBinder Utility für einheitliche Tuya DP (0xEF00) und Zigbee ZCL Cluster Handhabung. EnrichedDPMappings mit umfassenden DP-Profilen (Z2M/ZHA Forschung). Auto-Erkennung Protokoll per Hersteller-Muster. Automatische Capability-Zuordnung.

5.5.385.en: ⚙️ User Settings: Time format & timezone selection in device settings. Climate sensor now has 'Time Sync' group with format dropdown (Auto/LCD/MCU/Zigbee) and timezone override (Auto/GMT+1/GMT+2/etc). Device uses user choice instead of auto-detect.
5.5.385.fr: ⚙️ Paramètres: Choix format heure & fuseau dans paramètres appareil. Capteur climat: groupe 'Sync Heure' avec dropdown format et fuseau horaire. L'appareil utilise le choix utilisateur.
5.5.385.nl: ⚙️ Instellingen: Tijdformaat & tijdzone keuze in apparaatinstellingen. Klimaatsensor: 'Tijdsync' groep met format dropdown en tijdzone override.
5.5.385.de: ⚙️ Einstellungen: Zeitformat & Zeitzone Auswahl in Geräteeinstellungen. Klimasensor: 'Zeitsync' Gruppe mit Format-Dropdown und Zeitzone-Override.

5.5.384.en: 🕒 ULTIMATE Time Sync: 15 formats (BE/LE variants), milliseconds support, time request interception (cluster 0x000A & 0xEF00 cmd 0x24), auto-respond to device requests. Constants: TIME_FORMATS, TIME_SYNC_COMMANDS, TIMEZONE_OFFSETS exported.
5.5.384.fr: 🕒 Sync heure ULTIME: 15 formats (BE/LE), millisecondes, interception requêtes temps (cluster 0x000A & 0xEF00), réponse auto. Constants exportées.
5.5.384.nl: 🕒 ULTIEME tijdsync: 15 formaten (BE/LE), milliseconden, time request interceptie (cluster 0x000A & 0xEF00), auto-respond. Constants geëxporteerd.
5.5.384.de: 🕒 ULTIMATIVE Zeitsync: 15 Formate (BE/LE), Millisekunden, Zeitanfrage-Abfang (Cluster 0x000A & 0xEF00), Auto-Antwort. Konstanten exportiert.

5.5.383.en: 🕒 COMPLETE Time Sync: 12 formats covering ALL epochs (1970/2000), UTC/Local variants, DST detection. Formats: ZIGBEE_2000/LOCAL, UNIX_1970/LOCAL, TUYA_TIMESTAMP_8/UNIX, TUYA_STANDARD/UTC_STRING, TUYA_MCU, TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ, TUYA_FULL_TZ (with DST), TUYA_GATEWAY. Auto-fallback on failure. GMT+1 to GMT-12 support.
5.5.383.fr: 🕒 Sync heure COMPLÈTE: 12 formats pour TOUS les epochs (1970/2000), UTC/Local, détection DST. Support GMT+1 à GMT-12. Auto-fallback si échec.
5.5.383.nl: 🕒 COMPLETE tijdsync: 12 formaten voor ALLE epochs (1970/2000), UTC/Local varianten, DST detectie. GMT+1 tot GMT-12 ondersteuning. Auto-fallback bij fout.
5.5.383.de: 🕒 KOMPLETTE Zeitsync: 12 Formate für ALLE Epochen (1970/2000), UTC/Local Varianten, DST-Erkennung. GMT+1 bis GMT-12 Support. Auto-Fallback bei Fehler.

5.5.382.en: 🕒 ENHANCE - Comprehensive Time Sync: Added 6 time formats (ZIGBEE_2000, UNIX_1970, TUYA_STANDARD, TUYA_MCU, TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ, TUYA_TIMESTAMP_8). Auto-detects best format per device. Supports all Tuya/Zigbee LCD, thermostat, and MCU devices. GMT/DST aware.
5.5.382.fr: 🕒 AMÉLIORATION - Sync heure complète: 6 formats (ZIGBEE_2000, UNIX_1970, TUYA_STANDARD, TUYA_MCU, TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ, TUYA_TIMESTAMP_8). Auto-détection par appareil. Support LCD, thermostat, MCU. GMT/DST inclus.
5.5.382.nl: 🕒 VERBETERING - Complete tijdsync: 6 formaten (ZIGBEE_2000, UNIX_1970, TUYA_STANDARD, TUYA_MCU, TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ, TUYA_TIMESTAMP_8). Auto-detectie per apparaat. LCD, thermostaat, MCU support. GMT/DST bewust.
5.5.382.de: 🕒 VERBESSERUNG - Umfassende Zeitsync: 6 Formate (ZIGBEE_2000, UNIX_1970, TUYA_STANDARD, TUYA_MCU, TUYA_EXTENDED_TZ, TUYA_TIMESTAMP_8). Auto-Erkennung pro Gerät. LCD, Thermostat, MCU Support. GMT/DST bewusst.

5.5.381.en: 🔥 FIX - Smoke Detector Pairing: Fixed cluster mismatch for _TZE284_rccxox8p. Device has clusters [0,4,5,60672,61184] but driver required [1,1280]. Removed non-existent clusters from driver config. Forum: Jolink interview data.
5.5.381.fr: 🔥 FIX - Appairage Détecteur Fumée: Correction mismatch clusters pour _TZE284_rccxox8p. Device a [0,4,5,60672,61184] mais driver demandait [1,1280]. Clusters inexistants supprimés.
5.5.381.nl: 🔥 FIX - Rookmelder Pairing: Cluster mismatch opgelost voor _TZE284_rccxox8p. Apparaat heeft [0,4,5,60672,61184] maar driver vereiste [1,1280]. Niet-bestaande clusters verwijderd.
5.5.381.de: 🔥 FIX - Rauchmelder Pairing: Cluster-Mismatch für _TZE284_rccxox8p behoben. Gerät hat [0,4,5,60672,61184] aber Treiber forderte [1,1280]. Nicht vorhandene Cluster entfernt.

5.5.380.en: 🔥 FIX - Smoke Detector _TZE284_rccxox8p: Added cluster 0xED00 (60672) used by newer TZE284 smoke detectors. Device was already supported but needed cluster update for proper pairing. Forum report: Jolink.
5.5.380.fr: 🔥 FIX - Détecteur fumée _TZE284_rccxox8p: Ajout cluster 0xED00 (60672) utilisé par nouveaux détecteurs TZE284. Device supporté mais cluster manquant. Rapport forum: Jolink.
5.5.380.nl: 🔥 FIX - Rookmelder _TZE284_rccxox8p: Cluster 0xED00 (60672) toegevoegd voor nieuwere TZE284 rookmelders. Apparaat was ondersteund maar cluster update nodig. Forum rapport: Jolink.
5.5.380.de: 🔥 FIX - Rauchmelder _TZE284_rccxox8p: Cluster 0xED00 (60672) für neuere TZE284 Rauchmelder hinzugefügt. Gerät wurde unterstützt aber Cluster-Update war nötig. Forum-Bericht: Jolink.

5.5.379.en: 🔘 CRITICAL FIX - MOES 4-Button (TS004F) Physical Buttons: TS004F has TWO modes - Dimmer (default) and Scene. Physical buttons only work in Scene mode! Now auto-switches to Scene mode on init. Mode controlled by Cluster 6, Attr 0x8004. Research: SmartThings, Z2M #7158, ZHA #1372.
5.5.379.fr: 🔘 FIX CRITIQUE - Boutons physiques MOES 4 (TS004F): TS004F a DEUX modes - Dimmer (défaut) et Scene. Les boutons physiques ne fonctionnent qu'en mode Scene! Bascule auto vers mode Scene à l'init. Recherche: SmartThings, Z2M #7158, ZHA #1372.
5.5.379.nl: 🔘 KRITIEKE FIX - MOES 4-Knop (TS004F) Fysieke Knoppen: TS004F heeft TWEE modes - Dimmer (standaard) en Scene. Fysieke knoppen werken alleen in Scene mode! Nu auto-switch naar Scene mode bij init. Onderzoek: SmartThings, Z2M #7158, ZHA #1372.
5.5.379.de: 🔘 KRITISCHER FIX - MOES 4-Tasten (TS004F) Physische Tasten: TS004F hat ZWEI Modi - Dimmer (Standard) und Scene. Physische Tasten funktionieren nur im Scene-Modus! Wechselt jetzt automatisch in den Scene-Modus. Forschung: SmartThings, Z2M #7158, ZHA #1372.

5.5.378.en: 🕐 CRITICAL FIX - LCD Time Sync: Fixed Tuya epoch bug (2000 vs 1970). LCD climate sensors were showing year 2055 instead of 2025! Fixed payload format [Local:4][UTC:4]. Research: Z2M #30054. Now uses TUYA_EPOCH_OFFSET=946684800s correctly.
5.5.378.fr: 🕐 FIX CRITIQUE - Sync heure LCD: Correction bug epoch Tuya (2000 vs 1970). Les capteurs LCD affichaient 2055 au lieu de 2025! Format payload [Local:4][UTC:4] corrigé. Recherche: Z2M #30054.
5.5.378.nl: 🕐 KRITIEKE FIX - LCD Tijd Sync: Tuya epoch bug opgelost (2000 vs 1970). LCD sensoren toonden jaar 2055 in plaats van 2025! Payload format [Local:4][UTC:4] gecorrigeerd.
5.5.378.de: 🕐 KRITISCHER FIX - LCD Zeit-Sync: Tuya Epoch Bug behoben (2000 vs 1970). LCD Sensoren zeigten Jahr 2055 statt 2025! Payload Format [Local:4][UTC:4] korrigiert.

5.5.377.en: 🧠 SMART - Complete noTemperature/noHumidity flags for ALL radar sensor configs. Added to ZY_M100_CEILING_24G (gkfbdvyx) and TZE284_IADRO9BF (iadro9bf, qasjif9e, ztqnh5cg, sbyx0lm6). Research: Z2M #27212, #30326, ZHA t/874026 confirm these mmWave radars have NO temp/humidity sensors.
5.5.377.fr: 🧠 SMART - Flags noTemperature/noHumidity complets pour TOUS les capteurs radar. Ajouté à ZY_M100_CEILING_24G et TZE284_IADRO9BF. Recherche Z2M/ZHA confirme: pas de capteurs temp/humidité sur ces radars mmWave.
5.5.377.nl: 🧠 SMART - Volledige noTemperature/noHumidity flags voor ALLE radar sensor configs. Toegevoegd aan ZY_M100_CEILING_24G en TZE284_IADRO9BF. Z2M/ZHA research bevestigt: geen temp/vochtigheid sensoren.
5.5.377.de: 🧠 SMART - Vollständige noTemperature/noHumidity Flags für ALLE Radar-Sensor-Configs. Hinzugefügt zu ZY_M100_CEILING_24G und TZE284_IADRO9BF. Z2M/ZHA Recherche bestätigt: keine Temp/Feuchtigkeitssensoren.

5.5.376.en: 🔧 FIX - Button No Action Detected: Added IAS ACE cluster (1281) support for SOS/Emergency buttons (TS0215A). Handles commandEmergency, panic, arm, disarm events. Fixes 'No Action detected' for devices using IAS ACE instead of scenes/multistateInput.
5.5.376.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Bouton sans action: Support cluster IAS ACE (1281) pour boutons SOS/Urgence (TS0215A). Gère events commandEmergency, panic, arm, disarm. Corrige 'Aucune action détectée'.
5.5.376.nl: 🔧 FIX - Knop Geen Actie: IAS ACE cluster (1281) ondersteuning voor SOS/Nood knoppen (TS0215A). Handelt commandEmergency, panic, arm, disarm events af. Fixt 'Geen actie gedetecteerd'.
5.5.376.de: 🔧 FIX - Taste Keine Aktion: IAS ACE Cluster (1281) Unterstützung für SOS/Notfall-Tasten (TS0215A). Behandelt commandEmergency, panic, arm, disarm Events. Behebt 'Keine Aktion erkannt'.

5.5.375.en: 🔧 FIXES - Button capability definition added (fixes 'Invalid capabilities' error). LCD climate sensor aggressive time sync (5 attempts). Intelligent adapter multi-source verification complete.
5.5.375.fr: 🔧 CORRECTIONS - Définition capability bouton ajoutée (corrige erreur 'Invalid capabilities'). Sync temps LCD agressive (5 tentatives). Adaptateur intelligent vérification multi-sources.
5.5.375.nl: 🔧 FIXES - Button capability definitie toegevoegd. LCD klimaat sensor agressieve tijd sync (5 pogingen). Intelligente adapter multi-bron verificatie compleet.
5.5.375.de: 🔧 FIXES - Button Capability Definition hinzugefügt. LCD Klimasensor aggressive Zeitsynchronisation (5 Versuche). Intelligenter Adapter Multi-Quellen-Verifizierung komplett.

5.5.374.en: 🧠 SMART - Enhanced Intelligent Adapter: Multi-source verification (ZCL+Tuya DP+stored data). Value validation (detects stuck/invalid values). Overrides static config flags when real data detected. Active probing for capability discovery. Works with SENSOR_CONFIGS noTemperature/noHumidity flags.
5.5.374.fr: 🧠 SMART - Adaptateur Intelligent amélioré: Vérification multi-sources. Validation des valeurs. Override les configs statiques si données réelles détectées. Sondage actif pour découverte de capacités.
5.5.374.nl: 🧠 SMART - Verbeterde Intelligente Adapter: Multi-bron verificatie. Waarde validatie. Overschrijft statische config als echte data gedetecteerd. Actieve probing voor capability ontdekking.
5.5.374.de: 🧠 SMART - Verbesserter Intelligenter Adapter: Multi-Quellen-Verifizierung. Wertvalidierung. Überschreibt statische Konfiguration bei erkannten echten Daten. Aktives Probing zur Fähigkeitserkennung.

5.5.373.en: 🧠 NEW - Intelligent Device Adapter: Auto-learns device capabilities over 15min-1H. Removes unused capabilities (temp/humidity if no data). Adds detected capabilities. Hourly re-evaluation. Smart battery and power measurement management.
5.5.373.fr: 🧠 NOUVEAU - Adaptateur Intelligent: Apprend les capacités en 15min-1H. Supprime les capacités inutilisées. Ajoute les capacités détectées. Réévaluation horaire.
5.5.373.nl: 🧠 NIEUW - Intelligente Adapter: Leert apparaat mogelijkheden in 15min-1H. Verwijdert ongebruikte mogelijkheden. Voegt gedetecteerde mogelijkheden toe. Uurlijkse herevaluatie.
5.5.373.de: 🧠 NEU - Intelligenter Adapter: Lernt Gerätefähigkeiten in 15min-1H. Entfernt ungenutzte Fähigkeiten. Fügt erkannte Fähigkeiten hinzu. Stündliche Neubewertung.

5.5.372.en: 🔧 FIX - Radar Sensor False Capabilities: Removed measure_temperature and measure_humidity from presence_sensor_radar default capabilities. Most radar sensors don't have temp/humidity - fixes forum complaints about misleading capabilities.
5.5.372.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Fausses capacités radar: Supprimé measure_temperature et measure_humidity des capteurs radar. La plupart n'ont pas ces capteurs.
5.5.372.nl: 🔧 FIX - Radar Sensor Valse Capabilities: measure_temperature en measure_humidity verwijderd van radar sensoren die deze niet hebben.
5.5.372.de: 🔧 FIX - Radar Sensor Falsche Fähigkeiten: measure_temperature und measure_humidity von Radarsensoren entfernt, die diese nicht haben.

5.5.371.en: 🔧 FIX - Button Device Issues: (1) Fixed groupsCluster.add is not a function error - SDK3 uses addGroup() method. (2) Enhanced button_wireless_1 detection with multiple cluster listeners (scenes, multistateInput, onOff, IAS Zone, Tuya DP). Fixes 'No Action detected' issue.
5.5.371.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Problèmes boutons: (1) Erreur groupsCluster.add corrigée. (2) Détection button_wireless_1 améliorée. Corrige 'Aucune action détectée'.
5.5.371.nl: 🔧 FIX - Knop Apparaat Problemen: (1) groupsCluster.add fout opgelost. (2) button_wireless_1 detectie verbeterd. Fixt 'Geen actie gedetecteerd'.
5.5.371.de: 🔧 FIX - Tasten Probleme: (1) groupsCluster.add Fehler behoben. (2) button_wireless_1 Erkennung verbessert. Behebt 'Keine Aktion erkannt'.

5.5.370.en: 🔧 FIX - Missing Flow Cards: Added 11 missing flow card definitions to app.json that were causing 'cannot get device by id' errors. Includes: button_pressed_times, motion_alarm_lux, no_motion_timeout, power_above_threshold, power_below_threshold_duration, energy_today_exceeded, power_changed_percentage, temperature_crossed_threshold, humidity_changed_by, temperature_changed_rapidly, signal_strength_low.
5.5.370.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Flow Cards Manquants: Ajout de 11 définitions de flow cards manquantes dans app.json qui causaient des erreurs 'cannot get device by id'. Inclut: button_pressed_times, motion_alarm_lux, no_motion_timeout, etc.
5.5.370.nl: 🔧 FIX - Ontbrekende Flow Cards: 11 ontbrekende flow card definities toegevoegd aan app.json die 'cannot get device by id' fouten veroorzaakten.
5.5.370.de: 🔧 FIX - Fehlende Flow Cards: 11 fehlende Flow Card Definitionen zu app.json hinzugefügt, die 'cannot get device by id' Fehler verursachten.

5.5.369.en: 🔧 FIX - Forum Bug Reports: (1) ZG-204ZM battery spam - unified 5-minute throttling. (2) ZG-204ZM incorrect temp/humidity removed. (3) MOES 4-button - manufacturer IDs + scenes/multistateInput listeners fixed for double/long press. (4) 'Cannot get device by id' error - added safe wrappers to all flow card handlers.
5.5.369.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Rapports forum: (1) Spam batterie ZG-204ZM corrigé. (2) Temp/humidité incorrects supprimés. (3) MOES 4-boutons - détection double/long appui corrigée. (4) Erreur 'cannot get device' - wrappers de sécurité ajoutés.
5.5.369.nl: 🔧 FIX - Forum Bugs: (1) ZG-204ZM batterij spam gefixd. (2) Onjuiste temp/vochtigheid verwijderd. (3) MOES 4-knops - dubbel/lang druk detectie gefixd. (4) 'Cannot get device' fout - veilige wrappers toegevoegd.
5.5.369.de: 🔧 FIX - Forum-Fehler: (1) ZG-204ZM Batterie-Spam behoben. (2) Falsche Temp/Feuchtigkeit entfernt. (3) MOES 4-Tasten - Doppel/Lang-Druck behoben. (4) 'Cannot get device' Fehler - sichere Wrapper hinzugefügt.

5.5.368.en: 🔧 FIX - IR Blaster Flow Cards: Added missing ir_send_by_category action and ir_learning_active, ir_code_exists, ir_protocol_detected conditions to app.json. Fixes IR Blaster driver crash on flow card registration.
5.5.368.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Flow Cards IR Blaster: Ajout de l'action ir_send_by_category et des conditions manquantes. Corrige le crash du driver IR Blaster.
5.5.368.nl: 🔧 FIX - IR Blaster Flow Cards: Ontbrekende ir_send_by_category actie en condities toegevoegd. Fixt IR Blaster driver crash.
5.5.368.de: 🔧 FIX - IR Blaster Flow Cards: Fehlende ir_send_by_category Aktion und Bedingungen hinzugefügt. Behebt IR Blaster Treiber-Absturz.

5.5.367.en: 🔧 FIX - IR Blaster & Button Detection: (1) Added missing ir_learning_state_changed and ir_code_analyzed flow triggers to fix IR Blaster driver crash. (2) Fixed Tuya DP button detection - now ALWAYS enabled for all button devices, not just when ZCL clusters are missing. (3) Added Tuya DP detection for MOES ESW-0ZAA-EU 4-button. Fixes 'no detection' issues on wireless buttons.
5.5.367.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - IR Blaster & Détection Boutons: (1) Triggers flow manquants ajoutés. (2) Détection Tuya DP toujours activée pour tous les boutons. (3) Support MOES ESW-0ZAA-EU. Corrige les problèmes de non-détection.
5.5.367.nl: 🔧 FIX - IR Blaster & Knop Detectie: (1) Ontbrekende flow triggers toegevoegd. (2) Tuya DP detectie nu ALTIJD ingeschakeld voor alle knoppen. (3) MOES ESW-0ZAA-EU ondersteuning. Fixt 'geen detectie' problemen.
5.5.367.de: 🔧 FIX - IR Blaster & Tastenerkennung: (1) Fehlende Flow-Trigger hinzugefügt. (2) Tuya DP Erkennung jetzt IMMER für alle Tasten aktiviert. (3) MOES ESW-0ZAA-EU Unterstützung. Behebt 'keine Erkennung' Probleme.

5.5.366.en: 🔧 FIX - Battery Spam & Temp/Humidity (4x4_Pete forum #851): (1) Global battery throttling - reports only on 5% change or every 5 minutes. (2) Expanded PIR_ONLY_MANUFACTURERS list to remove incorrect temp/humidity capabilities from ZG-204ZL/ZG-204ZM devices. Fixes battery report spam and unnecessary temp/humidity on PIR-only sensors.
5.5.366.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Spam Batterie & Temp/Humidité (forum #851): (1) Throttling global batterie - rapports uniquement sur changement de 5% ou toutes les 5 minutes. (2) Liste PIR_ONLY_MANUFACTURERS étendue. Corrige le spam batterie et temp/humidité inutiles.
5.5.366.nl: 🔧 FIX - Batterij Spam & Temp/Vochtigheid (forum #851): (1) Globale batterij throttling - rapporten alleen bij 5% verandering of elke 5 minuten. (2) Uitgebreide PIR_ONLY_MANUFACTURERS lijst. Fixt batterij spam en onnodige temp/vochtigheid.
5.5.366.de: 🔧 FIX - Batterie Spam & Temp/Feuchtigkeit (Forum #851): (1) Globale Batterie-Drosselung - Berichte nur bei 5% Änderung oder alle 5 Minuten. (2) Erweiterte PIR_ONLY_MANUFACTURERS Liste. Behebt Batterie-Spam und unnötige Temp/Feuchtigkeit.

5.5.365.en: 🔧 FIX - Smoke Detector Pairing (GitHub #96): Added 14 new manufacturerNames for smoke detectors including _TZE204_kgaxpvxr, _TZE284_6ycgarab, _TZE200_rccxox8p, _TZE200_dq1mfjug. Fixes PG-S11Z and other smoke detectors that failed to pair.
5.5.365.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Appairage Détecteur de Fumée (GitHub #96): Ajout de 14 nouveaux manufacturerNames pour détecteurs de fumée. Corrige PG-S11Z et autres détecteurs qui ne s'appairaient pas.
5.5.365.nl: 🔧 FIX - Rookmelder Pairing (GitHub #96): 14 nieuwe manufacturerNames toegevoegd voor rookmelders. Fixt PG-S11Z en andere rookmelders die niet koppelden.
5.5.365.de: 🔧 FIX - Rauchmelder Pairing (GitHub #96): 14 neue manufacturerNames für Rauchmelder hinzugefügt. Behebt PG-S11Z und andere Rauchmelder die nicht gepairt werden konnten.

5.5.364.en: 🔧 FIX - Radar Sensor Wrong Driver: Removed duplicate productIds (ZG-204ZL, ZG-204ZM, ZG-204ZV) from motion_sensor driver. These radar sensors now correctly pair ONLY with presence_sensor_radar driver. Fixes 4x4_Pete forum #848 issue where radar sensors paired with wrong driver.
5.5.364.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION - Mauvais Driver Radar: Supprimé les productIds dupliqués (ZG-204ZL, ZG-204ZM, ZG-204ZV) du driver motion_sensor. Ces capteurs radar s'apparient maintenant uniquement avec presence_sensor_radar.
5.5.364.nl: 🔧 FIX - Radar Sensor Verkeerde Driver: Dubbele productIds (ZG-204ZL, ZG-204ZM, ZG-204ZV) verwijderd uit motion_sensor driver. Radar sensoren koppelen nu alleen met presence_sensor_radar.
5.5.364.de: 🔧 FIX - Radar Sensor Falscher Treiber: Doppelte productIds (ZG-204ZL, ZG-204ZM, ZG-204ZV) aus motion_sensor Treiber entfernt. Radarsensoren pairen jetzt nur mit presence_sensor_radar.

5.5.363.en: 🔥 CRITICAL FIX - Presence Sensor Radar Crash: Fixed SyntaxError 'Unexpected end of input' at device.js:2193 caused by missing closing brace in debouncePresence function. Also fixed presenceDebounceState variable scope. Diagnostic reports #51485cfc and #4388db0c.
5.5.363.fr: 🔥 CORRECTION CRITIQUE - Crash Capteur Présence Radar: Corrigé SyntaxError 'Unexpected end of input' causé par accolade manquante dans fonction debouncePresence.
5.5.363.nl: 🔥 KRITIEKE FIX - Presence Sensor Radar Crash: SyntaxError 'Unexpected end of input' opgelost door ontbrekende sluitende accolade in debouncePresence functie.
5.5.363.de: 🔥 KRITISCHER FIX - Präsenzsensor Radar Absturz: SyntaxError 'Unexpected end of input' behoben durch fehlende schließende Klammer in debouncePresence Funktion.

5.5.362.en: 🔥 CRITICAL FIX - IR Blaster Driver Crash: All flow card registrations (getActionCard, getTriggerCard, getConditionCard) now wrapped in individual try-catch blocks to prevent driver initialization failure. Fixes diagnostic reports #7cb5ca58 and #5dc85d82 where 'Invalid Flow Card ID: ir_send_by_category' and 'ir_set_protocol' errors caused complete IR Blaster driver failure. Driver now gracefully handles missing flow cards without crashing.
5.5.362.fr: 🔥 CORRECTION CRITIQUE - Crash Driver IR Blaster: Toutes les enregistrements de flow cards (getActionCard, getTriggerCard, getConditionCard) sont maintenant encapsulés dans des blocs try-catch individuels pour éviter l'échec d'initialisation du driver. Corrige les rapports de diagnostic #7cb5ca58 et #5dc85d82.
5.5.362.nl: 🔥 KRITIEKE FIX - IR Blaster Driver Crash: Alle flow card registraties nu gewrapped in individuele try-catch blokken om driver initialisatie falen te voorkomen. Fixt diagnose rapporten #7cb5ca58 en #5dc85d82.
5.5.362.de: 🔥 KRITISCHER FIX - IR Blaster Treiber Absturz: Alle Flow-Card-Registrierungen jetzt in einzelne try-catch-Blöcke gewrapped um Treiber-Initialisierungsfehler zu verhindern. Behebt Diagnoseberichte #7cb5ca58 und #5dc85d82.

5.5.361.en: 🎯 IR BLASTER COMPLETE: (1) Enhanced chunked transmission protocol based on Zigbee2MQTT zosungIRTransmit implementation. (2) JSON wrapper for IR codes with key_num, delay, freq, type, key_code. (3) Automatic CRC calculation for data integrity. (4) Sequence tracking for reliable transmission. (5) Transmission complete/receive events handling. (6) Fallback chain: chunked → direct → Tuya DP. GitHub #96 PG-S11Z smoke detector: FIXED in v5.5.360.
5.5.361.fr: 🎯 IR BLASTER COMPLET: (1) Protocole transmission chunked amélioré basé sur implémentation Zigbee2MQTT zosungIRTransmit. (2) Wrapper JSON pour codes IR avec key_num, delay, freq, type, key_code. (3) Calcul CRC automatique. (4) Suivi séquence pour transmission fiable. (5) Gestion événements transmission/réception. (6) Chaîne fallback: chunked → direct → Tuya DP.
5.5.361.nl: 🎯 IR BLASTER COMPLEET: (1) Verbeterd chunked transmissie protocol gebaseerd op Zigbee2MQTT zosungIRTransmit. (2) JSON wrapper voor IR codes met key_num, delay, freq, type, key_code. (3) Automatische CRC berekening. (4) Sequentie tracking voor betrouwbare transmissie. (5) Transmissie complete/receive events handling.
5.5.361.de: 🎯 IR BLASTER KOMPLETT: (1) Verbessertes Chunked-Übertragungsprotokoll basierend auf Zigbee2MQTT zosungIRTransmit. (2) JSON-Wrapper für IR-Codes mit key_num, delay, freq, type, key_code. (3) Automatische CRC-Berechnung. (4) Sequenz-Tracking für zuverlässige Übertragung. (5) Übertragung complete/receive Events.

5.5.360.en: 🚀 FORUM + GITHUB FIXES: (1) IR Blaster - Re-enabled ir_send_by_category flow card with proper implementation. Enhanced learn/send with protocol detection & categories. (2) ZG-204ZM Radar - Added manufacturer IDs _TZE200_ikvncluo, _TZE204_sgfmfpiy for motion detection fix (forum #844). (3) Smoke Detector PG-S11Z - Added support for new model (GitHub #96) with manufacturer IDs _TZ3000_rcvvxjge, _TZ3000_tkk7wwml, _TZE204_lhx6wprc. (4) Presence sensors enhanced with improved intelligent inference for presence=null firmware bug.
5.5.360.fr: 🚀 CORRECTIONS FORUM + GITHUB: (1) IR Blaster - Flow card ir_send_by_category réactivée. Apprentissage/envoi améliorés avec détection protocole. (2) Radar ZG-204ZM - IDs fabricant ajoutés pour détection mouvement (forum #844). (3) Détecteur fumée PG-S11Z - Support nouveau modèle (GitHub #96). (4) Capteurs présence améliorés avec inférence intelligente.
5.5.360.nl: 🚀 FORUM + GITHUB FIXES: (1) IR Blaster - ir_send_by_category flow card opnieuw ingeschakeld. (2) ZG-204ZM Radar - Fabrikant IDs toegevoegd voor bewegingsdetectie fix (forum #844). (3) Rookmelder PG-S11Z - Ondersteuning voor nieuw model (GitHub #96). (4) Aanwezigheidssensoren verbeterd met intelligente inferentie.
5.5.360.de: 🚀 FORUM + GITHUB FIXES: (1) IR Blaster - ir_send_by_category Flow-Karte reaktiviert. (2) ZG-204ZM Radar - Hersteller-IDs für Bewegungserkennung Fix hinzugefügt (Forum #844). (3) Rauchmelder PG-S11Z - Unterstützung für neues Modell (GitHub #96). (4) Anwesenheitssensoren mit intelligenter Inferenz verbessert.

5.5.359.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX - IR Blaster Complete: REMOVED ir_set_protocol and ir_analyze_code flow card definitions from driver.flow.compose.json (not just disabled in driver.js). These advanced cards were defined but never properly implemented, causing SDK validation errors in production. Core IR learn/send functionality remains fully operational. Diagnostic reports #7cb5ca58 and #5dc85d82 analyzed and addressed.
5.5.359.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION CRITIQUE - IR Blaster Complet: SUPPRIMÉ définitions flow cards ir_set_protocol et ir_analyze_code de driver.flow.compose.json (pas seulement désactivé dans driver.js). Ces cartes avancées étaient définies mais jamais correctement implémentées, causant erreurs validation SDK en production. Fonctionnalités core IR learn/send restent pleinement opérationnelles. Rapports diagnostic #7cb5ca58 et #5dc85d82 analysés et corrigés.
5.5.359.nl: 🔧 KRITIEKE FIX - IR Blaster Compleet: VERWIJDERD ir_set_protocol en ir_analyze_code flow card definities uit driver.flow.compose.json (niet alleen uitgeschakeld in driver.js). Deze geavanceerde kaarten waren gedefinieerd maar nooit correct geïmplementeerd, waardoor SDK validatiefouten in productie ontstonden. Core IR learn/send functionaliteit blijft volledig operationeel. Diagnose rapporten #7cb5ca58 en #5dc85d82 geanalyseerd en opgelost.
5.5.359.de: 🔧 KRITISCHER FIX - IR Blaster Vollständig: ENTFERNT ir_set_protocol und ir_analyze_code Flow-Karten-Definitionen aus driver.flow.compose.json (nicht nur in driver.js deaktiviert). Diese erweiterten Karten waren definiert, aber nie richtig implementiert, was SDK-Validierungsfehler in Produktion verursachte. Core IR Learn/Send Funktionalität bleibt voll funktionsfähig. Diagnoseberichte #7cb5ca58 und #5dc85d82 analysiert und behoben.

5.5.358.en: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: Disabled ir_set_protocol and ir_analyze_code flow cards causing SDK validation errors. Core IR learn/send functionality remains fully operational. Advanced protocol features temporarily disabled pending proper testing.
5.5.358.fr: 🔧 CORRECTION IR BLASTER: Désactivé flow cards ir_set_protocol et ir_analyze_code causant erreurs validation SDK. Fonctionnalités core IR learn/send restent pleinement opérationnelles. Fonctions protocole avancées temporairement désactivées en attente de tests appropriés.
5.5.358.nl: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: ir_set_protocol en ir_analyze_code flow cards uitgeschakeld vanwege SDK validatiefouten. Core IR learn/send functionaliteit blijft volledig operationeel. Geavanceerde protocol functies tijdelijk uitgeschakeld in afwachting van juiste tests.
5.5.358.de: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: ir_set_protocol und ir_analyze_code Flow-Karten deaktiviert aufgrund SDK-Validierungsfehler. Core IR Learn/Send Funktionalität bleibt voll funktionsfähig. Erweiterte Protokoll-Funktionen vorübergehend deaktiviert bis zu ordnungsgemäßen Tests.

5.5.357.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES + CLEANUP: (1) Radar Sensors - _TZE284_iadro9bf motion spam throttled to max 1x/60s + lux oscillation lock 30↔2000. _TZE204_gkfbdvyx battery spam completely disabled. (2) Vibration Sensor - _TZ3000_lqpt3mvr correctly assigned (removed from contact_sensor + cleaned duplicate entries from plug_smart/climate_sensor). (3) IR Blaster - Learn mode button state persistence fixed + timeout extended to 60s. (4) Button Protection - _TZ3000_5bpeda8u safeguards verified (v5.5.356). (5) Scene Switches & eWeLink CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01 already supported. Research validated across 25+ sources (Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, Blakadder).
5.5.357.fr: 🔧 CORRECTIONS FORUM + NETTOYAGE: (1) Capteurs Radar - _TZE284_iadro9bf spam mouvement limité max 1x/60s + verrouillage oscillation lux 30↔2000. _TZE204_gkfbdvyx spam batterie complètement désactivé. (2) Capteur Vibration - _TZ3000_lqpt3mvr correctement assigné (retiré de contact_sensor + doublons supprimés dans plug_smart/climate_sensor). (3) IR Blaster - Persistance état bouton learn corrigée + timeout étendu à 60s. (4) Protection Boutons - _TZ3000_5bpeda8u garde-fous vérifiés (v5.5.356). (5) Scene Switches & eWeLink CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01 déjà supportés. Recherches validées sur 25+ sources (Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, Blakadder).
5.5.357.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES + OPSCHONING: (1) Radar Sensoren - _TZE284_iadro9bf beweging spam beperkt tot max 1x/60s + lux oscillatie lock 30↔2000. _TZE204_gkfbdvyx batterij spam volledig uitgeschakeld. (2) Trillingssensor - _TZ3000_lqpt3mvr correct toegewezen (verwijderd uit contact_sensor + dubbele vermeldingen opgeschoond uit plug_smart/climate_sensor). (3) IR Blaster - Learn mode knop status persistentie gefixed + timeout verlengd naar 60s. (4) Knop Bescherming - _TZ3000_5bpeda8u beveiligingen geverifieerd (v5.5.356). (5) Scene Switches & eWeLink CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01 reeds ondersteund. Onderzoek gevalideerd via 25+ bronnen (Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, Blakadder).
5.5.357.de: 🔧 FORUM FIXES + BEREINIGUNG: (1) Radar Sensoren - _TZE284_iadro9bf Bewegungsspam auf max 1x/60s gedrosselt + Lux Oszillation Lock 30↔2000. _TZE204_gkfbdvyx Batteriespam komplett deaktiviert. (2) Vibrationssensor - _TZ3000_lqpt3mvr korrekt zugewiesen (aus contact_sensor entfernt + Duplikate aus plug_smart/climate_sensor bereinigt). (3) IR Blaster - Learn-Modus-Button-Status-Persistenz behoben + Timeout auf 60s erweitert. (4) Tasten-Schutz - _TZ3000_5bpeda8u Schutzmaßnahmen verifiziert (v5.5.356). (5) Scene Switches & eWeLink CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01 bereits unterstützt. Recherche validiert über 25+ Quellen (Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, Blakadder).

5.5.356.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIXES: (1) IR Blaster - removed problematic ir_send_by_category flow card causing SDK validation errors. (2) Button Protection - FIXED button_wireless incorrectly adapting to contact_sensor. Added safeguards to prevent button→sensor conversion. (3) Multi-Gang Standardization - All 1-8 gang switches now have consistent flow cards with complete EN/FR/NL/DE translations.
5.5.356.fr: 🔧 CORRECTIONS CRITIQUES: (1) IR Blaster - carte flow ir_send_by_category problématique supprimée. (2) Protection Boutons - CORRIGÉ button_wireless adapté incorrectement vers contact_sensor. Garde-fous ajoutés. (3) Standardisation Multi-Gang - Tous les interrupteurs 1-8 gangs ont maintenant des flow cards cohérentes avec traductions complètes.
5.5.356.nl: 🔧 KRITIEKE FIXES: (1) IR Blaster - problematische ir_send_by_category flow card verwijderd. (2) Knop Bescherming - GEREPAREERD button_wireless verkeerd aangepast naar contact_sensor. Beveiligingen toegevoegd. (3) Multi-Gang Standaardisatie - Alle 1-8 gang schakelaars hebben nu consistente flow cards met volledige vertalingen.
5.5.356.de: 🔧 KRITISCHE FIXES: (1) IR Blaster - problematische ir_send_by_category Flow-Karte entfernt. (2) Tasten-Schutz - BEHOBEN button_wireless falsch zu contact_sensor angepasst. Schutzmaßnahmen hinzugefügt. (3) Multi-Gang Standardisierung - Alle 1-8 Gang Schalter haben jetzt konsistente Flow-Karten mit vollständigen Übersetzungen.

5.5.355.en: 🎯 FORUM FIX - 4-Gang Flows & Smart Lux: FIXED 4-gang switches flow compatibility with complete trigger/condition/action cards (8 triggers, 4 conditions, 4 actions). NEW Smart Lux Reporting - motion sensors now report luminance independently every 5min + intelligent change detection (10% threshold). Proper driver-level flow cards for persistent GitHub storage. No more lux-only-on-motion limitation!
5.5.355.fr: 🎯 CORRECTION FORUM - Flows 4-Gang & Lux Intelligent: CORRIGÉ compatibilité flows interrupteurs 4 gangs avec cartes complètes trigger/condition/action (8 triggers, 4 conditions, 4 actions). NOUVEAU Reporting Lux Intelligent - capteurs mouvement rapportent luminance indépendamment toutes les 5min + détection changement intelligent (seuil 10%). Cartes flow niveau driver pour stockage GitHub persistant.
5.5.355.nl: 🎯 FORUM FIX - 4-Gang Flows & Slimme Lux: GEREPAREERD 4-gang schakelaars flow compatibiliteit met complete trigger/conditie/actie kaarten (8 triggers, 4 condities, 4 acties). NIEUW Slim Lux Rapportage - bewegingssensoren rapporteren lichtsterkte onafhankelijk elke 5min + intelligente veranderingsdetectie (10% drempel).
5.5.355.de: 🎯 FORUM FIX - 4-Gang Flows & Smart Lux: BEHOBEN 4-Gang Schalter Flow Kompatibilität mit vollständigen Trigger/Bedingung/Aktion Karten (8 Triggers, 4 Bedingungen, 4 Aktionen). NEU Smart Lux Berichterstattung - Bewegungssensoren berichten Helligkeit unabhängig alle 5min + intelligente Änderungserkennung (10% Schwelle).

5.5.354.en: 🎛️ MAJOR UPDATE - IR Blaster & Zigbee Equivalents: Complete IR Blaster implementation (ZS05/ZS06) with learn/send flow cards, code storage, and enhanced protocol support. NEW: Water Tank Monitor (ME201WZ) with ultrasonic level sensing, Smart Heater Controller with thermostat functions, Air Quality 6-in-1 with PM10/formaldehyde support. All WiFi → Zigbee equivalent modules now supported!
5.5.354.fr: 🎛️ MISE À JOUR MAJEURE - IR Blaster & Équivalents Zigbee: Implémentation complète IR Blaster (ZS05/ZS06) avec cartes flux apprentissage/envoi, stockage codes, protocole amélioré. NOUVEAU: Moniteur Réservoir d'Eau (ME201WZ) avec détection ultrasonique, Contrôleur Radiateur Intelligent avec fonctions thermostat, Qualité Air 6-en-1 avec PM10/formaldéhyde.
5.5.354.nl: 🎛️ GROTE UPDATE - IR Blaster & Zigbee Equivalenten: Volledige IR Blaster implementatie (ZS05/ZS06) met leren/verzenden flow kaarten, code opslag, verbeterd protocol. NIEUW: Watertank Monitor (ME201WZ) met ultrasone niveaumeting, Slimme Verwarmingscontroller met thermostaat functies, Luchtkwaliteit 6-in-1 met PM10/formaldehyde.
5.5.354.de: 🎛️ GROßES UPDATE - IR Blaster & Zigbee Äquivalente: Vollständige IR Blaster Implementierung (ZS05/ZS06) mit Lernen/Senden Flow-Karten, Code-Speicherung, verbessertes Protokoll. NEU: Wassertank Monitor (ME201WZ) mit Ultraschall-Füllstandsmessung, Intelligente Heizungssteuerung mit Thermostat-Funktionen, Luftqualität 6-in-1 mit PM10/Formaldehyd.

5.5.353.en: ZG-204ZM battery spam fix: throttle reports (5% change or 6h interval). Enhanced Homey SDK3 compliance: manufacturerName can coexist in multiple drivers if productId differ.
5.5.353.fr: Fix ZG-204ZM spam batterie: limitation rapports (changement 5% ou intervalle 6h). Conformité Homey SDK3 améliorée: manufacturerName peut coexister dans plusieurs drivers si productId différents.

5.5.352.en: 🔧 CURTAIN FIX: Improved timeout handling for curtain motors. Timeouts no longer throw errors - device often still responds despite Zigbee timeout.
5.5.352.nl: 🔧 FIX: Verbeterde timeout afhandeling voor gordijnmotoren.
5.5.352.fr: 🔧 FIX: Amélioration gestion timeout moteurs rideaux.

5.5.351.en: 🔧 EFTYCHIS FIX: scene_switch_4 import error fixed - device.js was using destructuring on non-destructured export. RE-PAIR devices after update!
5.5.351.nl: 🔧 FIX: scene_switch_4 import fout opgelost. Opnieuw koppelen na update!
5.5.351.de: 🔧 FIX: scene_switch_4 Import-Fehler behoben. Nach Update neu koppeln!
5.5.351.fr: 🔧 FIX: Erreur d'import scene_switch_4 corrigée. Re-coupler après MAJ!

5.5.350.en: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua and similar 4-gang buttons now work! Fixed onOff attribute detection that was blocking button presses. Previous logic ignored first report forever - now only ignores within 3 seconds of device init.
5.5.350.nl: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua 4-gang knoppen werken nu! OnOff detectie gerepareerd.
5.5.350.de: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua 4-Gang Buttons funktionieren jetzt! OnOff Erkennung repariert.
5.5.350.fr: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: Boutons _TZ3000_zgyzgdua 4-gang fonctionnent! Détection onOff corrigée.

5.5.349.en: 🔧 EFTYCHIS FIX: (1) _TZ3000_wkai4ga5 & _TZ3000_5tqxpine moved to scene_switch_4 driver with Johan-style button labels (Upper Left, Upper Right, etc.). (2) Motion sensor lux now reports independently - added illuminance cluster (1024) to bindings. RE-PAIR devices after update!
5.5.349.nl: 🔧 FIX: 4-gang scene switch + motion sensor lux onafhankelijk. Opnieuw koppelen na update!
5.5.349.de: 🔧 FIX: 4-gang Scene Switch + Motion Sensor Lux unabhängig. Nach Update neu koppeln!
5.5.349.fr: 🔧 FIX: 4-gang scene switch + lux capteur mouvement indépendant. Re-coupler après MAJ!

5.5.348.en: 📡 NEW: eWeLink temperature/humidity sensor support (JohnnyBravo: CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01). Forum issues analyzed: button flow triggers confirmed working, RGB bulb fingerprints verified.
5.5.348.nl: 📡 NIEUW: eWeLink temp/vocht sensor support. Forum issues geanalyseerd.
5.5.348.de: 📡 NEU: eWeLink Temp/Feuchte Sensor Support. Forum Issues analysiert.
5.5.348.fr: 📡 NOUVEAU: Support capteur temp/humidité eWeLink. Issues forum analysés.

5.5.347.en: 🚨 CRITICAL FIX: SyntaxError 'dp already declared' in HybridSensorBase.js - was breaking motion_sensor and smoke_detector_advanced devices. Fixed duplicate const declaration from v5.5.344 deduplication code.
5.5.347.nl: 🚨 KRITIEKE FIX: SyntaxError opgelost - motion_sensor en smoke_detector devices werkend.
5.5.347.de: 🚨 KRITISCHER FIX: SyntaxError behoben - motion_sensor und smoke_detector Geräte funktionieren.
5.5.347.fr: 🚨 FIX CRITIQUE: SyntaxError corrigé - capteurs mouvement et fumée fonctionnent.

5.5.346.en: 🔧 DEEP FIX: (1) _TZE204_gkfbdvyx fingerprint corrected to presence_sensor_radar (Ronny_M: was wrongly detected as climate sensor). (2) _TZE284_iadro9bf fingerprint added. (3) Forum/GitHub issues cross-referenced and resolved.
5.5.346.nl: 🔧 DIEPGAANDE FIX: Fingerprint correcties voor radar sensoren (Ronny_M).
5.5.346.de: 🔧 TIEFE FIX: Fingerprint Korrekturen für Radar Sensoren (Ronny_M).
5.5.346.fr: 🔧 FIX PROFOND: Corrections fingerprint pour capteurs radar (Ronny_M).

5.5.345.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: (1) _TZ3000_lqpt3mvr moved to vibration_sensor (Nicolas: TS0210 not contact). (2) _TZ3000_5bpeda8u fixed as button not switch (Cam). (3) Presence sensor radar lux smoothing confirmed working (Ronny_M).
5.5.345.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Vibratie sensor fix, knop fix, radar lux smoothing.
5.5.345.de: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Vibrationssensor Fix, Knopf Fix, Radar Lux Glättung.
5.5.345.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Fix capteur vibration, fix bouton, lissage lux radar.

5.5.344.en: 🔧 COMPREHENSIVE FIX: (1) Contact sensor duplicate DP processing fixed - was triggering 6x per event (Lasse_K diagnostic). (2) DP context detection now device-aware - fixes DP1 wrongly converted to temperature. (3) 1-hour keep-alive detection blocks fake 'closed' state. (4) Fixed invert_contact bug (was passing raw value). (5) Extended _safeDeviceHandler to AdvancedFlowCardManager (Fiek). (6) Button battery polling on wake.
5.5.344.nl: 🔧 UITGEBREIDE FIX: Contact sensor dubbele DP verwerking, context detectie, keep-alive filter, flow card foutpreventie.
5.5.344.de: 🔧 UMFASSENDER FIX: Kontaktsensor doppelte DP Verarbeitung, Kontext Erkennung, Keep-alive Filter, Flow Card Fehlerprävention.
5.5.344.fr: 🔧 CORRECTIF COMPLET: Traitement DP double capteur contact, détection contexte, filtre keep-alive, prévention erreurs flow cards.

5.5.343.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: (1) Contact sensor debounce - fixes unstable active/inactive toggling (Lasse_K). (2) Button battery fallback - adds Tuya DP battery support for _TZ3000_5tqxpine (Eftychis). (3) Enhanced button detection for _TZ3000_wkai4ga5.
5.5.343.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Contact sensor debounce, knop batterij verbeterd voor _TZ3000_5tqxpine.
5.5.343.de: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Kontaktsensor Debounce, Tastenbatterie verbessert für _TZ3000_5tqxpine.
5.5.343.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIXES: Debounce capteur contact, batterie bouton améliorée pour _TZ3000_5tqxpine.

5.5.342.en: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: 'cant get device by id' error prevention. All flow card handlers now wrapped with _safeDeviceHandler to gracefully handle deleted/re-paired devices. Flows referencing removed devices will no longer crash - they fail silently with logging instead.
5.5.342.nl: 🔧 KRITIEKE FIX: 'cant get device by id' foutpreventie. Flows met verwijderde apparaten crashen niet meer.
5.5.342.de: 🔧 KRITISCHER FIX: 'cant get device by id' Fehlerprävention. Flows mit gelöschten Geräten stürzen nicht mehr ab.
5.5.342.fr: 🔧 CORRECTIF CRITIQUE: Prévention erreur 'cant get device by id'. Les flows référençant des appareils supprimés ne plantent plus.

5.5.341.en: 🧹 MEMORY LEAK PREVENTION: Added onUninit() lifecycle methods to HybridSensorBase and HybridPlugBase (inspired by JohanBendz/com.philips.hue.zigbee PR#679). Cleans up timers, event listeners, and data handlers on device removal. Prevents memory leaks from orphaned resources.
5.5.341.nl: 🧹 MEMORY LEAK PREVENTION: onUninit() lifecycle methods toegevoegd.
5.5.341.de: 🧹 MEMORY LEAK PREVENTION: onUninit() Lifecycle-Methoden hinzugefügt.
5.5.341.fr: 🧹 MEMORY LEAK PREVENTION: Méthodes onUninit() ajoutées pour prévenir les fuites mémoire.

5.5.340.en: 🔌 MULTI-SOURCE INTEGRATION: Added SONOFF devices from JohanBendz/tech.sonoff (SNZB-04/04P, SNZB-05P, SNZB-06P, ZBMicro, S26R2ZB, SA-003, 01MINIZB). Analyzed Philips Hue Zigbee PRs (memory leak fixes, battery status). Added IKEA patterns from ZHA handlers. Inspired by forum firmware update discussions.

5.5.339.en: 📱 HOBEIAN MOTION SENSORS: Added ZG-204ZV, ZG-204ZM, ZG-204ZH presence sensors per GitHub issue AreAArseth/com.hobeian#4. Added HOBEIAN manufacturer to presence_sensor_radar. Forum/diagnostic report analyzed: button_wireless_4 capabilities warning is non-critical (device works). PR#6/PR#7 from Hobeian already integrated.

5.5.338.en: 📋 JOHAN BENDZ ISSUES AUDIT: Verified device support from JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee issues. Already supported: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx (radar #1322), _TZE200_ghynnvos (PIR #1321), _TZ3000_hy6ncvmw/TS0222 (light sensor #1320), _TZ3000_zgyzgdua/TS0044 (4-button #1327), _TZ3210_s8lvbbuc/TS0505B (RGB bulb #1325). IntelligentDeviceLearner handles new variants automatically.
5.5.338.nl: 📋 JOHAN BENDZ ISSUES AUDIT: Apparaatondersteuning geverifieerd.
5.5.338.de: 📋 JOHAN BENDZ ISSUES AUDIT: Geräteunterstützung verifiziert.
5.5.338.fr: 📋 JOHAN BENDZ ISSUES AUDIT: Support appareils vérifié.

5.5.337.en: 🌱 SOIL SENSOR FIX: Verified DP mappings against Z2M source. DP14=battery_state (0=low/10%, 1=med/50%, 2=high/100%) per Z2M TS0601_soil. Fixed flow triggers to use measure_soil_moisture. DP3=moisture, DP5=temp÷10, DP9=unit, DP15=battery%.
5.5.337.nl: 🌱 SOIL SENSOR FIX: DP mappings geverifieerd met Z2M bron.
5.5.337.de: 🌱 SOIL SENSOR FIX: DP-Zuordnungen mit Z2M-Quelle verifiziert.
5.5.337.fr: 🌱 SOIL SENSOR FIX: Mappings DP vérifiés avec source Z2M.

5.5.336.en: 🧠 INTELLIGENT DEVICE LEARNER: Autonomous capability discovery! 15-minute active learning phase monitors all DP and ZCL reports, infers capabilities from value patterns, persists learned profiles to device storage. Passive mode after learning continues to refine. Handles exotic manufacturer implementations automatically.
5.5.336.fr: 🧠 INTELLIGENT DEVICE LEARNER: Découverte automatique des capacités!

5.5.335.en: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Soil sensor settings now fully functional! Fixed Fahrenheit conversion (was inverted), implemented calibration offsets (temp/humidity/moisture -30 to +30), soil dryness threshold triggers alarm_water. Settings applied immediately on change. Per AreAArseth/com.hobeian PR#6.
5.5.335.nl: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Bodemvochtsensor instellingen werken nu volledig!
5.5.335.de: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Bodenfeuchtesensor-Einstellungen funktionieren jetzt vollständig!
5.5.335.fr: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Paramètres capteur sol maintenant fonctionnels!

5.5.334.en: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Soil sensor settings now fully functional! Fixed Fahrenheit conversion (was inverted), implemented calibration offsets (temp/humidity/moisture -30 to +30), soil dryness threshold triggers alarm_water. Settings applied immediately on change. Per AreAArseth/com.hobeian PR#6.
5.5.334.nl: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Bodemvochtsensor instellingen werken nu volledig!
5.5.334.de: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Bodenfeuchtesensor-Einstellungen funktionieren jetzt vollständig!
5.5.334.fr: 🌱 HOBEIAN PR#6 FIX: Paramètres capteur sol maintenant fonctionnels!

5.5.333.en: 🔘 FORUM FIX: _TZ3000_wkai4ga5 & _TZ3000_5tqxpine button switches now working! Added multistateInput cluster support (cluster 18), improved scene listener detection, added onOff command handling. Battery display fixed for devices without powerConfiguration cluster. Per Eftychis_Georgilas diagnostic report.

5.5.332.en: 🔧 FIX: Resolved 'Run listener was already registered' warning for button flow cards. Generic triggers (button_pressed, button_double_press, button_long_press) are now registered only once across all button drivers. Per diagnostic report.
5.5.332.nl: 🔧 FIX: Waarschuwing 'Run listener was already registered' opgelost voor knoppenflows.
5.5.332.de: 🔧 FIX: Warnung 'Run listener was already registered' für Tasten-Flow-Karten behoben.
5.5.332.fr: 🔧 FIX: Avertissement 'Run listener was already registered' corrigé pour les flows boutons.

5.5.331.en: 🔧 SDK IMPROVEMENTS: Added ScenesBoundCluster for better button handling (inspired by IKEA Tradfri app). Scene recall commands now properly mapped to single/double/long press. Enhanced BoundCluster patterns from Athom reference implementations.
5.5.331.nl: 🔧 SDK VERBETERINGEN: ScenesBoundCluster toegevoegd voor betere knopafhandeling.
5.5.331.de: 🔧 SDK VERBESSERUNGEN: ScenesBoundCluster für bessere Tastenbehandlung hinzugefügt.
5.5.331.fr: 🔧 AMÉLIORATIONS SDK: ScenesBoundCluster ajouté pour meilleure gestion boutons.

5.5.330.en: ✨ HOBEIAN ZG-303Z INTEGRATION: Full soil sensor support from AreAArseth/com.hobeian. NEW: measure_soil_moisture capability, alarm_water for dryness alerts, air humidity (DP109), calibration settings (-30 to +30), soil dryness threshold. Supports _TZE200_wqashyqo + all existing soil sensors.
5.5.330.nl: ✨ HOBEIAN ZG-303Z: Volledige bodemvochtsensor met alarm_water, luchtvochtigheid, kalibratie.
5.5.330.de: ✨ HOBEIAN ZG-303Z: Vollständiger Bodenfeuchtesensor mit Wasseralarm, Luftfeuchtigkeit, Kalibrierung.
5.5.330.fr: ✨ HOBEIAN ZG-303Z: Capteur sol complet avec alarme eau, humidité air, calibration.

5.5.329.en: 🔧 FIX: ZG-204ZL PIR sensor (_TZE200_3towulqd) now shows only motion + illuminance (removed incorrect temp/humidity). Added ZG-303Z soil sensor support (_TZE200_wqashyqo). Per forum #788.
5.5.329.nl: 🔧 FIX: ZG-204ZL PIR toont nu alleen beweging + lux. ZG-303Z bodemvochtsensor toegevoegd.
5.5.329.de: 🔧 FIX: ZG-204ZL PIR zeigt jetzt nur Bewegung + Lux. ZG-303Z Bodenfeuchtesensor hinzugefügt.
5.5.329.fr: 🔧 FIX: ZG-204ZL PIR affiche maintenant mouvement + luminosité. Capteur sol ZG-303Z ajouté.

5.5.328.en: ✨ NEW DEVICE: ZG-204ZM PIR + 24GHz radar battery presence sensor. Supports _TZE200_2aaelwxk, _TZE200_kb5noeto, _TZE200_tyffvoij. Features: presence, motion state, illuminance, distance detection. Per forum request #786.
5.5.328.nl: ✨ NIEUW: ZG-204ZM PIR + 24GHz radar batterij aanwezigheidssensor. Ondersteunt illuminantie en afstandsdetectie.
5.5.328.de: ✨ NEU: ZG-204ZM PIR + 24GHz Radar-Batterie-Präsenzsensor. Unterstützt Beleuchtungsstärke und Entfernungserkennung.
5.5.328.fr: ✨ NOUVEAU: Capteur présence ZG-204ZM PIR + radar 24GHz batterie. Supporte luminosité et détection distance.

5.5.327.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: TuyaEF00Manager safe logging (prevents 'this.log is not a function' errors). All device.log/error calls now use safe _log/_error helpers with null checks.
5.5.327.nl: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: TuyaEF00Manager veilige logging (voorkomt 'this.log is not a function' fouten).
5.5.327.de: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: TuyaEF00Manager sichere Protokollierung (verhindert 'this.log is not a function' Fehler).
5.5.327.fr: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: TuyaEF00Manager logging sécurisé (évite les erreurs 'this.log is not a function').

5.5.326.en: 🔬 RONNY #760 ULTIMATE FIX: _TZE284_iadro9bf complete rewrite. Distance-based presence inference for v78 firmware bug. Ultra-aggressive lux smoothing (2min lock) for 30-2000 oscillation. Force-remove battery capability. Disable polling.
5.5.326.nl: 🔬 RONNY #760: _TZE284_iadro9bf herschreven. Distance-based presence, ultra lux smoothing, geen batterij.
5.5.326.de: 🔬 RONNY #760: _TZE284_iadro9bf neu. Distance-based Presence, Ultra-Lux-Glättung, keine Batterie.
5.5.326.fr: 🔬 RONNY #760: _TZE284_iadro9bf réécrit. Présence basée distance, lissage lux ultra, pas de batterie.

5.5.325.en: 🔬 RONNY #782 ULTIMATE FIX: Complete _TZE204_gkfbdvyx rewrite based on ZHA/Z2M research. Correct DP1 enum handling (0=none,1=presence,2=move). Ultra-aggressive debounce (7 consecutive ON, 15s gap). Force-remove battery capability. DP103=lux, DP9=distance confirmed.
5.5.325.nl: 🔬 RONNY #782 ULTIMATE: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx volledig herschreven. Correcte DP enum, ultra-debounce, geen batterij.
5.5.325.de: 🔬 RONNY #782 ULTIMATE: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx komplett neu. Korrekte DP-Enum, Ultra-Debounce, keine Batterie.
5.5.325.fr: 🔬 RONNY #782 ULTIMATE: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx réécriture complète. Enum DP correct, ultra-debounce, pas de batterie.

5.5.324.en: 🔧 RONNY #782: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx fixes - More aggressive presence debouncing (5 consecutive ON, 10s gap). Extended DP fallbacks for lux and distance. Explicit mainsPowered flag to prevent battery alarms.
5.5.324.nl: 🔧 RONNY #782: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx fixes - Agressievere presence debouncing, meer DP fallbacks.
5.5.324.de: 🔧 RONNY #782: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx Fixes - Aggressiveres Presence-Debouncing, mehr DP-Fallbacks.
5.5.324.fr: 🔧 RONNY #782: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx fixes - Debouncing présence plus agressif, plus de fallbacks DP.

5.5.323.en: 🔧 EFTYCHIS #778-779: Scene switches endpoints fixed. Curtain robot: added luminance sensor, button detection, battery auto-detect, calibration settings (open_time, close_time, reverse). Re-pair devices after update.
5.5.323.nl: 🔧 EFTYCHIS #778-779: Scene switches gerepareerd. Gordijnrobot: lux sensor, knopdetectie, batterij auto-detect, kalibratie.
5.5.323.de: 🔧 EFTYCHIS #778-779: Scene-Schalter repariert. Vorhang-Roboter: Lux-Sensor, Tastenerk., Batterie-Erkennung, Kalibrierung.
5.5.323.fr: 🔧 EFTYCHIS #778-779: Scene switches corrigés. Robot rideau: capteur lux, détection bouton, batterie auto, calibration.

5.5.320.en: 🔧 RONNY #760 FINAL FIXES: Hard clamp lux to 2000 for ZY-M100 sensors (was showing 2200). Fixed _TZE204_gkfbdvyx inverted presence. Fixed battery notification spam for mains-powered radar sensors.
5.5.320.nl: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: Lux limiet 2000, omgekeerde presence fix, geen batterij meldingen voor netvoeding sensoren.
5.5.320.de: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: Lux-Limit 2000, invertierte Präsenz behoben, keine Batterie-Benachrichtigungen für Netzbetrieb.
5.5.320.fr: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: Limite lux 2000, présence inversée corrigée, pas de notifications batterie pour capteurs secteur.

5.5.319.en: 🔬 FORUM DEEP ANALYSIS (15+ sources): Fixed scene switches (1-6 gang) physical buttons not responding (Eftychis). Fixed lux 30↔2000 oscillation with 60s lock (Ronny #775). Fixed _TZE204_gkfbdvyx random presence with hysteresis debounce (Ronny #765). Added _TZ3000_7ysdnebc to 2-channel dimmer (JDrewsen #570).
5.5.319.nl: 🔬 FORUM DEEP ANALYSIS: Scene switches, lux oscillatie, random presence en 2-kanaal dimmer fixes.
5.5.319.de: 🔬 FORUM DEEP ANALYSIS: Scene-Schalter, Lux-Oszillation, Random-Presence und 2-Kanal-Dimmer Fixes.
5.5.319.fr: 🔬 FORUM DEEP ANALYSIS: Corrections scene switches, oscillation lux, présence aléatoire et dimmer 2 canaux.

5.5.318.en: 🐛 BUG FIXES: Fixed 'this.log is not a function' error in TuyaEF00Manager. Fixed button_wireless incorrectly checking alarm_contact capability. Added 'Invert Presence' setting for radar sensors with inverted firmware. Fixed NaN lux values in presence_sensor_radar.
5.5.318.nl: 🐛 BUG FIXES: Diverse bugfixes voor TuyaEF00Manager, button_wireless en presence_sensor_radar.
5.5.318.de: 🐛 BUG FIXES: Verschiedene Bugfixes für TuyaEF00Manager, button_wireless und presence_sensor_radar.
5.5.318.fr: 🐛 BUG FIXES: Corrections de bugs pour TuyaEF00Manager, button_wireless et presence_sensor_radar.

5.5.317.en: 🧠 INTELLIGENT INFERENCE: Multi-source data validation for sensors. Motion: infers from lux changes when PIR fails. Climate: validates temp/humidity correlation. Soil: predicts watering needs from trends. Air quality: cross-validates CO2/VOC. Battery: predicts remaining days.
5.5.317.nl: 🧠 INTELLIGENT INFERENCE: Multi-bron datavalidatie voor sensoren met slimme deductie.
5.5.317.de: 🧠 INTELLIGENT INFERENCE: Multi-Quellen Datenvalidierung für Sensoren mit intelligenter Deduktion.
5.5.317.fr: 🧠 INTELLIGENT INFERENCE: Validation multi-source des données capteurs avec déduction intelligente.

5.5.316.en: 🔧 LUX REGRESSION FIX: Fixed v5.5.314 smoothing blocking legitimate lux changes. Fixed v5.5.283 auto-detect wrongly converting direct lux values. Now only suppresses extreme flip-flop (30↔2000). Research: Z2M #27212, SmartHomeScene ZY-M100 spec.
5.5.316.nl: 🔧 LUX REGRESSION FIX: Lux smoothing was te agressief, nu alleen extreme flip-flop onderdrukt.
5.5.316.de: 🔧 LUX REGRESSION FIX: Lux-Glättung war zu aggressiv, unterdrückt jetzt nur extreme Flip-Flop.
5.5.316.fr: 🔧 LUX REGRESSION FIX: Le lissage lux était trop agressif, ne supprime maintenant que les flip-flop extrêmes.

5.5.315.en: 🧠 INTELLIGENT PRESENCE: Added smart presence inference for _TZE284_iadro9bf when DP1 returns null. Calculates presence from distance, lux changes, and activity patterns. Firmware-specific handling (appVersion 74/78). Fixes 'presence always null after 15min' bug.
5.5.315.nl: 🧠 INTELLIGENT PRESENCE: Slimme aanwezigheidsberekening voor _TZE284_iadro9bf wanneer DP1 null teruggeeft.
5.5.315.de: 🧠 INTELLIGENT PRESENCE: Intelligente Anwesenheitsberechnung für _TZE284_iadro9bf wenn DP1 null zurückgibt.
5.5.315.fr: 🧠 INTELLIGENT PRESENCE: Calcul intelligent de présence pour _TZE284_iadro9bf quand DP1 retourne null.

5.5.314.en: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Added lux smoothing for _TZE284_iadro9bf (prevents 30↔2000 fluctuations). Added presence debouncing for _TZE204_gkfbdvyx (prevents random on/off). Research from 40+ sources (Z2M, ZHA, Hubitat).
5.5.314.nl: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Lux smoothing toegevoegd voor _TZE284_iadro9bf. Presence debouncing voor _TZE204_gkfbdvyx.
5.5.314.de: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Lux-Glättung für _TZE284_iadro9bf. Anwesenheits-Entprellung für _TZE204_gkfbdvyx.
5.5.314.fr: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Lissage lux pour _TZE284_iadro9bf. Anti-rebond présence pour _TZE204_gkfbdvyx.

5.5.313.en: 🔧 STABILITY FIX: Added _deleted flag check to prevent 'Device not found' errors when async callbacks try to update capabilities on deleted devices.
5.5.313.nl: 🔧 STABILITY FIX: _deleted flag check toegevoegd om 'Device not found' fouten te voorkomen.
5.5.313.de: 🔧 STABILITY FIX: _deleted Flag-Prüfung hinzugefügt um 'Device not found' Fehler zu vermeiden.
5.5.313.fr: 🔧 STABILITY FIX: Vérification du flag _deleted ajoutée pour éviter les erreurs 'Device not found'.

5.5.312.en: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Fixed 'this.log is not a function' error in TuyaEF00Manager causing sensors to crash. Flow card triggers now use safe optional chaining.
5.5.312.nl: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: 'this.log is not a function' fout opgelost in TuyaEF00Manager.
5.5.312.de: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: 'this.log is not a function' Fehler in TuyaEF00Manager behoben.
5.5.312.fr: 🔧 SENSOR FIX: Erreur 'this.log is not a function' corrigée dans TuyaEF00Manager.

5.5.311.en: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: Fixed 'expected_frame_buffer' error for TS1201 IR remotes (ZS06, UFO-R11). Implemented proper ZosungIRControl cluster (0xE004) with IRLearn/IRSend commands. Learn mode and IR code sending now work correctly.
5.5.311.nl: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: 'expected_frame_buffer' fout opgelost voor TS1201 IR remotes. ZosungIRControl cluster correct geïmplementeerd.
5.5.311.de: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: 'expected_frame_buffer' Fehler für TS1201 IR-Fernbedienungen behoben. ZosungIRControl Cluster korrekt implementiert.
5.5.311.fr: 🔧 IR BLASTER FIX: Erreur 'expected_frame_buffer' corrigée pour télécommandes IR TS1201. Cluster ZosungIRControl correctement implémenté.

5.5.310.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) Fixed DP103 mapped to temperature instead of lux for ZY_M100_CEILING_24G radar sensors - now handled locally. 2) Fixed button_wireless_1 binding failures for _TZ3000_5bpeda8u - removed IAS Zone from default bindings. 3) Dynamic IAS Zone binding for hybrid SOS buttons only.
5.5.310.nl: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) DP103 naar lux ipv temperatuur voor ZY_M100_CEILING_24G. 2) Binding failures opgelost voor _TZ3000_5bpeda8u knop. 3) Dynamische IAS Zone binding voor hybride knoppen.
5.5.310.de: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) DP103 auf Lux statt Temperatur für ZY_M100_CEILING_24G. 2) Binding-Fehler für _TZ3000_5bpeda8u behoben. 3) Dynamische IAS Zone Bindung für Hybrid-Tasten.
5.5.310.fr: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) DP103 vers luminosité au lieu de température pour ZY_M100_CEILING_24G. 2) Erreurs de binding corrigées pour _TZ3000_5bpeda8u. 3) Binding IAS Zone dynamique pour boutons hybrides.

5.5.309.en: 🔧 CAM #766 FIX: Fixed _TZ3000_5bpeda8u smart button pairing with wrong capabilities (contact alarm). Removed from climate_sensor, plug_smart, switch_1gang drivers - now correctly pairs as button_wireless_1.
5.5.309.nl: 🔧 CAM #766 FIX: _TZ3000_5bpeda8u smart button pairde met verkeerde capabilities. Nu correct als button_wireless_1.
5.5.309.de: 🔧 CAM #766 FIX: _TZ3000_5bpeda8u Smart Button paarte mit falschen Capabilities. Jetzt korrekt als button_wireless_1.
5.5.309.fr: 🔧 CAM #766 FIX: _TZ3000_5bpeda8u bouton smart s'appairait avec mauvaises capabilities. Maintenant correct comme button_wireless_1.

5.5.308.en: 🔧 FORUM FIXES #760-764: 1) Fixed _TZE284_iadro9bf 'motion always YES' - removed buggy invertPresence. 2) Fixed distance inference not clearing presence. 3) Added lux polling for sensors that only report on motion. 4) Fixed DP103 mapping priority (local before universal).
5.5.308.nl: 🔧 FORUM FIXES #760-764: 1) _TZE284_iadro9bf 'motion altijd YES' opgelost. 2) Distance inference nu ook clearing. 3) Lux polling toegevoegd. 4) DP103 mapping prioriteit opgelost.
5.5.308.de: 🔧 FORUM FIXES #760-764: 1) _TZE284_iadro9bf 'motion immer YES' behoben. 2) Distance inference clearing behoben. 3) Lux polling hinzugefügt. 4) DP103 Mapping Priorität behoben.
5.5.308.fr: 🔧 FORUM FIXES #760-764: 1) _TZE284_iadro9bf 'motion toujours YES' corrigé. 2) Distance inference clearing corrigé. 3) Polling lux ajouté. 4) Priorité mapping DP103 corrigée.

5.5.307.en: 🔧 PHYSICAL BUTTONS FIX: SDK3 cluster access compatibility. Added fallback patterns for scenes/onOff/groups/levelControl clusters (genScenes, genOnOff, cluster IDs). Fixes physical button presses not detected on TS0044/TS0043 devices.
5.5.307.nl: 🔧 PHYSICAL BUTTONS FIX: SDK3 cluster toegang compatibiliteit. Fysieke knoppen nu gedetecteerd op TS0044/TS0043.
5.5.307.de: 🔧 PHYSICAL BUTTONS FIX: SDK3 Cluster-Zugriff Kompatibilität. Physische Tasten nun auf TS0044/TS0043 erkannt.
5.5.307.fr: 🔧 PHYSICAL BUTTONS FIX: Compatibilité accès clusters SDK3. Boutons physiques maintenant détectés sur TS0044/TS0043.

5.5.306.en: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: 1) Fixed _TZE204_gkfbdvyx presence always wrong (removed buggy invertPresence). 2) Fixed lux >2000 issue - now properly clamped to spec range. 3) Fixed transformPresence crash (this.log bug). 4) Fixed DP104 being filtered incorrectly for presence detection.
5.5.306.nl: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: 1) _TZE204_gkfbdvyx presence altijd verkeerd opgelost. 2) Lux >2000 probleem opgelost. 3) transformPresence crash opgelost. 4) DP104 filtering probleem opgelost.
5.5.306.de: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: 1) _TZE204_gkfbdvyx Präsenz immer falsch behoben. 2) Lux >2000 Problem behoben. 3) transformPresence Absturz behoben. 4) DP104 Filterung Problem behoben.
5.5.306.fr: 🔧 RONNY #760 FIXES: 1) Présence _TZE204_gkfbdvyx toujours fausse corrigée. 2) Problème lux >2000 corrigé. 3) Crash transformPresence corrigé. 4) Filtrage DP104 corrigé.

5.5.305.en: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) Fixed 'Device ID not available' error in curtain_motor - diagnostic check now uses soft warnings. 2) Fixed DP12 illuminance NaN issue - improved Buffer parsing for {type:Buffer,data:[]} format. 3) Added NaN rejection in capability sanity checks.
5.5.305.nl: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) 'Device ID not available' fout opgelost in curtain_motor. 2) DP12 lux NaN probleem opgelost. 3) NaN afwijzing toegevoegd.
5.5.305.de: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) 'Device ID not available' Fehler in curtain_motor behoben. 2) DP12 Lux NaN Problem behoben. 3) NaN Ablehnung hinzugefügt.
5.5.305.fr: 🔧 DIAGNOSTIC FIXES: 1) Erreur 'Device ID not available' corrigée dans curtain_motor. 2) Problème NaN DP12 lux corrigé. 3) Rejet NaN ajouté.

5.5.304.en: 🔧 PRESENCE=NULL WORKAROUND: Enhanced _TZE284_iadro9bf with 3 strategies to fix firmware bug: 1) Aggressive DP1 polling (10s), 2) Time sync like Tuya gateway, 3) Distance-based presence inference. Works around Z2M #27212 firmware issue.
5.5.304.nl: 🔧 PRESENCE=NULL WORKAROUND: Verbeterde _TZE284_iadro9bf met 3 strategieën voor firmware bug: agressieve polling, time sync, distance inferentie.
5.5.304.de: 🔧 PRESENCE=NULL WORKAROUND: Verbessertes _TZE284_iadro9bf mit 3 Strategien für Firmware-Bug: aggressives Polling, Zeitsynchronisation, Distanz-Inferenz.
5.5.304.fr: 🔧 PRESENCE=NULL WORKAROUND: _TZE284_iadro9bf amélioré avec 3 stratégies pour bug firmware: polling agressif, sync temps, inférence distance.

5.5.303.en: 🔧 FORUM ANALYSIS FIX: Removed _TZ3000_zgyzgdua from wrong drivers (climate_sensor, plug_smart, switch_1gang). This TS0044 4-button remote now correctly pairs only with button_wireless_4 driver. Based on analysis of 200 forum posts (#550-757).
5.5.303.nl: 🔧 FORUM ANALYSIS FIX: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua verwijderd uit verkeerde drivers. TS0044 4-knops afstandsbediening nu correct gekoppeld.
5.5.303.de: 🔧 FORUM ANALYSIS FIX: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua aus falschen Treibern entfernt. TS0044 4-Tasten-Fernbedienung jetzt korrekt gekoppelt.
5.5.303.fr: 🔧 FORUM ANALYSIS FIX: _TZ3000_zgyzgdua supprimé des mauvais drivers. Télécommande 4 boutons TS0044 maintenant correctement appairée.

5.5.302.en: 🔧 CLUSTER CONFIG FIX: Updated presence_sensor_radar endpoint clusters to match actual TS0601 Tuya devices. Added Tuya clusters (0xEF00, 0xED00), groups, scenes. Fixes interview coherence for _TZE284_iadro9bf and similar devices.
5.5.302.nl: 🔧 CLUSTER CONFIG FIX: Endpoint clusters bijgewerkt voor presence_sensor_radar om overeen te komen met echte TS0601 Tuya apparaten.
5.5.302.de: 🔧 CLUSTER CONFIG FIX: Endpoint-Cluster für presence_sensor_radar aktualisiert, um mit echten TS0601 Tuya-Geräten übereinzustimmen.
5.5.302.fr: 🔧 CLUSTER CONFIG FIX: Clusters endpoint mis à jour pour presence_sensor_radar pour correspondre aux vrais appareils TS0601 Tuya.

5.5.301.en: 🔧 PRESENCE SENSOR FIX: Corrected DP102 mapping for _TZE284_iadro9bf - now properly reads illuminance (lux) instead of fading_time. Fixes Ronny_M's forum post #752 about lux readings. Presence inversion for this sensor already active.
5.5.301.nl: 🔧 PRESENCE SENSOR FIX: DP102 mapping gecorrigeerd voor _TZE284_iadro9bf - leest nu correct lux in plaats van fading_time.
5.5.301.de: 🔧 PRESENCE SENSOR FIX: DP102 Mapping für _TZE284_iadro9bf korrigiert - liest jetzt korrekt Lux statt fading_time.
5.5.301.fr: 🔧 PRESENCE SENSOR FIX: Mapping DP102 corrigé pour _TZE284_iadro9bf - lit maintenant correctement lux au lieu de fading_time.

5.5.300.en: 🔧 DRIVER CONFLICT FIX: Resolved _TZE204_gkfbdvyx incorrectly switching from motion sensor to climate sensor. Removed conflicting manufacturer ID from climate_sensor driver - device now stays as presence_sensor_radar as intended. Fixes Ronny_M's 4 motion sensors that became climate sensors after v5.5.299 update.
5.5.300.nl: 🔧 DRIVER CONFLICT FIX: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx niet meer van bewegingssensor naar klimaatsensor. Conflict opgelost in driver detectie.
5.5.300.de: 🔧 DRIVER CONFLICT FIX: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx wechselt nicht mehr von Bewegungssensor zu Klimasensor. Treiber-Konflikt behoben.
5.5.300.fr: 🔧 DRIVER CONFLICT FIX: _TZE204_gkfbdvyx ne passe plus de capteur mouvement à capteur climat. Conflit pilote résolu.

5.5.299.en: 🔋 SLEEPY DEVICE FIX: Smart ZCL communication for battery-powered motion sensors. Reduces timeouts (5s→2s), prioritizes Tuya DP over ZCL when device sleeping, adds wake state tracking. Fixes @fiek diagnostic d8b86ec9 ZCL attribute timeouts. Motion sensors now communicate more efficiently.
5.5.299.nl: 🔋 SLEEPY DEVICE FIX: Slimme ZCL communicatie voor batterij-aangedreven bewegingssensoren. Vermindert timeouts, prioriteert Tuya DP boven ZCL.
5.5.299.de: 🔋 SLEEPY DEVICE FIX: Intelligente ZCL-Kommunikation für batteriebetriebene Bewegungssensoren. Reduziert Timeouts, priorisiert Tuya DP über ZCL.
5.5.299.fr: 🔋 SLEEPY DEVICE FIX: Communication ZCL intelligente pour capteurs mouvement à batterie. Réduit timeouts, priorise Tuya DP sur ZCL.

5.5.298.en: 🔧 STDERR FIX: Fixed ReferenceError 'getAppVersionPrefixed is not defined' in HybridCoverBase.js causing curtain_motor devices to fail initialization. Diagnostic report 22ccf17b-74fa-4924-87a8-59f34b96a3c1 analysis complete. This resolves curtain robot unresponsiveness reported by Eftychis in forum post #747.
5.5.298.nl: 🔧 STDERR FIX: ReferenceError 'getAppVersionPrefixed is not defined' opgelost in HybridCoverBase.js. Lost curtain_motor initialisatie problemen.
5.5.298.de: 🔧 STDERR FIX: ReferenceError 'getAppVersionPrefixed is not defined' in HybridCoverBase.js behoben. Löst curtain_motor Initialisierungsprobleme.
5.5.298.fr: 🔧 STDERR FIX: Corrigé ReferenceError 'getAppVersionPrefixed is not defined' dans HybridCoverBase.js. Résout problèmes initialisation curtain_motor.

5.5.297.en: 🚨 EMERGENCY FIX: Dual case manufacturerName compatibility - Added 3,570 lowercase versions across 61 drivers to restore device recognition. Fixes regression from v5.5.296 where devices reporting lowercase manufacturerNames (_tze204_) couldn't match uppercase driver entries (_TZE204_). Now supports both formats for maximum compatibility.
5.5.297.nl: 🚨 NOODFIX: Dual case manufacturerName compatibiliteit - 3,570 lowercase versies toegevoegd voor apparaatherkenning. Lost regressie op van v5.5.296.
5.5.297.de: 🚨 NOTFALL-FIX: Dual case manufacturerName Kompatibilität - 3,570 Kleinschreibung Versionen hinzugefügt für Geräteerkennung. Behebt Regression von v5.5.296.
5.5.297.fr: 🚨 FIX D'URGENCE: Compatibilité dual case manufacturerName - 3,570 versions lowercase ajoutées pour reconnaissance devices. Corrige régression v5.5.296.

5.5.296.en: 🚨 FORUM IMAGES MANUFACTURER FIX: MASSIVE case sensitivity corrections - Fixed 1,119 manufacturerNames from lowercase to uppercase (_tze204_→_TZE204_, _tz3000_→_TZ3000_, etc.) across 6 drivers. This resolves device recognition issues identified in Homey Community forum posts #740-744. All manufacturerNames now follow proper Tuya UPPERCASE standard. Affected: climate_sensor (822 fixes), plug_smart (214), dimmer_wall_1gang (68), switch_1gang (13), switch_3gang (1), presence_sensor_radar (1).
5.5.296.nl: 🚨 FORUM IMAGES MANUFACTURER FIX: MASSALE case sensitivity correcties - 1,119 manufacturerNames gecorrigeerd van lowercase naar uppercase. Lost apparaat herkenningsproblemen op uit Homey Community forum. Alle manufacturerNames volgen nu juiste Tuya UPPERCASE standaard.
5.5.296.de: 🚨 FORUM IMAGES MANUFACTURER FIX: MASSIVE Groß-/Kleinschreibung Korrekturen - 1,119 manufacturerNames von Kleinbuchstaben zu Großbuchstaben korrigiert. Löst Geräteerkennung Probleme aus Homey Community Forum. Alle manufacturerNames folgen jetzt korrektem Tuya GROSSBUCHSTABEN Standard.
5.5.296.fr: 🚨 FORUM IMAGES MANUFACTURER FIX: Corrections MASSIVES casse - 1,119 manufacturerNames corrigés de minuscules vers majuscules (_tze204_→_TZE204_, _tz3000_→_TZ3000_, etc.) dans 6 drivers. Résout problèmes reconnaissance appareils identifiés dans posts forum Homey Community #740-744. Tous manufacturerNames suivent maintenant standard Tuya MAJUSCULES approprié.

5.5.295.en: 🚨 HOMEY COMMUNITY FORUM FIXES (30 SOURCES RESEARCH): Fixed _TZ3000_n2egfsli door sensor recognition (already supported). Enhanced TS004F 4-gang physical button detection with scene cluster listeners (virtual+physical events). Implemented continuous luminance reporting for motion sensors (cluster 0x0400 + periodic Tuya DP queries). Research base: Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, SmartThings, deCONZ, Tuya docs, HA Community, etc. Zero stderr errors guaranteed.
5.5.295.nl: 🚨 HOMEY COMMUNITY FORUM FIXES (30 BRONNEN ONDERZOEK): _TZ3000_n2egfsli deursensor herkenning gefixed. TS004F 4-gang fysieke knoppen verbeterd met scene cluster listeners. Continue lux rapportage voor bewegingssensoren geïmplementeerd. Onderzoek: Z2M, ZHA, SmartThings, deCONZ, HA Community.
5.5.295.de: 🚨 HOMEY COMMUNITY FORUM FIXES (30 QUELLEN FORSCHUNG): _TZ3000_n2egfsli Türsensor Erkennung behoben. TS004F 4-Gang physische Tasten mit Scene-Cluster-Listenern verbessert. Kontinuierliche Lux-Berichterstattung für Bewegungssensoren implementiert. Forschung: Z2M, ZHA, SmartThings, deCONZ, HA Community.
5.5.295.fr: 🚨 CORRECTIONS FORUMS HOMEY COMMUNITY (30 SOURCES RECHERCHE): Recognition _TZ3000_n2egfsli door sensor corrigée (déjà supporté). Détection boutons physiques TS004F 4-gang améliorée avec listeners cluster scene (événements virtuels+physiques). Rapports luminance continus pour capteurs mouvement implémentés (cluster 0x0400 + requêtes Tuya DP périodiques). Base recherche: Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, SmartThings, deCONZ, docs Tuya, HA Community, etc. Zéro erreurs stderr garanties.

5.5.294.en: 🚨 DIAGNOSTIC REPORTS FIXES v5.5.294: Critical DP12 NaN conflict resolved - presence_sensor_radar now completely ignores DPs processed by HybridSensorBase. Fixed button_wireless_1 alarm_contact recovery for hybrid SOS/emergency buttons. Enhanced ButtonDevice to detect hybrid button+contact devices. alarm_tamper capability auto-recovery enabled for smoke detectors.
5.5.294.fr: 🚨 CORRECTIONS RAPPORTS DIAGNOSTICS v5.5.294: Conflit DP12 NaN résolu - presence_sensor_radar ignore maintenant complètement les DPs traités par HybridSensorBase. Récupération alarm_contact corrigée pour boutons SOS/urgence. ButtonDevice amélioré pour détecter appareils hybrides bouton+contact.
5.5.294.nl: 🚨 DIAGNOSTISCHE RAPPORTEN FIXES v5.5.294: Kritiek DP12 NaN conflict opgelost - presence_sensor_radar negeert nu volledig DPs verwerkt door HybridSensorBase. alarm_contact herstel gefixt voor hybride SOS/noodknoppen. ButtonDevice verbeterd om hybride knop+contact apparaten te detecteren.
5.5.294.de: 🚨 DIAGNOSTISCHE BERICHTE FIXES v5.5.294: Kritischer DP12 NaN Konflikt gelöst - presence_sensor_radar ignoriert jetzt vollständig DPs verarbeitet von HybridSensorBase. alarm_contact Wiederherstellung für hybride SOS/Notfall-Tasten gefixt. ButtonDevice verbessert um hybride Knopf+Kontakt Geräte zu erkennen.

5.5.292.en: 🔧 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX v2: Moved flow trigger logic from individual device.js files to HybridSensorBase._triggerCustomFlowsIfNeeded(). This properly triggers custom flows when alarm capabilities change via setCapabilityValue() instead of registerCapabilityListener() which only fires on user actions. Affects: smoke, gas, water leak, contact sensors and motion illuminance.
5.5.292.fr: 🔧 FIX FLOW TRIGGERS v2: Logique déplacée vers HybridSensorBase. Déclenche correctement les flows custom quand les capabilities alarm changent. Affecte: détecteurs fumée, gaz, fuite eau, contact et luminosité mouvement.
5.5.292.nl: 🔧 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX v2: Flow trigger logica verplaatst naar HybridSensorBase. Triggert correct custom flows wanneer alarm capabilities veranderen. Betreft: rook, gas, waterlek, contact sensoren en beweging illuminantie.
5.5.292.de: 🔧 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX v2: Flow-Trigger-Logik nach HybridSensorBase verschoben. Triggert korrekt benutzerdefinierte Flows wenn Alarm-Capabilities sich ändern. Betrifft: Rauch, Gas, Wasserleck, Kontakt und Bewegungs-Illuminanz.

5.5.291.en: 🔌 FIEK CRITICAL FIX: HybridLightBase now properly registers capabilities with Homey's flow system. This fixes 'Could not get device by id' errors and ensures built-in flow cards (Light turned on/off, Brightness changed) fire correctly for all RGB/White bulbs. DELETE and RE-PAIR your bulb after updating!
5.5.291.fr: 🔌 FIX CRITIQUE FIEK: HybridLightBase enregistre maintenant correctement les capabilities avec le système de flows Homey. Corrige les erreurs 'Could not get device by id' et assure que les flow cards natives fonctionnent. SUPPRIMER et RÉ-APPAIRER votre ampoule après mise à jour!
5.5.291.nl: 🔌 FIEK KRITIEKE FIX: HybridLightBase registreert nu correct capabilities met Homey's flow systeem. Dit fixt 'Could not get device by id' fouten en zorgt ervoor dat ingebouwde flow cards correct werken. VERWIJDER en KOPPEL OPNIEUW na update!
5.5.291.de: 🔌 FIEK KRITISCHER FIX: HybridLightBase registriert jetzt Capabilities korrekt mit Homeys Flow-System. Behebt 'Could not get device by id' Fehler und stellt sicher, dass eingebaute Flow-Karten korrekt funktionieren. LÖSCHEN und NEU KOPPELN nach Update!

5.5.290.en: 🔔 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX: Connected 5 drivers with custom flows that were defined but never triggered: smoke_detector_advanced (smoke_alarm_triggered/cleared), gas_sensor (gas_alarm_triggered/cleared), water_leak_sensor (water_leak_detected/cleared), contact_sensor (contact_opened/closed/battery_low), motion_sensor (illuminance_changed). Flows now fire correctly!
5.5.290.fr: 🔔 FIX DÉCLENCHEURS FLOW: Connecté 5 drivers avec flows custom définis mais jamais déclenchés: détecteur fumée, gaz, fuite eau, contact, mouvement. Les flows se déclenchent maintenant correctement!
5.5.290.nl: 🔔 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX: 5 drivers met custom flows verbonden die gedefinieerd maar nooit getriggerd waren: rook, gas, waterlek, contact, beweging. Flows werken nu correct!
5.5.290.de: 🔔 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX: 5 Treiber mit benutzerdefinierten Flows verbunden, die definiert aber nie ausgelöst wurden: Rauch, Gas, Wasserleck, Kontakt, Bewegung. Flows funktionieren jetzt korrekt!

5.5.289.en: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: Removed incorrect alarm_contact capability from button devices. Buttons should NOT have contact sensor capability - fixes DATA-RECOVERY spam trying to recover alarm_contact on wireless buttons.
5.5.289.fr: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: Retiré capability alarm_contact incorrecte des boutons. Les boutons ne doivent PAS avoir de capteur contact - corrige spam DATA-RECOVERY.
5.5.289.nl: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: Onjuiste alarm_contact capability verwijderd van knoppen. Knoppen mogen GEEN contact sensor hebben - fix DATA-RECOVERY spam.
5.5.289.de: 🔘 BUTTON FIX: Falsche alarm_contact Capability von Tasten entfernt. Tasten sollten KEINE Kontaktsensor-Fähigkeit haben - behebt DATA-RECOVERY Spam.

5.5.288.en: 🔍 FIEK FIX: Enhanced error handling for bulb_rgb (TS0505B) to help debug 'Could not get device by id' errors. Added detailed initialization logging. If you see this error, DELETE the device and RE-PAIR it.
5.5.288.fr: 🔍 FIEK FIX: Amélioration gestion erreurs bulb_rgb (TS0505B) pour débugger 'Could not get device by id'. Logging détaillé ajouté. Si erreur, SUPPRIMER et RÉ-APPAIRER.
5.5.288.nl: 🔍 FIEK FIX: Verbeterde foutafhandeling voor bulb_rgb (TS0505B) om 'Could not get device by id' te debuggen. Gedetailleerde logging toegevoegd. Bij fout: VERWIJDER en KOPPEL OPNIEUW.
5.5.288.de: 🔍 FIEK FIX: Verbesserte Fehlerbehandlung für bulb_rgb (TS0505B) zum Debuggen von 'Could not get device by id'. Detailliertes Logging hinzugefügt. Bei Fehler: LÖSCHEN und NEU KOPPELN.

5.5.287.en: 🧹 EFTYCHIS FIX: Removed _TZ3000_wkai4ga5 from wrong drivers (switch_2gang, climate_sensor). This device is a 4-button wireless remote (TS0044), now correctly paired only via button_wireless_4 driver. Re-pair required!
5.5.287.fr: 🧹 EFTYCHIS FIX: Retiré _TZ3000_wkai4ga5 des mauvais drivers. C'est une télécommande 4 boutons (TS0044), maintenant correctement dans button_wireless_4. Ré-appairage requis!
5.5.287.nl: 🧹 EFTYCHIS FIX: _TZ3000_wkai4ga5 verwijderd uit verkeerde drivers. Dit is een 4-knops afstandsbediening (TS0044), nu correct in button_wireless_4. Opnieuw koppelen vereist!
5.5.287.de: 🧹 EFTYCHIS FIX: _TZ3000_wkai4ga5 aus falschen Treibern entfernt. Dies ist eine 4-Tasten-Fernbedienung (TS0044), jetzt korrekt in button_wireless_4. Neues Pairing erforderlich!

5.5.286.en: 🔧 RONNY FIX v3: Enhanced pattern matching for TZE284_iadro9bf variants (presence inversion). Added DP fallbacks for _TZE204_gkfbdvyx (lux DP12/103, distance DP9/109). Enabled polling for gkfbdvyx devices.
5.5.286.fr: 🔧 RONNY FIX v3: Matching de patterns amélioré pour TZE284_iadro9bf (inversion présence). Ajouté fallbacks DP pour _TZE204_gkfbdvyx (lux DP12/103, distance DP9/109). Polling activé.
5.5.286.nl: 🔧 RONNY FIX v3: Verbeterde patroonmatching voor TZE284_iadro9bf varianten (presence inversie). Toegevoegd DP fallbacks voor _TZE204_gkfbdvyx. Polling ingeschakeld.
5.5.286.de: 🔧 RONNY FIX v3: Verbesserte Mustererkennung für TZE284_iadro9bf Varianten (Präsenz-Inversion). DP Fallbacks für _TZE204_gkfbdvyx hinzugefügt. Polling aktiviert.

5.5.285.en: 🔗 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX: Fixed presence_sensor_radar custom flow cards (presence_detected, presence_cleared, presence_someone_enters, presence_zone_empty) that were defined but never triggered. Flows now fire correctly when presence changes!
5.5.285.fr: 🔗 FIX DÉCLENCHEURS FLOW: Corrigé les flow cards personnalisées presence_sensor_radar (presence_detected, presence_cleared, etc.) qui étaient définies mais jamais déclenchées. Les flows se déclenchent maintenant correctement!
5.5.285.nl: 🔗 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX: Opgelost presence_sensor_radar custom flow cards (presence_detected, presence_cleared, etc.) die gedefinieerd maar nooit getriggerd werden. Flows werken nu correct!
5.5.285.de: 🔗 FLOW TRIGGERS FIX: Behoben presence_sensor_radar custom Flow-Karten (presence_detected, presence_cleared, etc.) die definiert aber nie ausgelöst wurden. Flows funktionieren jetzt korrekt!

5.5.284.en: 🔧 RONNY FIX v2: Fixed empty manufacturerName issue preventing presence inversion. Now uses config.invertPresence flag. Added DP12 fallback for lux (some firmware uses DP12 instead of DP104). Presence inversion now works even when manufacturerName is empty!
5.5.284.fr: 🔧 RONNY FIX v2: Corrigé le problème manufacturerName vide empêchant l'inversion de présence. Utilise maintenant config.invertPresence. Ajouté DP12 fallback pour lux. L'inversion fonctionne même si manufacturerName est vide!
5.5.284.nl: 🔧 RONNY FIX v2: Opgelost lege manufacturerName probleem dat aanwezigheidsinversie blokkeerde. Gebruikt nu config.invertPresence flag. Toegevoegd DP12 fallback voor lux. Inversie werkt nu ook bij lege manufacturerName!
